Learn about the Summer North Coast Master Plan

--- CONTENT ---
Summer North Coast
When do you call a place your favorite beach destination? How do you imagine it? Wherever your imagination takes you, we will describe it in this article. We will give you all the details about the master plan of one of the fanciest projects overlooking the dazzling Mediterranean Sea, Summer North Coast Village.
Sabbour outlined a perfect beach community in Sidi Heneish, and we will tell you what it exhibits.
Summer North Coast Master Plan
A perfect summer fantasy doesn’t only include the blue between the sky and water. It also features luxurious facilities, exclusive services, and luxurious beach homes. It is somewhere you and the people accompanying you will agree on, and Sabbour crafted it flawlessly.
Al Ahly Sabbour
designed a one-of-a-kind master plan for Summer North Coast Resort. It wanted to ensure you would step into the enchanting beach destination of your dreams, whether you are looking for tranquility, excitement, or a perfect merge between both.
The resort’s outline exhibits a variety of premium facilities, from a natural paradise to top-notch sports facilities. Let’s get into its details.
Summer North Coast Master Plan
The Summer Sidi Heneish Project has a ton of facilities that will make your vacation as memorable and unique as possible. Who says that El Sahel Egypt, is just about beaches and relaxing?
Summer Sidi Heneish Facilities
Summer Sidi Heneish Village is not just a getaway; it’s a luxurious vacation experience that offers an extensive range of high-end facilities to cater to your every need. Here’s what you can look forward to:
Boundless Water Features:
Dive into a paradise with a stunning beachfront, serene swimming pools, and mesmerizing crystal lagoons that invite relaxation and fun.
Kid’s Area:
Let your little ones explore and play in a dedicated kids’ area, where their laughter transforms into unforgettable memories, ensuring a delightful experience for the whole family.
First-Class Commercial Hub:
Indulge in an exquisite shopping experience at our first-class commercial hub, featuring delightful cuisines and a variety of entertainment options that cater to all tastes.
Five-Star Hospitality Services:
Treat yourself to rejuvenating moments with our five-star hospitality services, designed to revive your mind and soul in pure luxury and comfort.
Cutting-Edge Sports Facilities:
For fitness enthusiasts, our state-of-the-art sports facilities provide everything you need to stay active and engaged, no matter your preferred activity.
Beach Clubhouse:
Enjoy memorable moments by the beach at our beach clubhouse, where relaxation meets recreation in a stunning coastal setting.
Beach Lagoons:
Experience the tranquil beauty of our beach lagoons, perfect for unwinding or enjoying a variety of water activities.
Summer North Coast Exact Location & Kilo
Al Ahly Sabbour developed a beach destination in the North Coast for every person seeking a fancy escape from the hassle of the city to the refreshing Mediterranean breeze, Summer Sidi Heneish Resort. The village spreads over 864 acres of land, exactly on the 246th km of Alexandria – Marsa Matrouh Road.
Summer North Coast Exact Location & Kilo
Did Al Ahly Sabbour build your forever beach escapade?
Then you need to check out the luxurious coastal homes that were constructed in the resort. The master plan of Summer North Coast Village includes an elite collection of properties with unique layouts and different designs.
Summer North Coast Units
The master plan of Summer North Coast features a wide range of fancy beach homes to suit every fine taste out there. They vary between standalone villas, twin houses, townhouses, and chalets.
Summer North Coast Units
The luxurious villas overlook the variety of water features in the resort, while the premium chalets can come with a garden/terrace feature.
Below, we’ll talk about the updated prices of the Summer Sidi Heneish.
Summer North Coast Prices 2025
The prices of the Summer North Coast are set depending on the layouts, features, and sizes. It’s also worth mentioning that the units for sale in the resort are divided into resale and primary. Some of the available primary units are:
A twin house with 3 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and a built up area of 185 sqm. The price of this property is 30,213,000 EGP.
A penthouse with 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and a built up area of 179 sqm. The price of this property is 30,213,000 EGP.
A penthouse with 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a built up area of 84 sqm. The price of this property is 9,293,000 EGP.
Summer Sidi Heneish Payment Plans
There are properties for sale in the Summer, each with its own flexible payment plan:
A 5% down payment and an 8-year payment plan
Or
A 10% down payment and a 9-year installment option
Please note that the available properties and their prices are constantly updated.

Hacienda Heneish Master Plan Revealed and Explained
===================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Hacienda sidi Heneish
Do you dream of a new summer house that combines luxury and coziness at the same time? Are you looking for a summer home that offers the best of both worlds, the luxurious properties on the one hand and the edge-cutting amenities on the other hand? Well, all are wishes are met in the Hacienda Heneish master plan.
This artwork offers more than what you dream about, it’s an earthly piece of heaven. Since we know you’re excited to know more about the project, let’s give you a detailed account of the project in this article. So, keep reading and you will be deciding on your unit by the end of this article.
Hacienda Heneish Master Plan
The Hacienda Heneish master plan is unique in two senses. The first is that it offers various types of summer homes, making sure that you will find whatever you are looking for. The second is the facilities and activities that come under the umbrella of Hacienda Heneish’s top-notch amenities.
To understand more about this state-of-the-art master plan, let’s take a closer look at it. To begin with,  the land area of this masterpiece is 420 acres. This land area hosts 2000+ residential units alongside the verdant landscape and greenery.
Take a look at the Hacienda Heneish master plan below:
Hacienda Heneish master plan
After taking a look at the project’s master plan, it’s time to discover the facilities in the resort.
Hacienda Sidi Heneish Facilities & Things To Do in Sahel
The list of services and facilities you will find in the Hacienda Heneish master plan includes(but definitely not limited to):
1.1 km Beachfront
This facility offers a stunning stretch of coastline, perfect for leisurely walks, sunbathing, and enjoying the scenic views of the sea.
Lagoons and Water Features
The presence of lagoons and water features enhances the aesthetic appeal of the area, creating a serene environment.
Landscapes and Lush Greenery
The facility is surrounded by beautifully landscaped gardens and lush greenery, which contribute to a peaceful and inviting atmosphere. This natural setting not only enhances the visual appeal but also offers spaces for relaxation and outdoor activities.
Sports Facilities
Equipped with various sports facilities, this area caters to active guests. These may include tennis courts, basketball courts, or fitness areas, allowing visitors to engage in physical activities and sports during their stay.
Hospitality Facilities
The hospitality facilities encompass a range of services designed to ensure a comfortable stay for guests. This includes accommodations, dining options.
Private Beach and Beach Activities
The private beach offers an exclusive area for guests to enjoy beach activities such as swimming, sunbathing, and beach sports.
Clubhouse
The clubhouse serves as a social hub for guests, providing a space for gatherings, events, and recreational activities. It often includes amenities such as lounges, game rooms, and dining areas, fostering a sense of community among visitors.
Nightlife Venues Including Kiki’s
Nightlife options, such as Kiki’s, offer entertainment and socializing opportunities after dark. These venues may feature live music, dancing, and themed events, providing a vibrant atmosphere for guests looking to enjoy the nightlife.
Seafront Hotel
The seafront hotel provides comfortable accommodations with stunning views of the ocean. Vacationers can enjoy the convenience of being close to the beach while having access to various amenities and services that enhance their stay.
Swimming Pool
The swimming pool offers a refreshing escape for guests, providing a space for relaxation and leisure. It may include features such as sun loungers, poolside bars, and areas for children, making it a family-friendly facility.
Wellness Center
The wellness center focuses on health and relaxation, offering services such as spa treatments, fitness classes, and wellness programs.
This facility is designed to promote physical and mental well-being, allowing guests to rejuvenate during their stay.
The following question that comes right after the master plan is the location. So, let’s explore the location of Hacienda Heneish and let you know how you will reach your destination.
Hacienda Sidi Heneish Location
The brilliant developer,
Palm Hills Developments
, granted its project a prime location at the heart of the North Coast in the very unique spot of Sidi Heneish.
Hacienda Sidi Heneish is strategically located on the 247th kilo of the International Coastal Road. More precisely, extending from the  221st to the 250th of the Coastal Road.
Sidi Heneish Area
This location makes the Hacienda Heneish Resort a short drive from:
Fouka Road
Dabaa Road
Almaza Bay
Smeralda Bay
Marsa Baghoush
Silversands North Coast
Bay 7
Summer Resort
Finally, it’s time for our final stop in this article, the prices of Hacienda Heneish.

The Hacienda Story – Everything You Need To Know
Hacienda Heneish Prices 2025
Hacienda Sidi Heneish has a range of distinctive properties with different sizes, layouts, and price rates. It’s worth noting that the beach houses for sale in Hacienda Heneish North Coast are divided into resale and primary units.
The prices of the resale units Hacienda Heneish start at 16,343,240 EGP. Meanwhile, the primary (listed directly by the developer) beach houses start at 27,098,000 EGP.

The hospitality facilities encompass a range of services designed to ensure a comfortable stay for guests. This includes accommodations, dining options.
Private Beach and Beach Activities
The private beach offers an exclusive area for guests to enjoy beach activities such as swimming, sunbathing, and beach sports.
Clubhouse
The clubhouse serves as a social hub for guests, providing a space for gatherings, events, and recreational activities. It often includes amenities such as lounges, game rooms, and dining areas, fostering a sense of community among visitors.
Nightlife Venues Including Kiki’s
Nightlife options, such as Kiki’s, offer entertainment and socializing opportunities after dark. These venues may feature live music, dancing, and themed events, providing a vibrant atmosphere for guests looking to enjoy the nightlife.
Seafront Hotel
The seafront hotel provides comfortable accommodations with stunning views of the ocean. Vacationers can enjoy the convenience of being close to the beach while having access to various amenities and services that enhance their stay.
Swimming Pool
The swimming pool offers a refreshing escape for guests, providing a space for relaxation and leisure. It may include features such as sun loungers, poolside bars, and areas for children, making it a family-friendly facility.
Wellness Center
The wellness center focuses on health and relaxation, offering services such as spa treatments, fitness classes, and wellness programs.
This facility is designed to promote physical and mental well-being, allowing guests to rejuvenate during their stay.

Sahel Beaches: A Full Guide with the Best Resorts
=================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Sahel Beaches
Who does not love Sahel beaches and their mesmerizing waters? Because we know that traveling is the most exciting and awaited thing in our whole, long, tiresome year. Once the summer comes, we are all thrilled to go on our reward trips with our family and friends.
We want to enjoy the sensation of the soft yellow sand between our toes, have a refreshing swim in the sparkly blue water, take part in amusing beach activities, dive into summer’s nocturnal nightlife, and simply escape reality to relax a bit and live the heavenly dream.
But planning for a trip isn’t really a piece of cake. It takes time and a lot of research to find the perfect spot for your getaway, and that can sometimes be a buzzkill. So, here you will find your ultimate guide for the Sahel and its beaches, and where to go in the Sahel to make it easier for you to find your sweet haven and make your trip all about fun.
Read the article till its very end to learn all about the Sahel and its beaches.
Sahel Beaches: Marina Al Alamein
The first stop in Sahel is
Marina Al Alamein
, a gorgeous resort on the Mediterranean coast with crystal-clear beaches. It is approximately 94 kilometers west of Alexandria. It is known for the Porto Marina Hotel, a 5-star hotel, and the hotel was designed by Delmar Group.
Marina Al Alamein is also the first place in the Sahel to have its international yacht marina.
Marina El Alamein
Sahel Beaches: Hacienda Bay
The next stop is
Hacienda Bay
, one of the hottest destinations in North Coast. It’s just 17 kilometers away from Marina Al Alamein.
Hacienda Bay features a variety of luxury hotels, a stunning golf course, a Palm Club, dining venues, and a retail mall. It also offers a wide range of luxurious villas and chalets.
Hacienda Bay
Marassi Sahel Beaches
Moving on to
Marassi North Coast
, the resort that merges the essence of 6 different Sahel beaches in one place. Marassi is located 125 kilometers west of Alexandria.
It has various types of properties that suit every need, ranging from studios, apartments, penthouses, chalets, townhouses, twin houses, and villas. It also features a 5-star hotel, a clubhouse, a golf course, a yacht club, and many restaurants.
Marassi Sidi Abdel Rahman
The Waterway North Coast Beaches
Then, there is
The Waterway North Coast
, a quiet resort in Sahel with magnificent beaches, which allows you to relax away from the crowd. It is located 186 kilometers from Alexandria.
The Waterway includes a hotel, a retail promenade, clubhouses, and kids’ areas, along with a wide variety of unit types such as villas, twin houses, townhouses, and cabanas.
The Waterway North Coast
New Sahel Beaches Explored
Now, let’s talk about the new part of
Sahel El Shamaly, Egypt
. Sahel first began with Marina and its various resorts, which were the most popular attractions in North Coast. Afterwards, other developments and projects were established next to it to join the action.
But then, this part got crowded with the summer runaways. So, after the new Fouka Road was constructed, many people started to move a little further to a more tranquil part of North Coast with beaches that still maintain their glamorous beauty.
Let’s take a look at the best beaches in New Sahel.
Jefaira North Coast Beach
The first spot with pristine beaches in Sahel is
Jefaira Ras El Hekma
. Jefaira is a blissful getaway that overlooks the enigmatic Mediterranean shores. It is just 12 kilometers away from The Waterway.
It features many facilities like a clubhouse, a marina, a hotel, beach bars, shops, and restaurants. The resort also offers many properties for the luxury of its residents, ranging from chalets, condos, twin houses, and villas.
Jefaira North Coast
Swan Lake Sahel Resort
Next, there is
Swan Lake North Coast
, a tropical-themed resort that is only 1 kilometer away from Jefaira. Swan Lake has luxury cabanas overlooking the azure water, in addition to a wide range of spacious chalets and twin villas.
It offers facilities to fulfill its residents’ desires, including sports facilities, beach restaurants, and kiosks serving light snacks.
Swanlake North Coast
Fouka Bay Ras El Hekma
Moving to
Fouka Bay
, a new beach destination located on Ras El Hekma, one of the largest and most beautiful natural bays on the Mediterranean.
It is 12 kilometers away from Swan Lake. Fouka Bay provides the perfect lifestyle balance, offering everything from the perfectly designed chalets and villas to diverse entertaining activities.
Fouka Bay
New Sahel Beaches: Almaza Bay
And for the last stop on our tour, we have
Almaza Bay
. It is a luxurious, serene, and brilliantly planned resort in Sidi Heneish, located just 38 kilometers from Marsa Matrouh.
It has one of the most fascinating beaches in North Coast. Almaza Bay features 7-star hotels, villas, a marina, food and beverage outlets, a retail center, and a sports club.
Almaza Bay
This was a quick tour of Sahel and its pristine beaches that will hopefully make finding your perfect spot a much easier process.
Whether you are looking forward to having an exquisite day use in Sahel and rejuvenating your body and mind on one of its beaches, or purchasing your beach house, this list covers it all.
Best Spots for a Day Use in North Coast [2025 Guide]
These resorts host more than the best beaches in Sahel. They also exhibit luxurious amenities, fancy vacation houses, and a myriad of leisure activities, suitable for all age groups.
Finally
North Coast – Sahel is one of the best summer destinations in Egypt, with world-class beaches and luxurious resorts. Many of Egypt’s top real estate developers built state-of-the-art gated communities in its different areas.
Explore North Coast Top Resorts

Know the Best Place to Buy Property
===================================

--- CONTENT ---
Best Place to Buy Property
d Have you been trying lately to find a new home in one of the best places to live? Did you start looking for all the residential areas all over the town to find the best place to buy a property that offers the best residential projects?
Are you looking for areas with the best rental or residential property markets and which have a high demand for rental property? Do you want a place with residential and commercial facilities to start your life or your business?
Did you know that Egypt has many high-quality property markets in various areas that enable you not only to find a forever home but also to invest in the real estate market?
You got excited and want to know more about this aspect of the Egyptian real estate market, right? Then, let us give you this article as a detailed guide to the best places to live and the top residential projects, as well as the best place to buy a property to invest in.
Why are You Buying this Property?
We cannot start talking about the best place to buy property and the best residential projects without first asking for the reason behind purchasing this property; will it be for personal use, or will it be an investment property for investment use?
In other words, why are you buying this property? Are you buying it to be your new home and buy your property from the real estate market? Or are you buying it to invest in the real estate market and be among the real estate investors who get their profit from the interest rates and rental income?
Why does the reason for purchasing the property matter? Simply because if you are buying a property to be your home, then you need to focus the search on the best residential areas with the highest amenities for any residential project with a convenient location to is easily accessible.
Whereas, if you want to make the best use of the strong economy and the economic growth atmosphere in Egypt, as well as the population growth and its growing needs and want to invest, then you need to focus on what “the people” look for in their units and not your priorities for buying a property.
Now, let us start guiding you towards the best property, the best place to buy property, and the best residential projects. We will focus first on residential properties, and then discuss rental properties.
What is the best place to buy a property in Egypt?
Why the Place Matters?
Usually, the first question that comes to mind when discussing the purchase of a property is the location, and this raises the question of the best place to buy a property and the best residential projects.
Let us tell you, the place in which you choose your property matters for many reasons, among which are:
The accessibility to and from the major roads and important destinations
The neighbourhood in which you will be surrounded, and the other compounds in your area
Finally, the travel/commute time taken to and from your important destinations
Now, let us explore the major top and best places to buy property and the best residential projects. The most recent residential areas are mainly New Cairo, New Administrative Capital, 6th of October, Sheikh Zayed, Mostkbal City, New Heliopolis, and El Sherouk.
Let us talk about each of these areas in a little bit of detail in the following sections.
New Cairo City’s Best Residencies
New Cairo City is one of the top and most sought-after areas in Egypt.Thanks to its central location connecting the whole City, making it easily accessible from all over Cairo, the major educational and entertainment facilities it hosts, such as the American University in Cairo and Cairo Festival City, and its vast land area of 85,000 acres.
This area has major districts such as First Settlement, Third Settlement, and Fifth Settlement. As well as hosting top compounds of which you can find on Nawy’s website-such as:

Top Projects in New Administrative Capital
New Administrative Capital City is a relatively recent area created to attract investments and millions of visitors each year. The City covers over 170,000 acres of land and enjoys a central location on the Suez Road.
The City also offers many educational and leisure facilities, such as the University of Hertfordshire by GAF and the Egyptian Disneyland.
The major districts in the City include the residential Districts in New Capital R5, R7, and R8, the Government Administrative District, the Business District, and the Cultural District.

away of the crowded City
areas in Egypt, with a land area of 119.2 thousand acres in Giza Governorate. The City offers many educational and entertainment facilities such as Gezira Sporting Club, Mall of Arabia, and Misr University for Science and Technology (MUST).
This City enjoys a convenient location overlooking major roads such as Cairo – Alexandria Desert Road, Waslet Dahshur Road,26th of July Corridor, and El Wahat Road. Also, the City features 12 districts, amongst which you can find October Gardens and West Somid.

Best Places to Live in Mostakbal City
Mostakbal City is a futuristic, rapidly growing city covering over 11,000 acres of land. The City features major educational and leisure facilities such as the Sports Academy, the Global Paradigm International School, and the Arina Strip Mall.
Mostakbal City enjoys a premium location overlooking the Middle Ring Road and Suez Road, which have easy access to Cairo International Airport and New Administrative City.

The Best Place to Buy Property in El Sherouk
Shorouk City is one of the most environmentally friendly cities in Egypt, with a land area of  11,9000 acres. The City features major leisure and educational facilities such as Heliopolis Sporting Club, Kratos Gym Spa, and the French University.
The City enjoys a premium location overlooking Cairo-Suez Desert Road, Sadat Road, and Gamal Abdel Nasser Road, with proximity to the New Administrative Capital.
El Shorouk City features many districts, such as the Seventh District, the Eighth District, the Al Nakheel District, and the First District. The compounds available in the City and on Nawy’s website include:

Your Guide To The Best Gouna & Hurghada Resorts
===============================================

--- CONTENT ---
Hurghada Resorts
Hurghada, having spent the first hundred years of its life as a sleepy little fishing village on the Red Sea. It has evolved into a highly acclaimed beach and diving destination in the Middle East, attracting a large number of visitors for its undeniable appeal and charm. And since you’re here, you are probably looking for the best Hurghada resorts where you can combine spectacular diving with 365 days of sun and beach weather!
So, in this blog, we’ll provide you with a detailed guide to the best resorts in Hurghada and El Gouna.
Hurghada Resorts
Hurghada is a sought-after coastal destination that lies on the banks of the Red Sea. And when it comes to choosing the best time to visit Hurghada, it largely depends on your personal preferences.
Spring and fall are considered the peak seasons, as the weather is pleasantly warm without being excessively hot, making it perfect for enjoying the beach (
And let’s not forget the fantastic aqua park!
).
During this time, you can expect the city to be bustling with tourists.
Since Hurghada is a coastal destination, summer can also be a great time to visit, but let’s list some of the best Hurghada, Somabay, and Gouna resorts:
Dua Resort 3.3.
Aden Orascom Resort
Makadi Heights Resort
El Gouna South Marina
Soma Breeze
ARC Soma Bay
Reef Town
Mesca Resort
Bay Central Residence
Blanca Resort
Soma Coves
Bay West Resort
Wadi Jebal Resort
Bay Central Residence
Now, let’s take a stroll through Hurghada city’s most renowned resorts, each with its own unique charm and allure.
Explore Top Hurghada Projects
Makadi Heights Hurghada
Makadi Heights is an upscale resort developed by the real estate shining star, Orascom Developments. It covers an area of 3.4 million square meters.
The project is filled to the brim with premium facilities, including swimming pools, gyms, hotels, a clubhouse, dining options, and a mall.
Makadi Heights
Makadi Heights is only 15 minutes away from Hurghada Airport and 45 minutes away from Gouna. The project is where you can enjoy your vacation and invest in the Red Sea, as it has an array of properties for sale.
The properties for sale in Makadi vary between standalone villas, twin houses, duplexes, chalets, and penthouses. The prices of these units for sale in Hurghada start at 8,020,000 EGP.
Explore Makadi Heights Properties
Soma Breeze
Soma Breeze is another unique coastal destination in Hurghada, which was developed by the real estate giant, Soma Bay. It’s filled with exceptional facilities, including swimming pools, a clubhouse, restaurants, cafes, a sandy beach, an 18-hole golf course, a spa, and a marina.
Soma Breeze Master PlanIt’s located right between Reef Town and The Breakers Hotel. The properties for sale in Soma Breeze are some of the most lavish apartments with various layouts, sizes, and prices.
Check Out Soma Breeze Properties
Reef Town Resort
Moving along, Reeftown Resort is another exceptional beach resort in Hurghada by Soma Bay Development. It’s nestled between Wadi Jebal and Soma Breeze Resorts.
Reef Town Master Plan

Swimming pools

Next on our journey is El Gouna Resorts.
It is an exceptional town within the Hurghada Red Sea, where the city’s vibrant energy meets the tranquil beauty of the Red Sea.
Here, you’ll find an array of resorts catering to every taste and budget.
Let’s check out the following parts.
Gouna Resorts
Before diving into nitty-gritty information about the best resorts in Gouna, we’ll shed some light on the Gouna City itself.
El Gouna
It’s stretching across 10 km of pristine shoreline on the beautiful Red Sea and just 25 km from Hurghada. El Gouna, Egypt, has a plethora of world-class facilities and services, including a fully-equipped hospital, marinas, 18-hole championship golf courses, and educational facilities.
The best Gouna resorts include, but are not limited to:
Pearl El Gouna Resort

Swan Lake El Gouna
It’s a popular beach resort developed by the real estate shining star, Hassan Allam Holding. It’s located in El Gouna and overlooks the Red Sea shore, about 25 square kilometers north of Hurghada.
Swan Lake Gouna Master Plan
Swan Lake Gouna is packed with an array of facilities that will cater to families’ needs. The facilities include, but are not limited to:
Swimming pools
Sandy beach
Clubhouse

Crystal lakes

The properties for sale in the Swanlake Al Gouna are divided into apartments, chalets, penthouses, and duplexes with a variety of spaces and prices.
Check out Swan Lake El Gouna Properties
Kamran El Gouna
Kamran by Orascom Developments is located in the heart of
El Gouna
, exactly ‌25 km north of Hurghada on the Red Sea. The resort offers a yoga area, a kids’ area,  swimming pools, a picnic area, and dining options.
The properties for sale in Kamran are divided into chalets and townhouses. Each unit has its own features, layouts, size, and delivery dates.
Check out Kamran Gouna Properties
Are you planning your next vacation?
Will it be in the captivating city of Hurghada itself, or perhaps you’re considering one of the exquisite resorts in El Gouna? Whichever option you select, rest assured that the Red Sea in Egypt will not disappoint.
However, we understand that you might have several questions swirling in your mind. Fear not, for Nawy is here to provide answers to some
frequently asked questions about Hurghada.
1. Where To Go & What To Do In Hurghada?
When it comes to exploring the world of Hurghada resorts, the most frequently asked questions are undoubtedly, “What can one do in Hurghada?” and “Where to go in Hurghada?”
Is it simply a destination for leisurely beach days? Absolutely not!
Hurghada and Gouna are where boredom ceases to exist, and every moment is filled with excitement and adventure.
Things to do in Hurghada
Here are the best 20
things to do in Hurghada
:
Dolphin watching.
Boat tour.
Snorkeling.
Buggy Safari.
BBQ dinner.
Mountains ATV quad bike tour.
Star-watching dessert advantage.
Visit the Hurghada islands.
Camel ride.
Make a splash at Makadi Bay Aqua Park
Visit the Hurghada Grand Aquarium.
Visit the Hurghada old town.
Go down to the depths of the Red Sea on a Submarine trip.
Create lasting memories on a horse riding adventure.
Stroll into the Hurghada marina and enjoy the nightlife.
Practice kite surfing at El Gouna.
Visit the Hurghada Museum.
Play in Hurghada’s best golf courses.
Enjoy a star-studded Bedouin dinner
Get a bird’s eye view of Hurghada on a parasailing adventure.
2. How Far Is It From Hurghada To Cairo?
As you make preparations for your upcoming journey to Hurghada resorts, a question that surely arises in your mind is, “How far is it between Hurghada and Cairo?” Allow us to provide you with a comprehensive answer, detailing the distances you can expect when traveling by car, bus, or even flying.
How far is it from Hurghada to Cairo?
How far is it between Hurghada and Cairo by car? It’s 4 hours and 38 minutes (465.1 KM)
How far is it between Hurghada and Cairo by bus? It’s 5 hours and 15 minutes.
How far is it between Hurghada and Cairo by flight? It’s 3 hours and 36 minutes.
Final Thoughts
Whether you’re seeking a serene beachside escape, a thrilling aquatic adventure, or a lively city experience, Gouna and Hurghada and its enchanting resorts are ready to fulfill your every desire.

Stei8ht New Cairo

The project’s location
Your investment goals
The returns of your investment
Capital requirement and cash flow
Rental yield

Possible risks

Why Real Estate is a Bad Investment Unless Done Right

What are the Advantages of Residential Real Estate Investment?
Real Estate Projects
Investing in a residential real estate project is both beneficial and may carry some risks.
If you considered the elements we mentioned above regarding putting your money into the real estate market and are ready to invest in a residential property, you have to know:
Your unit will be a gateway to earn some passive income if you decide to rent it.
Your residential property will gain appreciation over time, as the real estate field is a rewarding long-term investment.
You can have power over a larger asset base through mortgages, with a small down payment somehow.
It will be your inflation hedge because as living costs increase, the value of your property will be boosted as well.
Adding a residential real estate property to your investment portfolio will diversify it.
It goes beyond financial gain, as you will be paying for a unique quality of living.
The advantages outweigh the disadvantages when you invest in a residential real estate property, but you also need to consider its drawbacks.

Best Compounds in Egypt: Cairo, Sahel, Gouna, & More
Drawbacks of Residential Real Estate Investment
When you are about to put your money into a residential real estate property, you have to put in your mind the possible risks as well, which include:
The interest rates may rise.
The unit may be unhabitable for some time.
The capital requirement needed to start investing in real estate is high.
The unit is generally an illiquid investment.
You may have ongoing expenses.
It may take time before you’re able to resell your property.

============================================================
What Are New Cities in Egypt – Perks of Living in New Cities
============================================================

--- CONTENT ---
The New Capital City
The real estate market is fast growing in Egypt, and it is accompanied by various new cities, offering a one-of-a-kind lifestyle with unparalleled amenities. They are a part of Egypt Vision 2030, where sustainable living redefines our notion of an elite lifestyle.
These new cities bring not only new housing options in Egypt but also a variety of employment opportunities. They also offer a greener solution away from the hassle of the city, amid the comfort, convenience, and luxury an urban living experience brings.
In this article, we will tell you about the new cities in Egypt so far, and some of the most distinguishing projects in the East and West of Cairo, as well as the North Coast.
New Cities in Egypt
Dedicating 530,000 acres of land for building new cities in Egypt was just a start. These areas are built to accommodate 30 million citizens and generate 7 million employment opportunities.
These fourth-generation cities compose 50% of the total area of urban communities, constructed over the last 40 years. Egypt aims to build 39 new cities in various prime locations all over the country for its 2030 vision.
This is not only fixed on offering sustainable lifestyles but also the newest architecture that is developed through green infrastructure. Moreover, all the new cities in Egypt are connected through multi-modal transport networks.
Since 2014, Egypt has built various new cities to increase urban development contributions to GDP, and they include:
The New Administrative Capital
New Aswan
New Farafra
New Mansoura
New Zayed
New Galala
New Ismalia
New Obour
New Alamein
The land of the Great Pyramids is now also a transformed historic country with a hyper-connected network of sustainable-energy communities, providing state-of-the-art living environments. The advantages of these new cities are reflected in the economy as well as the quality of living you will be granted; no wonder Egypt showed a positive GDP growth rate in 2020.
What are the Advantages of Building New Cities in Egypt?
There are 4 different dimensions of building new cities in Egypt, each exhibits its various advantages.
Economic Dimension
: The strategy is already benefiting the Egyptian economy as more than 15% of the country’s economy is directly proportional to construction. It creates new job opportunities and enhances one’s quality of life.
Social Dimension
: New cities don’t only decrease the pressure on greater cities but also provide a positive modern infrastructure with luxurious housing and unmatched amenities.
Political Dimension
: The economic dimension of building new cities in Egypt is also reflected in a positive political outcome that serves the community.
Urban Dimension
: The city’s lifestyle has always been known to be luxurious, yet, the congestion, traffic jams, and pollution have made it unbearable. The new cities offer their residents a chance to live the utmost perks of urban living away from the hassle itself.
After getting to know the pros of building these various new cities in Egypt, let’s take a deeper look at some of them.
New Cities in Egypt
New Capital City
One of the best places to live is the New Capital City, one of the most elite new cities in Egypt. It covers 170,000 acres of land, exhibiting various distinguishing projects by many real estate tycoons, such as:
IL Bosco New Capital
by Misr Italia Properties

Talaat Mostafa Group Holding

Disneyland
Al-Fattah Al-Aleem Mosque

British Coventry University
New Administrative Capital Stadium
These facilities are scattered along various districts in the New Capital, for instance:
The Residential Districts (R5, R7, and R8)
Government Administrative District
Business District
Cultural District
Living in the New Capital grants you the distinctive perks of living in the new cities of Egypt, including:
A sustainable lifestyle: as there are numerous green spaces, parks, and recreational areas nearby.
Having all that you need near the comfort of your contemporary home. You will be close to a variety of commercial and entertainment complexes, schools, universities, and health facilities.
New Alamein
The New Alamein is one of the fanciest coastal new cities in Egypt that sprawls across 48,000 acres of land. It is famous for its participation in World War II, and it exhibits various historic as well as luxurious facilities such as:
Al Alamein War Cemetry
Al Alamein War Museum
Deutsche Kriegsgraeberstätte

were developed in New Alamein, for instance:

Latest technology
A sustainable infrastructure
Sewage and electricity networks
Water station
New Mansoura
New Mansoura is one of the most distinguishing cities that is associated with the New Urban Communities Authority in Egypt. It overlooks the bewitching Meditaranean Sea for a 15 km length.
New Mansoura covers 5913 acres of land, and it will be implemented in 4 stages. It is ideally located between Dakahlia, Kafr El Sheikh, and Damietta. There are various real estate projects built in New Mansoura, including:
La Vida White New Mansoura
Boyot Residence
Lavida Mall
New Mansoura Medical Center
Zahya Compound
New Galala
One of the giant projects initiated by President Abdel Fattah El-Sisi is Al Galala Mountain Project. It is supervised by the Armed Forces Engineering Authority and includes 53 national civil companies.
New Galala is placed on the highest mount plateau in the Red Sea. It is one of the fanciest new cities in Egypt and is situated between Ain Sokhna and Zafarana. It comprises 17,000 acres of land and features a broad array of residential as well as commercial projects.
Additionally, New Galala exhibits a variety of elite features and fancy resorts, such as:
Galala University
Eastern El Galala Aqua Park

As can be seen, New Galala merges all elements offered by the building of new cities in Egypt. It grants its residents high-end residential areas, world-class hospitality services, as well as medical and educational institutes.
Moreover, Galala City is well-known for its state-of-the-art resorts, including:
Blue Blue

Ideally located in the West of Cairo covering 21,000 acres of land, New Zayed is one of the most prestigious new cities in Egypt. It is close to many popular destinations in El Sheikh Zayed and 6th of October City, such as:

Perks of Living in New Cities in Egypt
As said, living in Egypt’s new cities isn’t just about a change in location,  it’s about embracing a modern lifestyle built around comfort, convenience, and growth.
These cities were carefully planned to solve the challenges of older urban areas while offering a higher quality of life and stronger investment potential.
Here are some of the main perks of living in Egypt’s new cities:
Modern infrastructure and smart planning
: Every new city is designed with advanced infrastructure, from wide roads and efficient drainage systems to sustainable energy networks and vast green spaces.
Reduced congestion and pollution
: With strategic layouts and lower population density, residents enjoy cleaner air, smoother traffic, and more peaceful surroundings.
Access to new amenities
: These cities feature state-of-the-art schools, universities, hospitals, shopping centers, and entertainment hubs,  all built to serve a growing community.
Strong real estate investment potential
: As new developments continue to expand, early buyers benefit from high appreciation rates and stable long-term returns.
Enhanced lifestyle and community design
: Planned neighborhoods, pedestrian-friendly streets, parks, and recreational areas create a balanced, family-oriented atmosphere that supports a healthier way of living.
Finally
The purpose of developing these smart new cities in Egypt is to offer you a luxurious quality of life, vast job opportunities, and a sustainable environment where you can experience the best details an urban lifestyle offers you as well as boosting the economic status of Egypt.

Know the Top things to do in Hurghada
=====================================

--- CONTENT ---
Things to do in Hurghada
Going on an enjoyable vacation can sometimes be a hectic process. Choosing a place, getting to know the activities and the fun things to do available in it, and booking your spot are all time-consuming processes.  This is exactly where this comprehensive guide on the top things to do in Hurghada and Hurghada activities comes in.
In this guide, we chose Hurghada as one of the perfect summer destinations in which you can enjoy a vacation with many fun activities to do.
So, let us get started, and we are sure that by the end of this article, you will have decided on your vacation destination in Hurghada.
About Hurghada City
We cannot proceed to talk about our topic of things to do in Hurghada and Hurghada activities without first giving you an overview of the city itself and its history.
Hurghada city is the capital of the Red Sea governorate, which is found on the western coast of the beautiful Red Sea. The city is considered one of the most beautiful and top tourist cities in Egypt.
Hurghada is 500 kilometers to the south-east of Cairo and is bordered by major areas that are El Gouna, Sahl Hashish, Makadi Bay, and Soma Bay. These areas are top tourism and vacation destinations with many amenities and fun activities on the Red Sea.
Hurghada City Egypt
Top Areas to Visit in Hurghada City
The city is divided into 3 main well-known districts: El Dahar, Sekala, and Al Ahyaaa. El Dahar district is the oldest part of the city and is well known for its exquisite shopping experience and craftsmanship.
Sekala is a tourist district that boasts many hotels, stores, shopping centers, cinemas, clubs, and restaurants. Finally, Al Ahyaaa district is found in the northern area of Hurghada with many residential spots and several hotels.
Hurghada city is well known for its touristic attractions and fun activities, and aquatic sports such as windsurfing, sailing, deep-sea fishing, swimming, snorkeling, and diving.
Now that you know all about Hurghada, we can proceed to talk about our topic on
things to do in Hurghada and Hurghada activities in the following sections.
Hurghada Egypt Activties
We can now start tackling our topic on the things to do in Hurghada and its activities. You need to know that Hurghada City has many attractions, either as places to visit, places to stay, or activities to do. All of which have things to do in Hurghada and Hurghada activities.
As for the places to visit, they are the top areas that attract either foreigners or Egyptians on their vacations. The places to stay are mainly the top resorts found in Hurghada city. Finally, the activities to do are the things that make Hurghada City a unique one.
All of which will be tackled in detail in each of the following sections.
Hurghada
Top Areas to Visit in Hurghada City
When it comes to things to do in Hurghada and Hurghada activities, the first thing that comes to one’s mind is the places and areas that you can enjoy visiting.
These places include the islands. Hurghada is well known for being designed around clusters of islands. These islands include the well-known ones, each of which has a special attraction or a unique feature, such as:
Giftun Islands
Mahmya Island
Autour des Dunes
Omo Gamaar
Eden Island Hurghada
Utopia Island
Orange Bay Island
Nemo bay
Magawish Island
Hurghada Islands
More Places To Visit in Hurghada
In addition to the islands, you can find many sightseeing and famous places, such as many aquaparks, a wide range of museums, and beautiful beaches.
As for the aquaparks, the most famous ones of are Jungle Aqua Park, Makadi Water World, El Gouna Cable Park Sliders, PrimaSol Titanic Aquariam, and 5 Springs Aquapark.
For arts and culture lovers, you will find many museums in Hurghada, including Sand City the only open-air and sand sculptures museum in Africa and the Middle East.
You will also find the Hurghada Museum Historical Museum displaying over 2000 artifacts from ancient to modern Egypt. These artifacts are complete with informative bilingual descriptions and a shopping arcade for unique local finds.
Also, there is the Selkhet Papyrus Hurghada Speciality Museum, where you will see how papyrus is made. You will also find Hurghada Grand Aquarium, Shaab Abu Ramada/The Aquarium, Mini Egypt Park, Speciality Museums, and Bibliotheca Alexandrina El Gouna.
You can find magnificent beaches such as Zeytuna Beach, the Abu Tig Marina, the Carless Reef, the Zouni Beach Club, the Eastern (Arabian) Desert, the Coptic Cathedral of Saint Shenouda, El Gouna Golf Club, Madinat Makadi Golf, and Mosque El Mina Masjid.
We are now done with all the special places, sightseeing sites, and museums in Hurghada city, and we can proceed to the things to do in Hurghada and Hurghada activities.

Explore Top Properties in Hurghada
Things to do in Hurghada
When it comes to the fun things to do in Hurghada and Hurghada activities, the city is filled to the brim with such activities.
First and foremost, the most prominent activities for which the city is very well-known are snorkeling, scuba diving, and submarine diving. Thanks to the beautiful Red Sea water and its well-known magnificent coral reefs, these activities are on the verge in Hurghada City, either for the tourists or for the Egyptian vacationers.
Then come the glass boat tours, the dolphin-watching tours, the yacht tours, and the whole-day cruises. All of these are water-related activities, and they include other activities such as parasailing, kitesurfing, windsurfing, and paddling.

Another thing you can do and enjoy in Hurghada is the culinary experience. From fine dining restaurants to grab-and-go snackables, you will be amazed at the types and numbers of restaurants and cafes in Hurghada.
You can go shopping in the old town and explore exquisite crafts and buy awesome souvenirs for your loved ones. Finally, you can go on a one-day tour in Luxor with one of the tourism companies, thanks to Luxor’s proximity to Hurghada.

Hurghada Activities
Hurghada Transportation
The issue of transportation is two-dimensional: how will you go, and how will you move there?
First of all, you can go in your car but if you don’t like to drive such a long distance, you can simply rely on one of the bus transportation companies, such as Go Bus.
As for how you will move and be transported there. You can simply use the taxi services or the shuttle services. Also, if you are a part of a tourist group, they will make sure to provide your transportation bus all over the city.

===================================================
9+ Must-Visit New Cairo Restaurants For Every Taste
===================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Restaurants in New Cairo
Let’s start with the fact that the gathering is never truly complete without food! For the entire family, the eating aspect of a picnic is a crucial highlight. Consequently, the quest for the finest dining options becomes an integral part of the outing, as everyone seeks to indulge in exceptional flavors and memorable dishes. Here, the question comes: ” What are the best New Cairo restaurants?”.
That’s what we’ll be mentioning in the following lines. Are you prepared to select the ideal dining destination for your next family outing?
New Cairo Restaurants

============================================
15+ Things to Do in Aswan & Top Places to Go
============================================

--- CONTENT ---
Aswan, Egypt
Aswan is one of the top winter destinations in Egypt, with various things and activities to do to have a fun escapade.
Aswan is filled to the brim with many fun activities, sightseeing sites, and shopping venues, offering its visitors a perfectly enjoyable vacation experience. This blog will tell you about the top things to do in Aswan, giving you an overview of the entire city.
We will tell you about the boundless activities you can do, the places you can visit, and how to make the best out of your enjoyable stay in Aswan.
Read the article till its very end and you will be amazed at the beauty of Aswan City.
Aswan Historical Places
Shopping Destinations
Transportation to & in Aswan
FAQs about Aswan
About Aswan
Since we cannot talk about the top things to do in Aswan without giving you an overview of the city itself, let us start our article with a quick account of the beautiful details that make up the city.
In the south of Egypt stands the enchanted city of Aswan, once known as Swenett. The term “Soun” in ancient Egyptian is the root of the word “Aswan,” meaning “souk” or “market.” Aswan’s strategic location as a gateway to the South gave rise to its moniker.
Aswan served as the primary source of granite for obelisks and other antique sculptures. It is renowned for its serene atmosphere, important archaeological monuments, and stunning scenery of the Nile Valley. Because of its year-round pleasant weather, it is an ideal winter getaway.
The city offers breathtaking vistas and reasons to take a felucca (an Egyptian sailboat) out on the Nile. From Lake Nasser, the river meanders softly through a number of islands encircled by verdant surroundings and black granite.
You may discover Aswan’s rich history and culture by sailing to historical locations like the Agha Khan Mausoleum, Philea, the Elephantine Island, the Aswan Museum, the Monastery of St. Simeon, and the Botanical Island.
The Temple of Abu Simbel, the Temple of Kom Ombo, the Nubian Museum, and the Aswan High Dam are a few other breathtaking historical sites.
Aswan provides a distinctive cultural experience with the Nubian Village, or “Gharb Seheyl,” in addition to its historical landmarks.
Popular Landmarks
Exploring the vibrant village, you can find the final traces of the Nubian civilization that coexisted with the Ancient Egyptians. Nubia is a fantastic location to purchase souvenirs, spices, and locally made crafts, in addition to the Aswan Souk.
Also, Aswan is a tourist attraction destination with many tourists taking their vacations in Egypt and visiting Aswan alongside Luxor for their warm winter weather and their historical and cultural value.
Top Things to Do in Aswan
Now that you know all about Aswan, the city of beauty, let us tell you all the things you should do there.
First of all, you need to know that Aswan is the perfect place for sightseeing, thanks to the many historical places and temples it has.
Also, it is your awesome gateway for shopping and souvenirs. Finally, there are many activities that you can do there.
As for sightseeing, Aswan is home to many important historical places and temples to visit.
Visit Aswan Historical Places
One of the things that should be at the top of your list to do in Aswan is visiting these places:
Aswan High Dam
Abu Simbel Temple
Philae Temple
Kom Ombo Temple
Kalabsha Temple
Nubian Eco Village
Nubian Museum
Monastery of Saint Simeon
Unfinished Obelisk
Elephantine Island
Botanical Garden
Edfu Temple
Aga Khan Mausoleum
Tombs of the Nobles
Aswan Market
Famous dams
Kitchener Island
Lake Nasser
Things to Do in Aswan – Visit Philae Temple
Things to Do in Aswan – Go Shopping
When it comes to shopping, Aswan Market, Sharea El Souk, and Marina El Souk would be your perfect spot. These are the places where you can get souvenirs and gifts, and the memorable products of Aswan, such as vintage jewelry, colorful homeware, Nubian products, fresh food spices, and handcrafted ornaments and gifts.
Finally, as for the activities that can be done in Aswan, you can take a cruise that can be 1 day or up to 3-4 days from Aswan to Luxor. Also, you can enjoy a hot air balloon ride in the skies of the city of beauty. You can also go to Safari.
Things to Do in Aswan
Now that you know Aswan and you know all the activities that can be done there, let us answer your question on how you will transport among these activities in the next section.
How to Travel to Aswan?
Now, you know a lot about Aswan and the top things to do in Aswan. Probably you are thinking about the transportation issue; how you will get there, and how to move through the city itself.
First of all, as for traveling to Aswan, you have four main transportation routes:
Flights
Trains
Cruises
Cars
As for the flights, Aswan to Cairo takes about one hour and twenty minutes. You have two options: either book an expensive taxi or ask your Aswan lodging to send a car to pick you up from the airport. Getting to Aswan via air is significantly faster than by land.
Regarding trains, you need to be extremely patient. You can travel to Aswan by train from Cairo. The trip takes approximately 12 hours. However, sleeping cabins are available for an additional fee.
The cruises are the most fun. You can take a cruise from Cairo to Aswan, or you can travel to Luxor and take a cruise from there also to Aswan. But you need to know that this trip will be days long.
Finally, going to Aswan by car might be easier if you are taking this trip from Luxor, as it will be a 4-hour drive. However, it will take you 14 hours or more to take off from Cairo.
Moving Inside Aswan
When it comes to moving inside Aswan and getting around, you have many options, among which:
Letting the hotel where you are staying arrange it for you
Taking a boat
Making a deal with one of the drivers there
Taxis
The first option implies what most of the hotels in Aswan do, which is offering transportation for their guests upon the guest’s request and for a fee. The hotel makes a deal with a number of cabs to use in these cases.
While the second alternative is the same as the first, with the difference that you are the one who makes the deal with the drivers, not your hotel. Also, since most of the sights in Aswan are on the Nile, at times, you will not find any alternative for moving around except the boats.
Finally, if you can’t arrange any of the previously mentioned options, no worries, you can simply rely on the taxis that are available all over the city.
By now, you know all about Aswan, all the top things to do in Aswan, and the transportation options, and it is time to get your final questions answered to finalize your trip.
Your Questions About Aswan Answered – Traveling Aspect
We know that despite the fact that this article gave you all the details you would need to know about Aswan and the top things to do in Aswan, you might still need to get some questions answered, and this is where this section of our article comes in to give you all the answers.
Concerning the question of how far Aswan is from Hurghada, it is 6 hours and 56 minutes (546.2 km). It’s worth noting that Hurghada is also one of the best year-round vacation destinations in Egypt.
Top Things to Do in Hurghada
Also, the question of how long the flight from Cairo to Aswan is: a mere 80 minutes. When it comes to how far Aswan is from Cairo, the answer is 10 hours and 25 minutes (894.9 km). You can get to Aswan by train, flight, cruise, or car.
The Insider Edition
First of all, many people ask themselves what to do in Aswan. As mentioned in the previous sections of this article, you can go sightseeing, go shopping, and do other activities, such as a safari, and take a hot air balloon.
When it comes to what to see in Aswan, you have a lot of temples and museums to see, such as Kom Ombo Temple, Edfu Temple of Horus, Kalabsha Temple, Beit el-Wali, Temple of Dakka, Nubian Museum, and Animalia Museum.
What is Aswan known for?
Aswan is very well-known for many landmarks; however, the most well-known of them are the Aswan High Dam, Abu Simbel Temple, and the Philae Temple. These famous landmarks make it one of the top destinations on any traveler’s list.
Finally, are you wondering where to stay in Aswan?
Concerning the stay in Aswan, you have two options: either stay on the cruise you’re taking if you came to Aswan by a cruise from Cairo or Luxor.
Or, you can simply stay in one of the high-end resorts and hotels in Aswan, including:
Sofitel Legend Old Cataract Aswan
Movenpick Resort Aswan
Sonesta Nouba Hotel Aswan
Nubian Farm Hotel & Restaurant
Philae Hotel
Zen Wellness Resort Aswan
Aswan Cruise
With this full guide, Aswan should go at the top of your list for where to head in winter. If you are thinking of Cairo, we’ve got you covered as well.
Sheikh Zayed and 6th of October City host many popular recreational attractions you have to pay a visit to.
Learn more in:
10+ Things To Do in West of Cairo (6 October + Sheikh Zayed)
Final Thought
The magical city of Aswan bewitches all travelers and locals, captivating them with historical landmarks, boundless leisure activities, and unmatched hospitality.
With all these transportation routes, luxurious hotels, and sightseeing spots, be ready to experience Aswan’s enchanting vibes with convenience and beauty sprinkled on top.

Kingsway 6 October

In this article, we will tell you about the Kingsway October prices and whereabouts.
Kingsway Prices
Mountain View brought a royal-like residential destination to West Cairo, Kingsway October Compound. It developed the project over a massive area of 715 acres, boasting many luxurious units that cater to different preferences and needs.
Kingsway by Mountain View features apartments, duplexes, mansions, twin houses, townhouses, and villas. There are units for sale in the compound with a 5% down payment and an 8-year installment plan.
The Kingsway Compound prices start from 11.1M EGP for primary units and 9.6M EGP for resale properties.
Kingsway compound offers a wide collection of properties with varying prices. Properties offered in Kingsway include standalone villas and townhouses, and their respective prices are as follows:

Mountain View
, with prices ranging between 11.1M EGP and 19.6M EGP.

resale
in Kingsway, and their prices start from 9.6M EGP to 24.7M EGP. Moreover, there are townhouses for resale with prices ranging from 16.2M EGP to 17.2M EGP.

There are also apartments and duplexes for

All You Need to Know About R7 New Capital
=========================================

--- CONTENT ---
R7 New Capital
Everybody has heard of or even visited the New Administrative Capital now. But did you know that the New Capital includes many districts with different uses? Did you hear about the residential districts inside the city? Did you know that the R7 district in the New Capital City is one of the highly sought-after residential districts?
So, let us tell you all about the New Administrative City, its districts, and especially its top-notch residential district R7.
Read this article till the very end to know all the related details.
Residential Zones in New Capital City
The New Administrative City was created to be a reputable outlook for Egypt with super-integrated facilities and top-notch services.
The New Administrative Capital was created to offer a new smart, green, and interconnected clean city. It aligns with the Sustainable Development Goals put forth by the UN.
The city is part of Egypt’s Vision 2030 for a green, sustainable Egypt.
The city was planned to include many districts, and the most well-known ones are:
Residential districts
Government administrative district
Cultural district
Business district
Each district has a goal and is equipped with the best facilities and services to achieve this goal.
Check Out A Complete Guide To Egypt New Capital (+Its Projects)
R7 New Capital
Now, since our main topic is the R7 in New Capital City, and since R7 is in the residential district of the New Capital. We will need to focus on the residential district since it is the core of our topic today, which includes many zones inside it, including R5, R6, R7, and R8.
So, why are we primarily focusing on the residential district R7 rather than the other residential districts, despite them enjoying the same privileges? This district gets its importance from many sources.
First, it is found in a central location that is close to the other residential districts, as well as being within walking distance of the other cultural, administrative, and business zones in the city.
Also, it includes important universities that we will mention later. It is also worth mentioning that this district is close to the outer layer of the city by being close to major highways and roads.
R7 Location Inside New Capital
R7 New Capital, the seventh residential district, is distinguished by its prime location in the Administrative Capital, close to numerous important landmarks and significant projects.
The government district, which houses government headquarters and ministries, is near the seventh residential district. Additionally, it is adjacent to the Investor’s District, one of the capital’s most significant business areas.
The Green River, which serves as the capital’s core green axis and is regarded by locals as a significant natural landmark and environmental outlet, is another feature that sets R7 apart.
The southern bin Zayed axis, one of the capital’s most crucial major thoroughfares, makes it easier to go to different areas of the city.
The neighborhood is exceptional for both residential and commercial investment. Due to its close proximity to the Diplomatic Quarter and the Presidential Palace.
Now, you need to know the exact borders of R7 inside New Capital.
R7 New Capital Map
R7 Borders
From the north: The capital’s major landmarks, the southern Bin Zayed Axis and the Green River, are situated. While from the south, the capital’s second phase, which encompasses the sizable entertainment district, is situated.
From the east: The Diplomatic Quarter, a posh district distinguished by the presence of embassies and diplomatic buildings. From the west: Two of the most notable developments close to the area are the Exhibition Grounds and the Central Corridor.

El Galala City: A Delightful Escapade on the Red Sea Shores
===========================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Galala City
The Red Sea has always been a distinguished vacation destination. It is the home of a variety of beach communities that were built with an eye to exquisite escapades. However, the development of new cities in Egypt will make it go beyond a flawless coastal spot. El Galala City in Ain Sokhna is filled with wonders that will take your spirits up.
It not only exhibits a variety of elite resorts and recreational activities, but also a broad range of essential facilities. It is a year-round destination, and not only because of its weather. This article will give you all the details about the splendid details of El Galala City.
Galala City
Sprawling across 17,000 acres of land in Ain Sokhna, El Galala is the spectacle of the Red Sea Coast. Building new cities in Egypt revolved around constructing self-contained destinations that blended sustainability factors with marvelous architecture and vital facilities.
The name was inspired by Gabal El Galala, which is close to the city. With such a muse, you can guess that this is a natural Eden at its finest, combining blue, green, and gray shades. But hold your bewilderment, because the area transcends being a tranquil destination!
Jabal Al Jalalah is actually a distinctive Egyptian historical site. It is where Moses escaped Pharaoh and his army, crossing the Red Sea. This adds to the wonders of El Galala City, of course.
Ain Sokhna
has been an enchanting vacation destination for families since…forever, and now, it will be a faultless residential choice. El Galala City in Egypt boasts a wide range of amenities, including:
Educational facilities
Health facilities
Boundless leisure spots
The New Industrial Zone
Luxurious resorts

El Galala University is one of the top educational facilities in Egypt, built with one belief in mind: No Boundaries, Only Opportunities. It features 45 programs across 17 diverse study fields. Theoretical and practical applications merge to offer the residents of El Galala City a one-of-a-kind knowledge journey.

The New Industrial Zone
The New Industrial Zone in El Galala City is on Ain Sokhna – Zaafarana Road. It is planned and designed by the National Service Projects Organization. Its location on Northwest Golf El Suez is a strategic one for a variety of businesses.
Such a development will boost the number of job opportunities and play an important role in expanding the country’s economy, which is one of the main reasons behind building
new cities in Egypt

Fun Places to go in Cairo: Your Full Guide
==========================================

--- CONTENT ---
Fun Things to do in Cairo
Cairo is known for being a city of beauty and magic. It has a serene feel of heritage and history, so people feel attached to it. What is most important about the city is the fun places to go and the fun things you can do in Cairo.
In this article, we will tackle all the details about Cairo, all about the fun places to go to in Cairo, and the fun things to do in the city of beauty and magic.
Since many people do not realize the beauty of the city and keep asking about things to do in Cairo, let us answer this question thoroughly in the article.
Get ready to be amazed at the beauty of this mesmerizing city.
Fun Places to Go in Cairo
In fact,
Cairo
is a very rich city with many popular destinations to which you can go, have fun, and enjoy your time.
For example, you can take a tour of Khan El Khalili with its beautiful narrow streets. These are crammed with boutique stores for souvenirs and historic gifts.
Also, you can pay a visit to the Great Pyramids of Giza. Where you can enter the pyramids, ride a camel or a horse, and take a tour around this awesome historical venue.
Who does not know the Cairo Tower and its fantastic day and night views? You can just enjoy the view or get a delicious meal in a top-notch restaurant overlooking the glamorous view of the whole city.
In addition to that, you can enjoy a concert or a cultural meet-up at Al Sawy Cultural Wheel.
If you want to enjoy your time among historical pieces and excavations. The
Grand Egyptian Museum
is a very fun and amazing option.
You can visit the Museum of Illusions in El Sheikh Zayed, enjoy your time amidst illusions, and take many fun selfies.
It is also a good idea to visit the religious historical places such as the old churches or perfectly architectured mosques, or even the region’s complex at Old Cairo.
Khan El Khalili
We are done talking about some of the fun places to go in Cairo. Let us talk now about what you can do and the top things to do in Cairo.
Check out this guide on day-use places in Cairo
Top Things to Do in Cairo
Cairo not only offers fun places to go to. But it also boasts a wide range of destinations and gateways to which you can go and do many activities.
First and foremost, let us talk about shopping because who does not love shopping? Cairo has many top-notch malls to which you can go and enjoy shopping.
For instance, you can visit
Cairo Festival City
Mall in New Cairo and get all your needs from this wide mall.
Don’t forget to take a look at
Top Things to Do in the 5th Settlement
.
Also, you will find many fun activities to do in the West of Cairo (El Sheikh Zayed and 6th of October cities). There you will find many shopping venues, entertainment places, and high-end restaurants.
This article on
Top Things to Do in West Cairo
will give you deeper insights into the topic.
You can also go for physical activities such as skiing in Ski Egypt, jumping in Gravity Code or going kayaking in the Nile.
Museum of Illusions
Now that we tackled the top fun things to do in Cairo as well as the best places to go to in Cairo, lastly, and before ending our article, we want to give you a glimpse at the nightlife events in Cairo.
Fun things to do in Cairo
Nightlife in Cairo
Cairo is known to be the “city that does not sleep” thanks to its bustling character and the myriad of activities and venues in which one can enjoy many nightlife activities.
Nightlife in Cairo includes:
night Nile cruises
having dinner in one of the high-end restaurants
enjoying a midnight cinema movie
late-night family outing after everyone is back from their work

===================================================
The Boundless Wonders of Tunis Village Fayoum Oasis
===================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Tunis Village Fayoum
A rush of endorphins takes somebody’s spirits up to the seventh heaven, and what is a better source for this happy chemical than immersing one’s soul in art and adventure combined? If you are looking forward to unleashing the artist and daredevil sides of yourself, then it’s time to hit the road and enjoy the fathomless wonders of Tunis Village in Fayoum Oasis!
This blog will take you on a blissful vocable and visual tour of the vast activities splattered all over Tunis Village in Fayoum. So unloose the right hemisphere of your brain.
Tunis Village in Fayoum Oasis
Tunis Village in Fayoum Oasis
Fayoum Oasis has always been known as a farming and fishing destination. It overlooks the bewitching Lake Qaroun and is no longer only a tranquil spot with a myriad of lakes and greenery.
It has turned into a beautiful trip for friends in the last few years, as Tunis Village sprinkled its allure all over it. And its backstory will leave you in awe and admiration.
Two Egyptian Poets who wanted to encourage others to lead an artistic life founded Tunis Village Fayoum in the 1960s. In the 1980s, Evelyne Porret, a Swiss pottery lover, visited Egypt with her friends and discovered its fascinating vibes. She then decided to take her trip to a whole new level.
Evelyne opened her country house and pottery workshop in Tunis Village and turned Fayoum Oasis into an artist’s favorite haven by including a broad range of activities in this dazzling place.
There are many
unusual things to do in Egypt
, and when you drizzle them in art and adventure, with the charming effect of serenity, you will step into a new magical horizon. We will tell you right away about the diverse activities of Tunis Village.
Activities of Tunis Village in Fayoum
From pottery to thrill, rejuvenation, and reviving splatters of water, Tunis Village will charm your soul. It is one of the most popular pottery factories around the globe, with dozens of recreational activities to do as well.
The village is the home of many ingenious artists and writers. And if you are an aesthetician, you would love to wander through every corner of it.
Fayoum Oasis features a variety of small art galleries and exquisite pottery workshops, in which you can enjoy letting your poetic side fly as well as buy splendid souvenirs that will remind you of your trip.
Plates, cups, and mirrors, carefully crafted with the finest details, would be memorable gifts for your friends and an entrancing addition to your art collection.
Furthermore, if your visit to Fayoum Oasis lines with the Tunis Village Annual Handicrafts Festival, be ready to explore the variety of pottery forms from cross-cultural peers and artisans from other places.
Better plan your visit to Tunis Village Fayoum in autumn if you are a potter yourself!
Tunis Village Fayoum Pottery
If you are not and would love to learn how to craft graceful pottery, get your hands ready to learn how to shape the clay and turn it around into a beautiful handicraft in Tunis Village with its variety of workshops.
Moreover, El Fayoum Art Center is a must-visit during your trip to Tunis Village! Mohamed Abla founded it with his artistic friends back in 2016. It boasts a broad collection of caricatures and holds informative panels that would get you to know the exhibition in depth.
Additionally, there are other ethereal activities to do in Tunis Village when you visit El Fayoum. Let’s take a look at them.

Around Tunis Village, there is Les Chevaux Du Lac, a flawless destination in El Fayoum for equestrian lovers, with a variety of horseback riding activities for both the young and the adult.
Moreover, being surrounded by a natural Eden would grant you a variety of opportunities to take a glimpse at other elements composing our ecosystem. There are many bird-watching trips held in Fayoum for wildlife enthusiasts.
Taking a boat across the enchanting Lake Qaroun would take your mind and soul to cloud 9. This beautiful water body is more than an important archeological site with distinguishing fossils from 40 million years ago. It is also an essential part for birdwatchers and rowing admirers during their trip to El Fayoum.
Not to mention that indulging your taste buds in Fayoum’s country breakfast would lighten your adventure even more.

R3 New Capital District: Everything You Need To Know
====================================================

--- CONTENT ---
R3 New Capital
The R3 District in Egypt’s New Administrative Capital is an exciting and rapidly developing area that embodies the vision of a modern urban environment. Launched as part of a broader initiative to alleviate congestion in Cairo, this district is designed to be a hub of residential, commercial, and recreational facilities.
It’s a fact that the New Administrative Capital (NAC) is making waves across Egypt and is a hot topic of conversation these days, stirring up excitement across the nation.
However, today we’ll take a deep look at the R3 New Capital, from the top projects to the R3 New Capital for sale units and the exact location.
R3 New Capital
Situated about 45 kilometers east of Cairo, the R3 in New Capital is not just a district; it’s a bold vision for the future of urban living in Egypt. In
general, the New Capital City is well-known for its key landmarks, including cutting-edge hospitals, government districts, the
New Administrative Capital Power Plant
, and
residential districts.
Now, before diving into the nitty-gritty information, it is imperative that we first lay the groundwork by gaining a fundamental understanding of the R3 New Capital.
This will equip us with a holistic perspective, thereby enabling us to navigate the more details of this extraordinary district with greater clarity and insight.
Explore New Capital’s top projects
So, here’s some information you should know about the Third Residential District.
R3 District New Capital: 5 Essential Facts
The R3 New Administrative Capital is divided into 3 areas.
The district offers a variety of property types, including apartments, villas, townhouses, and semi-detached houses.
R3,
also known as the Third Residential District, is considered the first residential neighborhood implemented in the New Capital.
The district spans 1,000 acres of land.
R3 District offers its residents various amenities and services, from educational to medical, recreational, and sports facilities.
Now, let’s embark on an in-depth exploration of the R3 New Administrative Capital. To kick things off, let’s talk about the R3 location.
R3 New Capital Location
R3 is located in the center of the New Administrative Capital, which is one of the most prestigious cities in Eastern Cairo. It’s accessible via the Mohamed Bin Zayed Road.
R3 District is just a few minutes away from the Iconic Tower, the Infinity Tower, and other Governmental places. It overlooks the central business district.
