FAQs
What to do in Zamalek?
In Zamalek, you can take a falouka by the Nile, go for a walk by the Corniche, shop for antiques and souvenirs, or go dining.
Where to eat in Zamalek?
There are many options in Zamalek to eat, including Le Pacha 1901, Oldish Cafe & Restaurant, Luuma, Dalida Cuisine El Zamalek, Crimson Grill, and Granita Cairo.
Where is Zamalek in Cairo?
Zamalek is located in West Cairo, on the northern side of Gezira Island in the middle of the Nile River.
What to do in Zamalek at night?
At night in Zamalek, you can attend concerts and cultural events, or walk by the Nile, and enjoy a tranquil view.

Hospitals in Egypt
Egypt hosts a wide selection of premium hospitals, polyclinics, and healthcare centers scattered all around the country.
Whether you are an Egyptian searching for the nearest hospital to your home. Or if you are a foreigner and looking for a hospital for tests and checkups, you will find a nearby hospital.
The brilliant planning of the country allowed for a well-scattered typology for the hospitals in Egypt. You will find a hospital or a healthcare institute in almost every zone. This article will tell you where to find hospitals in different major regions of Egypt.

Waslet Dahshour Sheikh Zayed
Located in West Cairo, Waslet Dahshour has become one of the vibrant dining, social, and commercial hubs in El Sheikh Zayed. It features many restaurants, cafes, entertainment venues, and shopping malls, serving both Zayed’s and 6 October’s residents.

================================================================
Furnished vs Unfurnished Rental Units: Pros, Cons, How to Choose
================================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Furnished vs Unfurnished Rental
Our comprehensive guide about furnished vs unfurnished rental property would put your mind at ease. If you are relocating and searching for a new house, you are wondering which option is better for you.
Finding the right and most suitable house to rent depends on evaluating both the pros and cons of furnished and unfurnished units. There is no right answer; it all depends on what you’re looking for: flexibility vs convenience, cost vs personalization. This is all covered in the article.
Furnished vs Unfurnished Rental House
While furnished rentals offer immediate, trouble-free living space, unfurnished properties grant you the opportunity to personalize your house the way you want. But these are not the only aspects you should consider to know what suits you best.
There are several factors to consider, including but not limited to your budget, your rental period, and more.
Furnished vs Unfurnished Rental: Key Differences
The differences between furnished vs unfurnished rental properties are:
Budget and costs
Convenience
Personalization of living space
Flexibility
Long-term or short-term renting period
1. Budget & Costs
Your budget should be at the top of your list while looking for a rental property:
Furnished houses have a lower up-front cost, as you wouldn’t need to buy any furniture. But they have higher rental prices.
Unfurnished properties have lower prices. But since you will be buying your house’s furniture yourself, they have higher up-front cost.
2. Convenience
If you are looking for a hassle-free, ready-to-move unit, a furnished rental house would be the most suitable option for you. These properties typically include bed(s), sofa, dining table, and kitchen appliances (fridge, stove, etc).
Furthermore, some units exhibit extra features, such as a TV and cookware. This convenience offers you the opportunity to move in quickly with no need to transport or buy furniture.
On the other hand, unfurnished rentals include basic features, such as lighting and plumbing fixtures, built-in cabinets, or wardrobes (sometimes). This may not be convenient for some, unless you are looking forward to personalizing your own living space!
Furnished vs Unfurnished Rental
3. Personalization
One of the important aspects while deciding on furnished vs unfurnished rental property is whether you want to add your personal touch to your house:
Furnished rentals have limited personalization. Every element has been chosen, and minimal changes are allowed. But you can also add some small personal touches to your living space to make it fit your taste.
Unfurnished houses give you the opportunity to have more control over how your home looks. You can design your space freely to fit your taste by making semi-permanent improvements.
Check Modern Interior Design – Glamour Meets Practicality
4. Flexibility
When considering whether to pick a furnished house or an unfurnished rental property, you need to think about maximum stability:
Furnished properties offer the utmost short-term flexibility. You can easily move-in or move out. They usually have a shorter lease option. Additionally, you wouldn’t be tied up by moving out your furniture. It is more suitable for students or those with temporary work positions.
When it comes to unfurnished rentals, yes, you gain more control over how your living space is, which is more comfortable, and flexibility here would mean to live in a place your own way. On the other hand, these units mostly have longer leases. You will also need more time to move out your furniture if you decide to move out.
5. Long Term vs Short Term Rental Period
One aspect to consider is whether you are planning for a short rental period or a longer one. That’s when you combine all these 4 aspects listed above.
Furnished rentals are more suitable for students or those with temporary work positions. Unfurnished houses are more suitable for those planning for a long-term rental period.
In a nutshell, unfurnished properties are more about long-term stability.
Furnished vs Unfurnished Rental: Pros & Cons
After giving you all the details about the differences between furnished and unfurnished house rentals, it’s time to weigh the pros and cons of each.
Pros
Cons
Furnished Unit
Lower up-front cost
Easy to move in & out
Higher monthly rent
Limited personalization
Unfurnished Rental
Lower monthly rent
Full control over personalizing your space
Higher up-front cost
Less flexibility when moving out
With strong advantages for both, it becomes harder to pick. But in a nutshell:
You can choose a furnished property if y
ou are relocating for a
short time
, are a student, or prefer convenience and hassle-free moving in over personal style.
An unfurnished unit would be more suitable for you if you are planning to stay for a
longer period
, looking for a property with a lower monthly rent, and want to personalize your house your way.
So now, are you wondering where to find a rental property in Cairo, Egypt? Nawy and its innovative solutions have made it easier!

New Cairo
, El Sheikh Zayed, 6th of October City, and more.

In fact, you can pick from a notable set of villas, apartments, duplexes, and more housing options to rent from according to your needs. Nawy Keys has a diverse collection of properties in many high-end compounds in Egypt, such as
W Signature
by The Waterway in New Cairo
City Gate
by Qatari Diar in New Cairo
Allegria Compound
by Sodic in Sheikh Zayed
New Giza
by G Developments in 6th of October City
Final Thoughts
Choosing the right property for you and weighing the pros vs cons of furnished and unfurnished houses all revolve around your rental period, personal taste, and budget. When you decide, you can choose from the various units available on Nawy Keys.
With a diverse collection of rental properties, you can easily find your next house.

FAQs
What is better to rent, furnished or unfurnished?
Furnished properties are more suitable for those looking for a hassle-free, immediate rental. Unfurnished houses are more suitable if you are looking for a long-term rental and the freedom to personalize your space.
What is the difference between furnished and unfurnished?
Furnished units usually include beds, a sofa, a dining table, and kitchen appliances. Unfurnished properties only feature basic elements, such as built-in cabinets, wardrobes, and lighting and plumbing fixtures.
Is furnished or unfurnished cheaper?
Furnished properties have a higher rent price but fewer up-front costs. On the other hand, unfurnished houses have higher up-front costs (your own furniture) and a lower price.
Why are furnished apartments more expensive?
Furnished apartments are more expensive because they are equipped with furniture and essential appliances.

North Coast Road | A New Road To Your Destination
=================================================

--- CONTENT ---
North Coast road
Summer is here, and you’re probably getting your bags and sunscreen ready and searching for the ideal North Coast road to head off to Sahel Egypt, right?
The Egyptian government has been actively working on enhancing the road network across the country, focusing on improving travel routes to make exploring various regions easier and more efficient.
Among the areas benefiting from this development is North Coast, which has quickly become a favored summer destination for tourists seeking sun, sand, and fun.
To make travel to and from this beautiful coastline even more convenient, the government has introduced a new route. What’s the new North Coast Road? What are its advantages? That’s what we’ll answer below.
North Coast Road
One area that has seen significant growth is North Coast, which has rapidly become a popular summer destination for those seeking sun, sea, and endless fun.
To further facilitate travel to this beautiful shoreline, the government has launched a new route known as ‘
the New North Coast Road
‘ or ‘
Fouka Bay
‘
.
This new road directly connects Cairo to North Coast, streamlining your journey and allowing you to fully enjoy everything this stunning region has to offer.
However, after knowing the name of this road, below we’ll know more detailed information about its advantages.
Fouka Road: Overview
Fouka Road is a newly developed highway that connects Cairo directly to Egypt’s stunning North Coast, cutting down travel time and making access to coastal destinations faster, smoother, and way more convenient.
Whether you’re heading to Sidi Abdelrahman, Hacienda, Marassi, or even New Alamein, Fouka Road is now the quickest way to get there.
This road serves numerous villages and prominent tourist resorts along the northwestern coast.
Exploring The Hidden Gems: Top North Coast Villages
Why is Fouka Road Important?
Before the new North Coast road (Fouka Road), trips to North Coast could be long, crowded, and unpredictable—especially during summer weekends.
Fouka Road
Now, thanks to this modern, high-speed road, you can reach your favorite beach resort from Cairo in as little as
2.5 to 3 hours
(depending on traffic).
It bypasses many of the older, congested routes like Wadi El Natroun and the Alexandria Desert Road.
The New North Coast Road Advantages
There are a ton of benefits when it comes to the New North Coast advantages. If you travel to Sahel via Foka Road, you’ll enjoy a:
Direct access
to major coastal hotspots and resorts
Shorter travel time
from Cairo to North Coast
Serves high-demand areas like Marassi, Hacienda Bay, D-Bay, and New Alamein
Built with modern infrastructure for safer and more comfortable driving
Easy Guide to New Fouka Road
If you’re looking for the best villages in the Egyptian coastline,
North Coast
is the place to be.
Let’s start with Marassi, which is a great place to start your search for the perfect place to spend a fun and relaxing time away from the summer heat.
There are many other different resorts in North Coast that offer various services and accommodations to suit different needs and budgets.
Take a look at the
Nawy’s Sahel map
:
At the last of our guide, let’s ask a question: Who benefits from Fouka Road? Let’s discover below.
Who benefits from the New Sahel Road (Fouka)?
If you’re a traveler, real estate investor, or just someone who loves spending weekends by the sea, Fouka Road makes your North Coast experience easier and more enjoyable.
It also boosts the value of properties along the coast, thanks to improved accessibility.
Final Thoughts
We hope you’ve enjoyed reading our blog post about the new road! This road will be a huge benefit to the owners of the land it runs through, and we are excited to see where it will take them.

The North Coast Most Fun Activities In Summer 2025
==================================================

--- CONTENT ---
North Coast is THE place to be in the summer months, whether you love relaxing or partying, the North Coast is the right place for you. The coastal destination lies on the Mediterranean Sea, right in the middle of Alexandria and Marsa Matrouh.
For the past couple of decades, the area has become a hub for summer fun. It’s where you go to swim, indulge in a number of activities, or attend exclusive parties. Keep on reading to learn where to go in North Coast Egypt this year!
The North Coast
As summer rolls in, the North Coast is definitely a top destination that comes to mind. If you’re curious about what this beautiful area has to offer, you’re in the right spot!
We’re here to answer all your questions and help you explore everything from stunning resorts to lavish properties and renewed hotels. But before diving into the nitty-gritty information, let’s take a look at North Coast itself.
What is the Northern Coast of Egypt?
Located along the stunning coastline of the Mediterranean Sea, North Coast of Egypt is a beloved summer vacation spot. It’s renowned for its pristine beaches, unique amenities, and luxurious resorts. Plus, visitors can enjoy a lively nightlife and a wide range of leisure activities that make every moment unforgettable.
Sahel Egypt also has a wide range of stunning areas and wonderful beaches. Each area has its own spirit and advantages. Below, we’ll mention the top North Coast neighborhoods.
What are The Best Areas in The North Coast Egypt?
There are various stunning areas in North Coast Egypt, including:
Ras El Hekma
Sidi Abdelrahman
Sidi Heneish
New Alamein
Al Dabaa
Ghazala Bay

Nawy’s Sahel Map
is your ultimate guide to the luxurious resorts along the North Coast.

So, you’re wondering what to do in Sahel Egypt? Whether you’re with family or a group of friends, this vibrant destination has plenty to offer!
What to do in North Coast Egypt?
The North Coast is brimming with exciting activities, especially during the summer of 2025! Here’s a glimpse of some of the most fun things you can do during the day:
1. Go Kayaking
Experience the thrill of kayaking at one of the beautiful resorts, like
Fouka Bay
. Paddle through the serene waters and take in the stunning coastal views. It’s a fantastic way to connect with nature and enjoy some outdoor adventure!
2. Surf with the Experts
Get ready for an exciting adventure by surfing with the experts at Surf Camp Egypt! You can catch some waves at beautiful locations like
Sidi Abdelrahman
or Hacienda White.
These spots are perfect for both beginners and experienced surfers, offering professional guidance to help you improve your skills.
With the stunning Mediterranean backdrop and the thrill of riding the waves, it’s an experience you won’t want to miss.
So grab your surfboard and join the fun at Surf Camp Egypt this summer!
3. Work Out with a Spectacular View
North Coast resorts offer a fantastic variety of gyms and workout spaces to help you stay active during your vacation. Imagine waking up early and hitting the outdoor gym at June Sodic—it’s a great way to start your day surrounded by beautiful scenery!
Whether you prefer strength training, cardio, or just enjoying the fresh air while you exercise, these resorts provide the perfect environment to keep fit and energized. So, pack your workout gear and get ready to enjoy a healthy lifestyle while soaking up the sun on the North Coast.
4. Catch the latest movies
Looking for a fun way to spend your evening in North Coast?
Head over to Al Masa Mall in Alamein City, where you’ll find a variety of cinemas showing the latest movies. It’s a great spot to enjoy a film with your family—who says North Coast is just about the beach?
With comfortable seating and a selection of films, it’s the perfect way to unwind after a day in the sun.
So grab some popcorn and enjoy a cinematic experience in this beautiful coastal area!
5. Take a Guided Tour
If you’re eager to explore the rich history of Alamein City, consider taking a guided tour. This luxurious destination is not only known for its beautiful landscapes but also for its significant historical importance, particularly during World War II.
El Alamein Military Museum
Knowledgeable guides will provide insights into the events that took place here, making your experience both educational and engaging.
6. Have a Friendly Padel Tennis Match
Why not enjoy a friendly padel tennis match with your friends at Seashell Playa? Padel is a fun and engaging sport that combines elements of tennis and squash, making it perfect for players of all skill levels.
The courts at Seashell Playa provide a vibrant atmosphere where you can enjoy some friendly competition while soaking up the sun.
Whether you’re a seasoned player or new to the game, it’s a great way to bond with friends, stay active, and have a blast during your time in North Coast.
7. Indulge in the Luxurious Spa
If you’re looking to pamper yourself, head to the luxurious spa at Jefaira North Coast. This serene place offers a range of rejuvenating treatments designed to help you relax and unwind.
Jefaira North Coast
From soothing massages to revitalizing facials, the spa provides a tranquil environment where you can escape the hustle and bustle of everyday life.
Enjoy the calming ambiance and professional services that will leave you feeling refreshed and rejuvenated. Treat yourself to a day of indulgence at Jefaira’s spa, and experience the ultimate in relaxation during your stay on the North Coast!
8. Attend a Yoga Class
If you’re looking to relax and rejuvenate, consider attending a yoga class by the beach in Diplo. Practicing yoga on the beach allows you to connect with nature while enjoying the soothing sounds of the waves and the gentle sea breeze.
These classes typically cater to all skill levels, making it a perfect opportunity for both beginners and experienced yogis. Whether you’re focusing on mindfulness, flexibility, or strength, the beach setting enhances the overall experience, providing a serene backdrop for your practice.
Nightlife North Coast Sahel
Had fun in the morning? Have a quick nap because nights in Sahel are something else! You can spend your night in one of the numerous beach bars, attend a concert, or go clubbing. Here are some of the best nightlife venues in North Coast so you can party till the sun comes up.

=======================================
Top 10 Things To Do In El Ain El Sokhna
=======================================

--- CONTENT ---
El Ain El Sokhna
El Ain El Sokhna is well known for its sandy beaches, crystal clear waters, and perfect weather 365 days of the year. Over the past decade, the coastal destination quickly became one of the top vacation spots in the country. As it includes a wide array of luxurious resorts and fun activities.
Speaking of activities, Ain Sokhna’s location with mountains on one side and beaches on the other allows it to provide you with distinctive leisure activities that can not be found anywhere else in Egypt! So keep on reading this blog post to learn about the top 10 things to do in Ain El Sokhna!
Things To Do In El Ain El Sokhna
El Ain El Sokhna is a small town overlooking the Gulf of Suez of the Red Sea. It has a prime location, only one hour away from Cairo. Making it the perfect place to go for a quick weekend getaway in the winter or a relaxing summer vacation.
The city boasts sandy beaches with calm warm waters. It’s home to many luxury hotels, resorts, and entertainment facilities.
Most importantly,
Ain Sokhna
has countless leisure and relaxing activities you can indulge in. Enough beating around the bush and let’s take a look at some of the top things to do in El Ain El Sokhna!
10 Things To Do In El Ain El Sokhna
1. Dive or Snorkel & Explore the Waters
Whether you are a professional diver or a beginner, you can enjoy a day of scuba diving at Ain Sokhna.
Bear in mind that El Ain El Sokhna is one of the top areas for diving in Egypt, nay the country. As the city is famous for its marine life and the abundant Coral Reef systems.
And if you are a beginner, don’t worry, there are several learning centers where you can dive with professionals and learn from the best.
Afraid of diving?
Don’t love the deep waters?
You are not alone, many think diving is a hard activity to master. But that doesn’t mean, you can’t explore the waters; you can simply go snorkeling.
Snorkeling is way easier than diving. In fact, you don’t have to train whatsoever. Just get the gear, choose a spot filled with beautiful scenery, and take a deep breath!
2. Enjoy Water Sports
For sea lovers, El Ain El Sokhna offers a variety of water sports activities. You can try windsurfing, kitesurfing, parasailing, or jet skiing.
Many resorts have water sports centers where you can rent equipment and receive training if you’re new to the sport.
Insider’s note: the winds and calm waters make it an ideal spot for windsurfing and parasailing!
Want to enjoy a water activity without getting wet? Then fishing it is!
You can either rent a boat for a deep-sea fishing experience or fish from the shore. Various resorts organize fishing trips where you can catch a variety of fish like sea bass, snapper, and barracuda.
This activity is perfect for those looking to enjoy the serenity of the sea while also catching fresh fish. What’s better than catching your own dinner?
3. Explore The Desert With A Safari Trip
Take a trip into the desert surrounding Ain Sokhna for a thrilling desert safari. Many local operators offer safaris by quad bikes, 4×4 vehicles, or even camel rides.
A desert safari will give you a chance to experience the stark beauty of the Egyptian desert, with activities like dune bashing, sandboarding, and camping under the stars.
Some tours include Bedouin-style dinners where you can enjoy traditional Egyptian food in a desert setting.
4. See El Ain El Sokhna From Above
Nothing is more fun than catching a glimpse of a beautiful destination from an airplane. But now you don’t have to take an airplane for that, in El Ain El Sokhna you can get a bird’s eye view of the whole area while enjoying a fun ride in the cable cars.
Things To Do In El Ain El Sokhna – Cable Cars
There are several destinations where you can enjoy a cable car ride including the famous
Porto Sokhna Resort
.
5. Have an Adrenaline Boost
Head out to
Il Monte Galala
and embark on a one of a kind adventure filled with adrenaline and memorable moments. You can indulge in a number of adrenaline-pumping activities including but not limited to:
Hiking
Rope climbing
Mountain biking
Camping
6. Go Sightseeing Near El Ain El Sokhna
Monastery of Saint Paul
While Ain Sokhna is primarily known for its beaches and resorts, it also has several nearby historical and cultural attractions that are worth exploring:
Monastery of St. Anthony: About 2.5 hours from El Ain El Sokhna lies the ancient Monastery of St. Anthony, one of the oldest Christian monasteries in the world, dating back to the 4th century.
Monastery of St. Paul: Located near St. Anthony’s Monastery, St. Paul’s Monastery is also an ancient religious site with its roots in early Christianity.
7. Take A Boat Tour
Boat tours and yacht cruises are a great way to experience the scenic beauty of Ain Sokhna’s coastline. Some boat tours offer the chance to go snorkeling at remote coral reefs, while others provide a more relaxing experience with stunning sunset views.
Private yacht rentals are also available for those looking to spend a day on the sea with friends or family.
8. Golf
Things To Do In Ain Sokhna – Golfing
Some of Ain Sokhna’s luxury resorts, like
Jazz Little Venice,
have world-class golf courses. If you’re a fan of golf, you can enjoy a round in a beautiful setting, with views of both the mountains and the Red Sea.
The golf courses in El Ain El Sokhna are designed to be challenging but enjoyable for players of all skill levels. It’s a great way to relax and enjoy the area’s natural beauty.
9. Party Till The Sun Comes Up
While Ain Sokhna is often seen as a quiet, relaxing retreat, many resorts and private beaches host beach parties and nightlife events, especially during weekends and holiday seasons.
These parties typically feature live DJs, music, and dancing, set against the backdrop of the Red Sea.
The combination of music, dancing, cocktails, and the gentle sea breeze makes these parties a great way to spend your evening after a day of relaxation or exploration.
10. Pamper Yourself With A Spa Day
Nothing says relaxing vacation more than a spa day! You will find an array of world-class spas and wellness centers all over El Ain El Sokhna.
You can enjoy massages, facials, and body treatments designed to help you relax and rejuvenate. After a long day of swimming or exploring, a spa session is the perfect way to unwind. Some resorts also offer yoga classes, steam baths, and wellness programs focused on mindfulness and relaxation.
Each of these activities in Ain Sokhna offers a different way to enjoy this versatile destination, whether you’re looking for adventure, relaxation, or exploration.
Read this guide to learn about the best places to go in Ain Sokhna:
Your Guide To A Well Spent Day Use In El Sokhna
Enjoy A Luxurious Stay in El Ain El Sokhna
Why keep driving back and forth for short stays when you can get a vacation house and enjoy unlimited vacations whenever you have some free time?

A Guide On The Best Schools in New Cairo
========================================

--- CONTENT ---
Schools in New Cairo
Living in a good school district is not a luxury but a necessity for every parent out there! Although Egypt is filled to the brim with international schools and educational institutions, it’s still not easy to find the right one. On top of that, due to long traffic hours, parents now tend to send their children to schools near their residences. Many real estate development companies decided to bridge that gap in the market and integrate renowned international schools within their gates. With that in mind, let’s take a deep dive into some of the best schools in New Cairo.
International Schools in New Cairo
There is a wide array of schools in New Cairo, but the following ones managed to stand out among the masses. Thanks to their unique teaching styles and advanced curricula. In general, these schools prepare your children for a lifetime of success! It also doesn’t hurt that they are located in prestigious residential compounds.
The following list of international schools in Tagamo3 includes both schools that are inside prestigious compounds as well as schools that are near well-known compounds, so that you can enjoy a wide range of options.
1. Cadmus International Schools
Cadmus International Schools
With more than 135 years of expertise, Cadmus is one of the
best international schools in Egypt
, which will provide your children with the highest quality of education. Here are some quick facts about the school:
It is located in the high-end compound,
Al Burouj
by Capital Group Properties (CGP).
The school offers numerous extracurricular activities to nurture your kids’ soft skills and talents.
Cadmus teaches students how to be an active part of their community by motivating them to attend community service projects, tutor other students, and plan social events.
2. American International School in Egypt (AISE)
American International School in Egypt (AISE)
Secondly, there is the American International School in Egypt, which is considered one of the top schools in New Cairo and has been operating in Egypt since 1990. These decades of experience are clearly seen in the high quality of education provided.
As one of the top schools in New Cairo, it aims to empower its students and help them become the best versions of themselves. With that in mind, the American International School in Egypt:
Offers the American curriculum.
The campus is spread across 15 acres of land.
Includes technology centers, music rooms, an Olympic-sized running track, a library, fully equipped science labs, and a 500-seat theatre.
Ideally located in
Cairo Festival City (CFC)
by Al Futtaim.
3. Repton Cairo
Repton Cairo
If you are looking for a British education, then you can’t go wrong with Repton Cairo. The renowned school focuses on providing opportunities for its students to learn and grow in the best environment. Repton Cairo School:
Works on developing each student’s intellect, culture, and morals.
Uses interactive digital blended learning.
Helps young students learn through discovery.
Strategically located in
Mivida Compound
by Emaar Misr.
The Mivida compound also features Europa-Schule Kairo. A globally renowned school that offers a German education.
4. Gateway International Montessori School
Gateway International Montessori School
The Gateway International Montessori School in the 5th Settlement, New Cairo, is the place to go if you are looking for a unique educational program for your child.
The school offers co-educational Montessori and American curriculum programs in elementary stages, which allow its students to later earn an American High School Diploma upon graduation.
Gateway International Montessori School is situated in New Cairo’s hotspot, the Katameya Gardens in the Fifth Settlement. You will find it near the
Katameya Gardens New Cairo Compound
.
5. NCBIS – New Cairo British International School
NCBIS – New Cairo British International School
Starting in 1978, and having a vision of becoming the top-of-mind school in Cairo, the New Cairo British International School is one of the unique schools in the Fifth Settlement.
The school was created as a non-profit organization under the scope of the Heliopolis Society for the Cultural and Social Care of English-Speaking Foreigners (‘The Society’).
NCBIS offers external examinations that include IGCSE, A Levels, and the International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme. Finally, the school enjoys a premium location in the 5th Settlement near the well-known
Cattleya New Cairo compound
.
6. Metropolitan International School
Metropolitan International School
Metropolitan School started its journey in Egypt in 1954, with Mr. Fouad Habib’s family being the founders and nurturers of the school’s educational journey.
The school offers an American curriculum academic program based on the U.S. Common Core State Standards (CCSS) from kindergarten through high school. This school is very close to
Mountain View One Compound
.
7. Egypt British International School (EBIS)
The Egypt British International School in New Cairo is one of the important schools in New Cairo that provides British circular education from kindergarten to high school. This school enjoys a strategic location in the Fifth Settlement, very close to
The Waterway – New Cairo compound
.
8. GEMS International School Cairo
Despite being relatively new to the educational field (starting in 2022), the GEMS International School of Cairo has since proved to be a leading school and among the best schools of New Cairo.
The school offers education for kindergarten through high school (till the moment the school has grades only till grade 10, but with plans of expansion through 2025 till grades 11 and 12).
GEMS School is found in a premium location in New Cairo with very close proximity to the
Jayd compound in New Cairo by Saudi Egyptian Developers (SED)
.
9. The International School of Elite Education
This is one of the top schools in New Cairo. It provides education from kindergarten to grade 12 in the American School, Foundation Stage I to IGIII in British Schools, and both PRE IB (Grade 10) and IBDP 1 in IB Schools.
You will find this school in a prestigious location near
The Village Compound in New Cairo by Palm Hills Developments
.
With a campus that covers over 21,100 m² of land, the school features 70 spacious, air-conditioned classrooms.

Everything You Need To Know About New Cairo City
================================================

--- CONTENT ---
New Cairo City
New Cairo City is well-known for its luxurious compounds and important destinations. The area is relatively new to the Egyptian skyline, and it has an ideal location in West Cairo, close to numerous neighborhoods. In New Cairo, there are countless activities to indulge in and endless things to do.
Living in New Cairo has a number of advantages, but most importantly, you will be living in a community of like-minded people. It’s a place where you can lead the lifestyle you like with no restrictions. In this article, we will present to you the top compounds in New Cairo, their high-end amenities, and exclusive price rates.
New Cairo City
Since the 1970s, the Egyptian population has been growing more and more each day, and the country has taken drastic steps to help accommodate the growing population. With that in mind, the country introduced a number of new neighborhoods and areas in Cairo. In the year 2000, New Cairo City was established in the West of Cairo.
New Cairo City is sprawled across 85,000 acres of land, and in 201,6 the country released a decree adding 15,000 acres of land to the city. The area is split into a number of neighborhoods, each containing an array of high-end compounds and projects.
As previously mentioned, life in New Cairo City has a multitude of perks and advantages. Such as having immediate access to an array of important destinations, including but not limited to:
Numerous renowned universities, including the American University in Cairo (AUC), German University in Cairo (GUC), and Future University Egypt (FUE).
Wadi Degla Club
New Cairo Park
Al Ahly Sports Club
Police Academy
An array of international schools
Health and wellness facilities, including 5-star spas
Hospitals and medical facilities

======================================
Top International Schools In 6 October
======================================

--- CONTENT ---
Finding the right school for your kids is no easy task. The school has to be close to your home so they don’t spend hours in the commute, but more importantly, it has to offer top-notch education quality. In a nutshell, choosing the school your kids will enrol in takes time and effort that you have to put in. What is the Golden Square New Cairo?
====================================

--- CONTENT ---
Golden Square New Cairo
Do you constantly come across the “Golden Square” when you are searching for anything in the 5th settlement or New Cairo? Are you among the majority of people who don’t know what Golden Square is and why it is such a big deal?
No worries, we will help you out! In this article, we will present you with everything you need to know about Golden Square New Cairo, including its location, the most popular compounds in it, its investment potential, and more.
Golden Square New Cairo
The
Golden Square
New Cairo is one of the liveliest and most vibrant areas in the fifth settlement. The area has a prime location in close proximity to numerous major roads and important destinations, such as the New Administrative Capital, the AUC Campus, the Cairo-Suez Road, and the Cairo-Sokhna Road.
That ideal location makes properties in Golden Square extremely valuable, as well as featuring properties with some of the highest prices per meter in Cairo.
This is also due to the fact that the area includes a number of prestigious compounds developed by the biggest names in the Egyptian real estate scene. With that in mind, the Golden Square New Cairo compounds include:
Layan
Villette
Azzar New Cairo
Palm Hills Katameya PK1
and
Palm Hills Katameya Extension
Boutique Village
Mivida
Mountain View 2
Palm Hills New Cairo
El Pario Oro
Eastville Compound
Fifth Square
Lake View Residence
Eastown Residence
Azad New Cairo
Aster Residence
Katameya Dunes
Now, let’s take a closer look at some of those outstanding compounds!
Layan Compound
Layan New Cairo Compound in Golden Square
Landmarks Developments (LMD) established Layan to be a high-end gated community in Golden Square Egypt.
Inspired by state-of-the-art French architecture, the Layan Compound has a distinctive style that will take you to France with all its beauty and sophistication. As a fully integrated compound, Layan features:
Commercial area
Nursery
Fully equipped gym
Olympic pool
Business park
Green areas and landscapes
Clubhouse
Tennis courts
Cycling lanes
Spa
You can get access to all of this (and more) when you purchase a property in Layan New Cairo. Keep in mind that the compound boasts a collection of standalone villas, twin houses, and townhouses.
Please note that the prices and spaces of the available units are constantly updated.

Best Sokhna Compounds | Explore The Exceptional
===============================================

--- CONTENT ---
The Red Sea Riviera in Egypt is a stunning destination that attracts travelers with its breathtaking beauty and diverse attractions. With its mesmerizing marine life, beautiful coral reefs, and thrilling watersports, the Red Sea is a paradise for underwater enthusiasts and nature lovers. And when it comes to the Egyptian Red Sea, El Sokhna, and its best compounds come at the top of the list!
While many of the resorts in Sokhna offer the same amenities, there are quite a few things to consider when choosing the right resort for you. For those looking for a fun time with friends, a good time in the sun and sand, a resort with breathtaking views, and other recreational activities is a great way to go.
Today, we’ll dive into the realm of the top El Sokhna Resorts and what they offer vacationers providing them with a unique vacation.
Best Sokhna Compounds
Since you’re reading this blog, it’s clear you’re a fan of El Sokhna. You likely know a lot about the area and are prepared to take the next step in buying a beach house in one of Sokhna’s best compounds.
So, before diving into the nitty gritty information and listing the resorts, here are some
helpful tips from Nawy for choosing an ideal resort
:
Consider Location
: you need to make sure that the resort you are planning to stay at is close to a beach, accessible, and near many major roads.
Check out the amenities
: Look for resorts that offer the amenities that matter most to you, such as pools, spas, or direct beach access. Many best resorts in the Ain El Sokhna provide world-class facilities that enhance your stay.
Resort’s Views
: Don’t forget to look at the view. You want to make sure the resort is high enough that you can get a great view of the Red Sea, mountains, and other beautiful views!
Private vs. Public Beaches
: If beach access is important, consider whether the resort has a private beach. Private beaches are often cleaner and safer, as resorts typically maintain them better.
Cost
: One of the crucial things you should look for is the prices and payment plans offered by the developers to make the payment step as easy as possible.
Feeling a bit overwhelmed and wondering, “
How can I find all these features in a resort?
” Don’t worry! We’ve got you covered.

Best Sokhna Compounds | Explore The Exceptional
===============================================

--- CONTENT ---
The Red Sea Riviera in Egypt is a stunning destination that attracts travelers with its breathtaking beauty and diverse attractions. With its mesmerizing marine life, beautiful coral reefs, and thrilling watersports, the Red Sea is a paradise for underwater enthusiasts and nature lovers. And when it comes to the Egyptian Red Sea, El Sokhna, and its best compounds come at the top of the list!
While many of the resorts in Sokhna offer the same amenities, there are quite a few things to consider when choosing the right resort for you. For those looking for a fun time with friends, a good time in the sun and sand, a resort with breathtaking views, and other recreational activities is a great way to go.
Today, we’ll dive into the realm of the top El Sokhna Resorts and what they offer vacationers providing them with a unique vacation.
Best Sokhna Compounds
Since you’re reading this blog, it’s clear you’re a fan of El Sokhna. You likely know a lot about the area and are prepared to take the next step in buying a beach house in one of Sokhna’s best compounds.
So, before diving into the nitty gritty information and listing the resorts, here are some
helpful tips from Nawy for choosing an ideal resort
:
Consider Location
: you need to make sure that the resort you are planning to stay at is close to a beach, accessible, and near many major roads.
Check out the amenities
: Look for resorts that offer the amenities that matter most to you, such as pools, spas, or direct beach access. Many best resorts in the Ain El Sokhna provide world-class facilities that enhance your stay.
Resort’s Views
: Don’t forget to look at the view. You want to make sure the resort is high enough that you can get a great view of the Red Sea, mountains, and other beautiful views!
Private vs. Public Beaches
: If beach access is important, consider whether the resort has a private beach. Private beaches are often cleaner and safer, as resorts typically maintain them better.
Cost
: One of the crucial things you should look for is the prices and payment plans offered by the developers to make the payment step as easy as possible.
Feeling a bit overwhelmed and wondering, “
How can I find all these features in a resort?
” Don’t worry! We’ve got you covered.
Below, we’ll highlight some of the best Sokhna Compounds where you can discover everything you need for a perfect getaway.
Whether you’re looking for stunning views, sandy beaches, or exciting activities, these resorts offer a variety of options to suit your preferences.

fifth settlement new cairo

Fifth Settlement New Cairo :

New Cairo City :
new Cairo city
is the area lying between Katameya and Cairo Suez Road. The neighborhood was designed to be a model of the Egyptian modern niche neighborhoods. New Cairo or also known as ”
tagamo3 ” is considered the  Heart of Cairo and at the same time, it is far from traffic and Cairo’s crowd.
Fifth Settlement Location :
5 minutes from the ring road New Cairo City location is as follows:
15 minutes away from the Maadi district.
10 minutes away from El Rehab.
10 minutes away from El Moshir Tantawy Axis.

mivida new cairo

accommodated

El Galala City: A Delightful Escapade on the Red Sea Shores
===========================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Galala City
The Red Sea has always been a distinguished vacation destination. It is the home of a variety of beach communities that were built with an eye to exquisite escapades. However, the development of new cities in Egypt will make it go beyond a flawless coastal spot. El Galala City in Ain Sokhna is filled with wonders that will take your spirits up.
It not only exhibits a variety of elite resorts and recreational activities, but also a broad range of essential facilities. It is a year-round destination, and not only because of its weather. This article will give you all the details about the splendid details of El Galala City.
Galala City
Sprawling across 17,000 acres of land in Ain Sokhna, El Galala is the spectacle of the Red Sea Coast. Building new cities in Egypt revolved around constructing self-contained destinations that blended sustainability factors with marvelous architecture and vital facilities.
The name was inspired by Gabal El Galala, which is close to the city. With such a muse, you can guess that this is a natural Eden at its finest, combining blue, green, and gray shades. But hold your bewilderment, because the area transcends being a tranquil destination!
Jabal Al Jalalah is actually a distinctive Egyptian historical site. It is where Moses escaped Pharaoh and his army, crossing the Red Sea. This adds to the wonders of El Galala City, of course.
Ain Sokhna
has been an enchanting vacation destination for families since…forever, and now, it will be a faultless residential choice. El Galala City in Egypt boasts a wide range of amenities, including:
Educational facilities
Health facilities
Boundless leisure spots
The New Industrial Zone
Luxurious resorts

El Galala University
Education is one important aspect of our lives. To guarantee that the residents of El Galala City will ensure their next generation’s education, the area exhibits a one-of-a-kind university.
El Galala University is one of the top educational facilities in Egypt, built with one belief in mind: No Boundaries, Only Opportunities. It features 45 programs across 17 diverse study fields. Theoretical and practical applications merge to offer the residents of El Galala City a one-of-a-kind knowledge journey.
There are various majors at El Galala University, ensuring you will find your favorite field of study there, including:
Administrative Science
Applied Health Sciences and Technology

Medicine

As can be seen, the university assures an unparalleled education experience overlooking the serene Red Sea in El Galala City.
Galala City
Health Facilities
El Galala City features a broad array of health facilities, fully equipped to receive any medical emergency. Moreover, there is a wide range of clinics covering all specialties in the area.
Not to mention that one of the main aspects of a healthy lifestyle is a rejuvenated mind. El Galala City includes a health and wellness resort that exhibits a variety of high-end amenities including a luxurious spa, a top-tier fitness center, and swimming pools.
The New Industrial Zone
The New Industrial Zone in El Galala City is on Ain Sokhna – Zaafarana Road. It is planned and designed by the National Service Projects Organization. Its location on Northwest Golf El Suez is a strategic one for a variety of businesses.
Such a development will boost the number of job opportunities and play an important role in expanding the country’s economy, which is one of the main reasons behind building
new cities in Egypt
.

Mivida New Cairo
Prices for a property in Mivida 5th settlement range from 6,303,750 EGP to 30,802,888 EGP. Here’s a breakdown of what you can expect to pay:
These standalone villas have an average built-up area of 296 square meters and they’re priced at 30,802,888 EGP.

Get To Know The Fifth Settlement Location
=========================================

--- CONTENT ---
Where is the Fifth Settlement location? Is it near what you want or far? Is it a walkable area or do you need a car? How crowded are the streets? You have to learn the answers to all these questions before making a decision to move into one of the Fifth Settlement compounds. On a mission to help you live in the place of your dreams, we have gathered for you everything you need to know about the Fifth Settlement location.
Fifth Settlement Location
First, you have to know that the Fifth Settlement location is in the heart of
New Cairo
City, neighboring the First and Third Settlements. The ideal Fifth Settlement location is also:
Between Heliopolis and Maadi
A 20-minute drive to Old Cairo and Downtown
Easily accessible through numerous roads such as Ring Road, Moshir Tantawy Axis, and Marsa Matrouh Road.
1-hour drive far from
Ain Sokhna
Now that you know where is the location of the Fifth Settlement, let’s answer the other questions!
How crowded are the streets? If you are not hitting 90th Street in rush hour, then you won’t face any problems!
Is it walkable? To an extent, there are many things you will find right next to your compound so you can walk there. But in general, the Fifth Settlement is filled with highways better suited for vehicles than walking.
Fifth Settlement Neighborhoods
Just like New Cairo, Fifth Settlement itself is divided into a number of neighborhoods and areas, including
90th Street (Teseen): this is the most famous street in the Fifth Settlement, accordingly it includes countless facilities and amenities however it’s also the most crowded area in the whole neighborhood. It is divided into 3 areas; northern, southern, and main.
Chouifat District: this is one of the calmest areas and it has one of the most popular international schools in the country; the International School of Choueifat.
El Narges District: this distinct includes the AUC campus and countless activities, eateries, and entertainment venues.
Lotus District: this district neighbors Madinaty and El Sherouk City easily accessible through the Regional Ring Road.
El Koronfol District: this is one of the most luxurious and prestigious districts where many of the high-end compounds can be found.

A Complete Guide On October 6 City

--- CONTENT ---
October 6 City
Did you know that October 6 City is divided into 3 parts? Or did you know that the area includes some of Egypt’s largest commercial and residential projects? There are many other things that you probably don’t know about the 6th of October City. That’s why we have gathered in this article everything you need to know about the city, including the endless facilities, entertainment venues, and most importantly the top compounds.
October 6
The city of October 6 was developed back in 1973 as an extension to the capital but in 2008 it was declared as a city of its own. Just recently, the city got divided into 3 parts;
First, the 6th of October City which occupies 52,000 acres
Then there’s October Gardens rolling on 27,000 acres
Lastly, the New October City developed across 90,000 acres
But where is all that? Another important thing to know about
October City
is its ideal location, which is only a stone’s throw away from the Great Pyramids of Giza. Also, the city is located:
32 km from Cairo’s downtown and 40 km away from Zamalek
Around 1 hour away from Cairo International Airport
Adjacent to Sheikh Zayed
Additionally, 6th October City location is easily accessible through Cairo – Alexandria Desert Road, and Wahat Road. After knowing the city’s location and a brief history, it’s time to know what can you do in 6 October!
What to do in 6 October City?
That question has countless answers, as the city includes a myriad of shopping malls, entertainment venues, eateries, nightlife venues, and children’s entertainment areas. The entertainment facilities of October City include but are not limited to:

Places To Go in Tagamo3 With Family
Are New Cairo suitable places to go with family? Absolutely! New Cairo is one of the best places to enjoy quality time with your family and create unforgettable memories.

So, what are the top places to go in Tagamo3 with family? Here is the list:
1. Family Park in El Rehab
One of the highlights for families is the
Family Park
, a spacious area designed for relaxation and play. It features playgrounds, picnic spots, and walking paths, making it an ideal place for kids to run around and enjoy the outdoors while parents unwind.
It’s worth noting that park hours are every day from
09:00 AM to 10:00 PM
The mini zoo in Family Park, El Rehab New Cairo, is a highlight, providing children with the opportunity to see exotic species and reptiles up close, making it an educational and fun experience.
With its beautiful surroundings and numerous attractions, Familypark is the perfect place to spend quality time with your loved ones while enjoying the outdoors.
2. KidZania Cairo
KidZania
KidZania Cairo is one of the best places to go in Tagamo3 with your family. It’s an innovative hands-on center where children can immerse themselves in a world designed to mimic adult life within a specially reconstructed cityscape.
This interactive experience allows kids to explore various professions and activities in a safe and engaging environment. In KidZania, children can role-play as doctors, firefighters, chefs, and more, gaining valuable insights into different careers while having fun.
The realistic city setting includes shops, buildings, and even vehicles, creating an authentic atmosphere that sparks creativity and imagination.
What age is KidZania Cairo for? Kids between the ages of four and fourteen. Ready to make your kids try a unique experience?
3. El Malahy New Cairo
El Malahy is an exciting amusement park that promises fun and adventure for the entire family. Located in the heart of Katameya, this vibrant park offers a wide array of thrilling rides, games, shows, and attractions that will make you feel like a kid again.
With its captivating atmosphere and diverse attractions, El Malahy is the perfect destination for families looking to create unforgettable memories together. So, gather your loved ones and get ready for a day of fun at this fantastic amusement park!
When planning a visit to El Malahy, it’s important to note that ticket prices can vary, especially during weekends and holidays.
As of 2026, the price for the Classic Package is 552 EGP.
However, prices may change, so it’s advisable to check the official El Malahy website for the most up-to-date information on ticket prices and packages.

===================================================================
How Much Is My House Worth? 4 Factors To Help You Valuate Your Home
===================================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Considering selling your house? In the process of purchasing or investing in real estate? Then the first thing you’ve got to do is ask yourself What’s my accurate house value? Or in other words, “
How much is my house worth?”
By learning how real estate valuation works, you can choose the right property to purchase that also serves as a lucrative investment opportunity.
4 Factors To Help You Evaluate Your House Value
House valuation is defined as a long process that takes into account many complicated factors.
But to keep it simple and to the point, there are 4 factors that you have to put into consideration before purchasing a property.
These factors will help you purchase the right property that only grows in value over time.
1. The Neighborhood
The neighborhood is arguably the most influential factor in determining your home’s value. A well-located property in a desirable area can significantly outperform similar-sized homes in less favorable locations. When evaluating a neighborhood, consider:
Accessibility:
Check if the area has easy access to major roads, highways, and public transport. Proximity to business districts or popular city hubs adds value.
Amenities and Facilities:
Neighborhoods with supermarkets, shopping malls, gyms, hospitals, recreational areas, and entertainment hubs tend to attract buyers more quickly.
Education:
Proximity to highly-rated schools and universities is a major selling point, especially for families. Good school districts can significantly boost property prices.
Safety and Community:
Low crime rates, clean streets, and active community engagement make a neighborhood more appealing.
Future Developments:
Research upcoming infrastructure projects or urban developments in the area, as these can increase property values over time.
In essence, a property in a prime neighborhood often offers a higher return on investment and faster resale potential, making this factor critical in both buying and selling decisions.
2. Home’s age and condition
This is a crucial factor if you are purchasing a resale property (but it’s not that important for primary properties). It’s a no-brainer why the property’s age and condition are important; if it’s old or in bad shape, of course, that’s going to cause a dent in its price when you are selling it.
Accordingly, by treating your home well and keeping it maintained, you are raising its value when the time comes for you to upgrade.
3. Property size
Property size is more than just square footage; it’s a key determinant of both practicality and market value. Here’s how to evaluate it properly:
Total Area vs. Built-Up Area:
The total area includes the entire plot, while built-up area is the actual usable indoor space. Buyers often prioritize properties with larger built-up areas for comfort and flexibility.
Number of Rooms:
More bedrooms, bathrooms, or multifunctional spaces add versatility and appeal to different buyer profiles.
Outdoor Space:
Gardens, balconies, terraces, or communal areas in a compound can significantly enhance value.
Compound Size and Facilities:
If the property is part of a compound or gated community, the overall size of the compound and availability of facilities like swimming pools, gyms, parks, or security services can add considerable value.
Layout and Design:
Open layouts, natural lighting, and functional design increase livability and desirability, often influencing the price per square meter.
A larger and well-planned property not only caters to current living needs but also appeals to future buyers, making it a more secure investment.
4. Local Market
Last but not least, you have to consider the local market’s conditions. This may be one of the hardest factors to consider because a market’s conditions are dynamic and a bit hard to predict.
However, you can always seek professional help from property consultants to know what’s expected for the local housing market.
To put that into perspective, let’s consider the current housing market in Egypt. Due to the devaluation of the Egyptian pound, people are putting all their money into real estate. As a result, the real estate industry is booming these days and there is no end to that upwards trend in the near future.
Learn more about the Egyptian real estate industry in
How Did The Recent Devaluation Affect The Real Estate In Egypt?
All these factors you should consider before purchasing a house.
But what if you already have a house and you are considering selling it? What should you do to increase house value?
How to increase your House Value ?
If you already own a property and are planning to sell, it’s not just about maintaining it—it’s about making it irresistible to potential buyers. Here are some actionable strategies to enhance your home’s appeal:
Boost Curb Appeal:
First impressions matter. Make sure the exterior of your house is clean, well-maintained, and inviting. Simple landscaping, a freshly painted front door, and clean walkways can make a big difference.
Stage Your Home:
Arrange furniture and décor in a way that highlights the home’s best features. Neutral colors, uncluttered spaces, and attractive layouts help buyers visualize themselves living there.
Highlight Key Features:
Emphasize unique selling points such as a balcony with a view, a renovated kitchen, or a spacious living area. Consider adding small touches that make these areas stand out.
Professional Photography:
Most buyers start their search online, so high-quality photos can make your property stand out. Consider hiring a professional photographer who knows how to showcase homes effectively.
Ensure Functional and Modern Fixtures:
Buyers notice things like working taps, updated lighting, and modern appliances. Small upgrades like these can make a property feel well cared for and move-in ready.
Create a Welcoming Atmosphere:
Use subtle touches such as pleasant scents, fresh flowers, or soft background music during showings to make your home feel inviting.
Capital Growth vs. Rental Income: Which is Better?
In the end, it is important to note that before making any purchase in the real estate industry, you have to consider the 4 major factors we have covered or you may be stuck with it for life!

===============================================================
New Year’s Eve in Egypt: Top Things To Do In This Magical Night
===============================================================

--- CONTENT ---
New Years Eve in Egypt
Fireworks, balls dropping, and bottomless drinks, the most magical time of the year is upon us. First things first, Happy New Year! 2026 is just around the corner. Did you get your plans ready for the 31st? What are you waiting for? The clock is ticking, let’s find you the best thing to do to celebrate New Year’s Eve in Egypt!
This article will tell you about NYE’s events and activities in Cairo, as well as various destinations where you can spend a magical night in the country.
Top Things To Do on New Year’s Eve in Egypt
Gather up your loved ones, it’s time to celebrate the New Year! Egypt is packed this year with fun activities and wild parties, so no worries whether you want to start your year with the family or you want to kick it off with friends, there are endless options to choose from, and make New Year’s Eve 2026 a memorable one.
1. Catch the Fireworks
It’s widely known that it’s bad luck to start your year with anything besides watching fireworks in awe! So, can you imagine how lucky your year will be if you catch the fireworks show by one of the seven wonders of the world?
Start 2026 on a high note by catching the fireworks show of the Great Pyramids of Giza. If you are a
Pyramids Hills
resident, then you can just watch the show from your terrace.
Other than those lucky ones, you can head to any of the numerous restaurants in
6 October
that directly overlook the Pyramids. The Pyramids of Giza in Egypt will be hosting a grand light and sound show, blending both ancient history and modern celebrations.
Furthermore, you can catch the New Year’s Eve fireworks by the Nile River in Egypt as your backdrop!
2. Wander in ZED Winter Wonderland
New Year’s Eve in Egypt – ZED Park
The famous ZED Winter Wonderland is even more wonderful this time of year! All week, ZED Park (in
ZED Zayed
) is offering fun activities suitable for the whole family. You can join a drum circle, enjoy the carnival rides, get your Christmas shopping done, or just wander around taking in the captivating decorations.
But don’t forget to book your ticket before going!
3. Hit One of the New Year’s Eve Parties & Events
Partying on New Year’s Eve may be the only tradition that the whole world agrees on.
If you are planning to join this tradition, you can catch one of these New Year’s Eve parties and events in Egypt:
Essily and Rahma Haasan in the Concorde El Salam Cairo Hotel’s concert.
Mega stars Carmen Soliman, Hamid El Shaeri, Mohamed Fouad, and Ramy Aiash in the Royal Maxim Palace Kempinski Hotel’s concert.
Medhat Saleh in Theatro Arkan.
Saber El Roubaai in Semiramis’ Cairo Hotel concert.
Boom Room in
Madinaty
, hosting Fares Sokar in a magical musical night.
Disco Arabesquo, an Egyptian-Dutch DJ band, at Cairo Jazz Club, Agouza.

Somabay Red Sea
? Pack up your bags and head out to the unique coastal destination for a special New Year’s Eve celebration by the sea in Egypt.

Somabay is one of the magical destinations to kickstart your 2026! You can:
Indulge in mouthwatering delicacies in any of its eateries, which include L’Emporio Ristorante and Eagles Nest.

Hurghada
, Egypt, adds something special, whether you love adventure or relaxation. It is characterized by beach parties, fireworks, and a festive atmosphere that blends local culture with unforgettable holiday energy.

New Year’s Eve in Egypt – Sharm El Sheikh
Sharm El Sheikh in Egypt is a perfect blend of luxury, nature, and vibrant holiday energy during New Year’s Eve. You will be enjoying pristine beaches, crystal-clear Red Sea waters, and some of the world’s best snorkeling and diving spots among colorful coral reefs.
As the year ends, New Year’s Eve in Egypt would feel extra magical in Sharm El Sheikh, with elegant gala dinners, beachfront fireworks, and festive performances.

With numerous
things to do in Sharm El Sheikh

in Egypt is inviting you to slow down, unwind, and enjoy festive, fine dining on New Year’s Eve. Luxury resorts, vibrant coral reefs, and soothing spa experiences make it an ideal gateway to rejuvenating your body and mind by the end of 2025.

Red Sea Cities
One of the advantages of getting an apartment in a coastal city is the climate. It is not as hot in the summer and not as cold in the winter. As a result, people who live in coastal cities tend to have more pleasant weather year-round.
Another advantage of living in a coastal city is that there are often more opportunities for outdoor activities. This is because there are typically more parks and open spaces near the water. People who live in coastal cities can take advantage of this by going for walks, runs, or bike rides by the water.
If you are someone who loves the beach, then living in a coastal city is definitely for you! You will have easy access to the beach whenever you want, and you can enjoy all sorts of beach activities like swimming, sunbathing, surfing, and more.

Badya Palm Hills Master Plan: Overview

6th October City
.

Before diving into the facilities and other nitty-gritty information, let’s take a look at the Badya Palm Hills master plan:
Badya Palm Hills Master Plan
Badya Palm Hills transcends the idea of a typical green, sustainable residential compound located in a prime area. It represents an entirely new way of living, offering a distinctive residential experience.
Spanning an impressive 3,000 acres, Badya is strategically positioned between East and West Cairo and currently features many phases:
ZOE extension
DAE Badya
District 1
District 6
District 2
Jade Extension
The city of Badya by
Palm Hills
is built upon the philosophy of the 3 C’s:
Conscious (Green City)
Cognitive (Safe and Smart)
Connected (Convenient).
This approach ensures that residents enjoy a harmonious blend of sustainability, safety, and accessibility in their daily lives.
In the next part, we’ll talk about the Badya Palm Hills facilities that make residents live life to the fullest.
Badya Palm Hills October Facilities
Badya October is filled with endless facilities offering residents a comfortable and convenient lifestyle.
One of the highlights is the Palm Hills Sports Club, which is actually the largest sports club in Western Egypt! Spanning over 85 acres, it features multipurpose sports courts that cater to all kinds of activities.
If you’re into horse riding, you’ll love the Badya Stables. They’ve teamed up with the renowned trainer Rob Ehrens to manage top-notch horse riding facilities, including an excellent training area and championship training facilities.
When it comes to sports arenas, Badya has got you covered with four dedicated tracks/areas for gymnastics, swimming pools, and versatile outdoor courts.
For educational pursuits, Badya boasts fantastic institutions such as Badya International University, the British International Kings School, and various nurseries. There’s truly something for everyone in terms of learning!
The courtyards are thoughtfully designed to enhance privacy between neighborhoods while still providing spaces for various activities.
The linear parks offer peaceful, less motorized lanes perfect for leisurely walks. Community parks are great for outdoor fun and bonding time, and don’t forget the Farm, which supplies all of Badya’s organic needs!
For those of you looking to start or grow a business, the business hub provides convenient solutions for any business needs, whether you’re running a small startup or a large firm.
Should you live in New Cairo, where all the hustle and bustle is? Or is it better to live in the suburbs away from the crowds?
Before you rack your brain trying to decide, we have the solution! With the Badya October location, you will get to enjoy the best of both worlds. How? Keep reading to find out!
Badya Palm Hills Location
Bridging the gap between the West and the East, the Badya October location is offering you life with the utmost convenience and comfort. As the compound is ideally located at the gateway between the two sides of the city.

Less than half an hour away from the Pyramids of Giza and the Grand Egyptian Museum

New Capital City

=========================================================
Renting Vs Buying A House: What’s Better For Your Family?
=========================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Renting VS Buying a House
Most recently, because of the inflation waves, many people started to get stuck in the dilemma of renting vs buying a house. Buyers started to weigh their options and think of the renting choice as an out-of-the-box option for a more budget-friendly option.
It is no secret that the economic crisis is affecting everyone across the world, and in Egypt, it has started affecting the way people go on in their lives. For instance, in the past, it was the norm to purchase a house when starting a family. But nowadays, more people are turning to renting as they believe it costs less.
In the short term, sure renting may cost you less, but in the long run, owning a house is the better choice. In this blog, we will give you all the facts you need to know before deciding what’s your best choice.
Renting Vs Buying A House
If you are about to move out and change houses, and you are stuck in the dilemma of renting vs buying the new house, then you should first consider all the options and scenarios of both options.
There are many aspects you need to consider before making the decision of purchasing or renting a property, and to be 100% impartial, we have to say that every decision has its pros and cons. So let’s take a closer look at the 3 main factors that can affect your decision.
Know how to choose your home
1. Cost of Renting Vs Buying
Of course, the cost and budget are the first factor that affects this type of decision. The cost of any real estate property depends on its location, type, size, layout, and finishing. But to put it into perspective, we will assume we are talking about the same property.
If you are renting, then you will have to pay:
Monthly fees (rent)
Monthly maintenance fees
One-time broker fees
One-time security deposit (that you may not get back if there’s any damage to the property)
This means that renting has relatively low initial costs but high recurring costs. On the other hand, if you purchase a property, you have to pay:
A down payment (usually 5-30% of the total cost)
Installments for a specific period of time (usually from 3-10 years)
Maintenance fees (Could be annually or monthly, depending on where you live)
Accordingly, buying has higher initial costs than renting but lower recruiting costs. And don’t forget, in both scenarios, you will be paying monthly fees for a while, but one day that ends if you are buying, and you will end up fully owning your house.
Buying-Vs.-Renting
2. Investment Opportunity
Let’s say you have been renting a house for 10 years. What will you end up with when you move somewhere else? Maybe some fond memories, but surely there will be no monetary value to gain.
However, if you purchase a property and pay installments for 10 years, and then decide to sell it and upgrade, you will not get the total amount you paid back, but there’s a huge possibility that you will profit. How? Simply because the Egyptian real estate market is constantly on the rise.
In other words, purchasing presents a safe and lucrative investment opportunity. You will get to live in a house for years and hold your money’s value. If you play your cards right, our home can be your biggest financial asset!
Learn more about real estate investment Vs inflation
3. Personalization and Customization
Home is where you spend most of your life, so there is a huge emotional aspect that plays a role in these decisions. Of course, anywhere you are with your loved ones will be a warm home. But a place that you decorate yourself and has every piece reflecting your personality will definitely feel more like home than a rented place.
Many people overlook the importance of personalizing a house to their preferences, but that’s where the real difference between a house and a home lies!
Check out New Capital projects
Before hopping onto the conclusion of our article, let us tell you a pro-tip that would help you find the house you would rent more easily: Nawy Keys.

is the latest addition to the family of Nawy’s smart solutions. This service is all about people listing their properties for rent. Through this option, you would be able to find and choose from various choices, the budget, location, and size of the home you need to rent.

Nawy Keys
Bottom Line
Before making a decision, ask yourself, Are you going to relocate any time soon? Do you have savings that you can put into a house? Are you ready to decide on what exact type of property you want now, or do you need more time?
All in all, no one can tell you what the best choice for your family is. You should prioritize your needs, set a budget, and then make your decision. If you need a helping hand, you can always tap on the WhatsApp icon and talk with a Nawy professional property consultant!

Mountain View ICity New Cairo Master Plan
In New Cairo, the Mountain View Icity master plan was developed in collaboration with leading international architects to transform 500 acres into a modern, smart, and nature-infused city.
The design features five elevated islands, each with a distinct theme, connected by a scenic 15 km corniche. This corniche separates pedestrian pathways from the traffic network, ensuring safety and comfort.

Sahel El Shamaly Egypt : Blue Sky And Footprints Of Joy
=======================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Sahel El Shamaly Egypt
As summer arrives, all eyes are on Sahel El Shamaly Egypt, a stunning destination along Egypt’s North Coast. This beautiful area, known for its breathtaking beaches and vibrant atmosphere, raises many questions for vacationers: Where is El Sahel el Shamaly?
How do I go to Sahel from Cairo?
In this blog, we will answer these questions and take you on an exciting journey through North Coast (Sahel El Shamaly, also referred to simply as Sahel). With its powdery white sands and crystal-clear turquoise waters, endless resorts with lavish beach houses, Sahel El Shamaly is the perfect summer getaway for you and your family
Sahel El Shamaly Egypt: Quick Facts
North Coast of Egypt is a renowned summer destination, spanning from Alexandria to Marsa Matrouh over 500 km. It is well-known for its stunning beaches and entertainment venues such as Zahran City Park, M-Porium, and 6ix Degrees.
There are various areas and neighborhoods included in Sahel El Shamaly Egypt. The top areas in North Coast include:
Sidi Abdelrahman
Ras El Hekma
New Alamein
Al Dabaa North Coast
Sidi Heneish
Ghazala Bay
Speaking of the top North Coast areas,
Nawy’s Sahel Map
showcases all the upscale resorts along Egypt’s North Coast. By searching for a specific project, you can easily view its exact location and explore the available properties.
Additionally, the map provides valuable information on the distances between each resort, allowing you to effortlessly plan your travels across North Coast.
How do I go to Sahel from Cairo? It’s 221.5 km via Cairo – Alexandria Desert Road (Coastal International Road)
Here’s another key question: Where is North Coast located?
That’s what we’ll answer below before diving into the neighborhoods and top resorts.
North Coast Location
North Coast is located between Alexandria and Marsa Matrouh. That’s making it a prime spot for beach lovers. It’s just a short 30-minute drive from Alexandria via the International Coastal Road.
Shel El Shamaly Egypt is well-connected, with several major roads traversing El Sahel, ensuring easy access from various locations throughout Egypt.
However, each area in Sahel has endless advantages, from the stunning beaches to the premium location and luxurious resorts that are filled with amenities.
And let’s start with Sidi Abdelrahman.
Sidi Abdelrahman North Coast
Nestled along the unspoiled Mediterranean coastline in Egypt, Sidi Abdel Rahman is a remarkable vacation spot in Sahel El Shamaly Egypt.
This charming destination is celebrated for its easy access via several major routes, including the convenient Wadi El Natroun Road.
Sidi Abdelrahman Map
Whether you’re seeking relaxation by the sea or adventure in the sun, Sidi Abdel Rahman offers the perfect getaway for all.
Sidi Abdelrahman boasts white sandy beaches and some of the most popular destinations. The top Sidi Abdelrahman resorts include but are not limited to:

2. Marassi North Coast
Marassi North Coast is a massive project by Emaar Misr, with a beachfront of 6.5 KM and five beaches that offer unique experiences.
The project also features the largest marina in the Middle East with over 200 berths, an 18-hole golf course, and nine luxurious international hotels with 3300 rooms.
Marassi North Coast Master Plan
To meet people’s needs, the project also includes M-Porium, a recreational area with restaurants, cafes, entertainment venues, and social spaces.
Emaar Misr has put years of experience and unique architectural concepts into the establishment of Marassi, making the largest part of the area dedicated to green spaces and carefully distributing water bodies throughout the village to provide an unparalleled experience for visitors.
3. Stella Sidi Abdelrahman
The last station in Sidi Abd El Rahman is: Stella by Remco Group.
It spans an impressive 550,000 square meters along North Coast, well-designed by the developer, Remco Group to create a state-of-the-art summer retreat.
This resort features a stunning beachfront and offers a wide array of activities, making it the perfect place to connect with loved ones, swim in the crystal-clear Mediterranean waters, unwind, and soak up the sun.
Remco has developed a luxurious selection of beach houses within Stella Sidi Abdel Rahman, including chalets, penthouses, duplexes, standalone villas, twin houses, and townhouses.
Each option varies in size, layout, features, and design, catering to diverse individual needs and preferences.
Whether you seek a cozy retreat or a spacious family home, Stella Sidi Abdel Rahman has something for everyone, ensuring an unforgettable summer experience.
After taking a quick look at Sidi Abdelrahman and the top 3 resorts there, let’s take a look at the stunning Ras El Hekma.
Before heading Sidi Abdelrhman behind and going to the stunning Ras Al Hikma, do you know what to do in North Coast?
Yes, it’s not just about beaches and relaxing!
Read this blog, which will inspire you on how you can spend a memorable summer:
North Coast Egypt What To Do, And Where To Go ?
Ras El Hekma Egypt
Let’s start with the most popular question: What is the Ras El-Hekma project? Ras El-Hekma development project is a collaborative venture between Egypt and the United Arab Emirates (UAE), aimed at constructing a modern, state-of-the-art city in Ras Al Hikma.
This exciting project is strategically located west of Alexandria, nestled between Marsa Matrouh and New Alamein City.
Ras El Hekma Map

Ras El Hekma Egypt
