========================================================
5 Weirdest Houses in the World: One of Them is in Egypt!
========================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Weirdest Houses in the World
We all know what a typical house looks like. Four walls, a roof, maybe a garden if you are lucky. But what about the weirdest houses in the world? Those are the ones that throw the rulebook out the window.
These homes were designed to stand out, spark curiosity, and sometimes make you stop and ask, “
Why not
?” And honestly, they do a pretty great job at it.
Some of these houses are works of art, others are bold experiments, and a few are just wonderfully bizarre.
Either way, they all prove that architecture does not always have to be serious or predictable.
So sit back, relax, and enjoy discovering some of the most unusual and fascinating houses on the planet.
1. House Made From Recycled Materials – Egypt
Want to learn more about the unusual houses in Egypt? Then you should take a look at Taimur’s house.
In 2012, Taimur El Hadidi shocked and impressed the Egyptian people with his creative and innovative mind. He moved from a cramped, small apartment in Zamalek City to a luxurious and spacious home in Zayed City, which is one of the most expensive and elite neighborhoods in Egypt. Let’s know the most important things about Hadidi House:
The house is located in
Sheik Zayed City
.
Construction took 6 years to complete.
It was built with a range of 2500 plastic bottles.
He also used old recycled wood in decorating.
Also, he has already built a state-of-the-art camping site that is ready to welcome tourists and will be continuously improved and upgraded over time.
Unusual Houses in Egypt
2. Keret House – Poland
When it comes to weirdest houses in the world, the Keret House in Poland takes the cake! This ultra-thin house was designed by Polish architect Jakub Szczęsny.
The structure’s widest point measures only 122 centimeters, which is only about 4 feet!
Can you imagine that this weird house is no more than 46 square meters?
The House is located in Poland.
Keret House includes a two-story. The first floor has foldable stairs and the second floor has a kitchen, bedroom, and a mini-fridge.
Despite its small size, the Keret House is fully livable and even has Wi-Fi and a TV.
If you’re ever feeling claustrophobic, this would definitely not be the house for you!
Keret House
3. The Shoe House – Pennsylvania
The Shoe House is a three-story house in Pennsylvania that was built in 1949 by Mahlon N. Haines, also known as the “Shoe Wizard”.
This is one of the most weirdest houses in the world.
The exterior of the house is made to look like a giant boot, complete with laces and a heel. The house has been featured in several news articles and has gained attention from all over the world.
The Shoe House
4. The Upside Down House – Poland
Ever had one of those days where everything feels upside down? In Szymbark, Poland, someone decided to live like that… permanently.
The furniture is on the ceiling, the car is parked on the roof, and visitors leave more confused than when they walked in. Great for Instagram. Not so great for gravity.
The Upside Down House
Fun Fact
:
Tourists often leave dizzy because walking through this place feels like doing yoga in a washing machine.
4. The Flintstones House – Malibu, California
Owned by celebs and inspired by your favorite prehistoric cartoon, this stone-age pad has no straight lines, lots of rock, and zero chance of getting Amazon Prime delivery.
The Flintstones House
5. The Nautilus House – Mexico City, Mexico
It’s one of the weirdest houses in the world. Shaped like a giant seashell, this surreal home looks like it was designed by a mermaid on acid. The inside is full of colorful mosaics, spiral staircases, and plant walls.
Great for sea lovers and people who think homes should double as fairy tale settings.
The Nautilus House
If you think these homes are strange, wait until you see these
real-life haunted houses that will give you the chills
.
Overall
The concept of ordinary houses changed when some people decided they wanted to live in something other than a traditional home.
These homeowners went against the grain and built the weirdest houses in the world and wonderful homes that are truly one-of-a-kind.
If you are one of the boring ones and just want a normal place to call home, Nawy can help with that! Fill out the form below, and one of our property consultants will call you right away to help you find the perfect home (
But not a stranger!
)

silver sands location

Silver Sands location
Established in the most beautiful area that attracts a high number of visitors all year. The resort has a distinctive and strategic location. The Silver Sands location is specifically on Kilo 247 Alexandria – Matrouh desert road (International Coastal Road)
Sidi Heneish Map – Silver Sands location

138 km from
New Alamein
202 km from Borg Al Arab
220 km from Alexandria
360 km from Cairo

Marsa Bagush by Shehab Mazhar

Silver Sands North Coast Master Plan

Silversands North Coast Master Plan
Designed in cooperation with the best architectures and experts with a special keenness on using the latest modern building technologies. The total space of the resort is 506 acres.
The Silversands resort was built according to international standards. Every unit inside the resort has its own share of the beautiful view of the beach.
Silver Sands resort has a neighborhood inside it with the name of Silvertown and it is as beautiful as Silversands.
In the Silvertown phase, you can find numerous clubhouses where you could pass by to have a snack or a cup of coffee during your beach day.
The Entertainment Hub inside Silvertown Resort will allow you to have fun while shopping without leaving the resort.

what to do in North Coast Egypt
What to do in North Coast Egypt? Does that question pester you all summer? We know the struggle, so we are gonna take you on a quick tour of the North Coast and help you find your favorite activities!
Before we go into details about the activities available in the North Coast, it is important to note that by North Coast, we mean the whole area between Alexandria and Marsa Matrouh. That includes Ras El Hekma, El Alamein, and Sidi Abdel Rahman. Now let’s find you some fun things to do in summer 2025!
What to do in North Coast Egypt?
To find the answer to our main question – what to do in North Coast Egypt? – you first have to know what kind of activities are widely available in the area. You are confused? Don’t worry, we will take this step by step!
Your day in North Coast Egypt starts with some
beach activities,
then you can indulge in some
recreational activities
that bring you closer to your family, friends, or loved ones. Of course, a day in the North Coast has to end with some
partying
!

Fouka Bay

Hacienda Bay
)
Enjoy a reenergizing workout with a beach view in Cascadia North Coast
Grab your bicycle and enjoy the fresh breeze of air while cycling alongside the beach

Things To Do With Kids In North Coast

Sandcastle Building

Who can build the tallest tower or the most elaborate castle?
Beach Games
Bring along a Frisbee, beach ball, or kite for some fun games. Playing catch or kicking a ball around is a great way to get everyone moving and laughing. Plus, flying a kite against the backdrop of the sea is always a magical experience!

Of course, swimming is a must!

=====================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Acclaro Silver Sands North Coast

Acclaro Silver Sands North Coast
Silversands is an exclusive coastal destination in North Coast established by Ora Developers. In Silversands there is an even more exclusive gated community – Silvertown. The newly launched phase – Acclaro – is in Silvertown.
A bit confused?
Let’s say it in other words Acclaro sprawls across 22 acres of land in Silvertown which is in Silversands! So just imagine the level of exclusivity you will have in Acclaro Silver Sands North Coast.

Silvertown North Coast Master Plan

Ras El Hekma Projects
Summer life is all about fun, beaches, and refreshing mimosas! Ras El Hekma projects have all that and a lot more! The area has pristine white beaches that offer a whole new level of serenity. In addition to the sandy beaches, Ras El Hekma is well-known for its vibrant nightlife and leisure activities.
In other words, each moment spent in Ras El Hekma is fun, memorable, and one of a kind! To help you find the perfect beach house, in this blog we will present you with the top projects in Ras El Hekma.
Ras El Hekma Projects
Ras El Hekma is basically an extension to North Coast found in the Alexandria – Marsa Matrouh Desert Road. Many of the Ras El Hekma projects were developed by the country’s top real estate names. Accordingly, they offer the utmost level of luxury and convenience in
North Coast
.

Spanning over 294.5 acres in Ras El Hekma, this resort has created a remarkable vacation spot where visitors and homeowners can experience the essence of splendid summers, refreshing sea breezes, and the rejuvenating turquoise waters of the Mediterranean Sea.

5. Solare Ras El Hekma
The last one on the list is Solare Misr Italia Project which spans 386 acres in North Coast. It features a well-designed master plan that optimizes every square meter of the resort. This tranquil paradise offers beach enthusiasts an idyllic summer experience, filled with unforgettable moments.
Misr Italia crafted Solare Ras El Hekma with multiple elevations. The resort comprises 8 levels, each offering an opulent selection of units that showcase stunning sea views.
The project includes a 1 km beachfront, where the mesmerizing azure of the Mediterranean seamlessly blends with its pristine white sandy shores.
Situated 30 meters above sea level,
Solare Misr Italia Resort
ensures that 80% of its units provide captivating water views. The project features a variety of residential zones, catering to diverse preferences.
6. Hacienda West
Hacienda West by Palm Hills Developments covers an impressive 137 acres, and it’s all about perfection! The resort’s master plan is really well thought out, bringing together everything you could want from a branded hotel.
Imagine having a lively community hub, a fully equipped sports area, a gym, delicious restaurants, a fun zone for kids, private lagoons, and even a beach lounge to relax in. It’s designed to make your experience truly special!
7. June Ras El Hekma
Tucked away along the breathtaking coastline of Ras El Hekma, June Resort is truly a top-notch destination that takes luxury and relaxation to a whole new level. Developed by the giant real estate giant Sodic, this incredible project spans over 280 acres in North Coast.
But
June Sodic North Coast
is more than just a spot to unwind or enjoy the finer things in life; it’s packed with amazing facilities, gorgeous views, and a prime location close to other resorts in the area.
Plus, they offer upscale properties for sale that fit a variety of vacationers’ needs and budgets. It’s the perfect blend of relaxation and excitement!

Acclaro Silver Sands North Coast – A Summer Sanctuary
=====================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Acclaro Silver Sands North Coast
Summer is all about fun, serenity, and good times. But unfortunately, North Coast became too crowded in the past summers. Does that mean you have to find a new destination for your summer vacation? Of course not! Nowhere will ever match the beauty of the Mediterranean shores and the vibrant nightlife of the North Coast. That’s where Acclaro Silver Sands North Coast comes in!
The latest phase of Silversnads offers a whole new level of exclusivity. That will allow you to enjoy all the perks of the North Coast without suffering from crowded beaches and noisy areas! In this blog, we will show you everything you need to know about Acclaro Silversands
Acclaro Silver Sands North Coast
Silversands is an exclusive coastal destination in North Coast established by Ora Developers. In Silversands there is an even more exclusive gated community – Silvertown. The newly launched phase – Acclaro – is in Silvertown.
A bit confused?
Let’s say it in other words Acclaro sprawls across 22 acres of land in Silvertown which is in Silversands! So just imagine the level of exclusivity you will have in Acclaro Silver Sands North Coast.
In the next part, we’ll check out the Silvertown master plan and discover some of the amenities offered in both Silvertown & Acclaro Silver Sands North Coast.
Silvertown North Coast Master Plan
Ora Developers constructed Silver Sands Resort over 506 acres of land in the North Coast. It made sure your summer there is like no other, a comfortable one from beginning to end.
The resort may even turn out to be more than a weekend gateway. Silver Sands may end up being your summer escapism, or your forever home.
However, let’s talk bout the Acclaro phase.
Besides the exclusivity, Acclaro offers countless other advantages and access to Silvertown’s endless facilities. Before diving into the Acclaro & Silversands facilities, let’s check the Silvertown master plan:
Silvertown North Coast Master Plan

An 8,000 sqm swimmable lagoon
A clubhouse
Swimming pools
Lush greenery

A 1 km of sparkling beachfront.
2 fancy hotels.
4 social clubhouses.
80,000 sqm swimmable lagoons.
A 10,000 sqm retail area: for an unparalleled shopping experience.
Multipurpose sports courts: so you can stay fit during your stay in the resort.
Open cinemas.
Cultural and artistic spaces.
A luxurious spa, clinics, and health centers.
A wide range of casual food venues as well as fine dining options.
A kid’s area.
With all this in mind, are you ready to get your beach house in Silvertown North Coast?

==============================================
D Bay, Where The Sun Is Your Daily House Guest
==============================================

--- CONTENT ---
D Bay
Summer vacations are always attached to the sun. The sunny weather, getting tanned, and many other activities in which the sun is your best friend. In D Bay which is our topic today, the sun is also your daily house guest. The angular architecture concept that they adopted will give you the maximum amount of fresh air and sunlight. In other words, in D Bay the beach starts from inside your home. Keep reading to get to know D Bay resort and the huge range of amenities they offer.
D Bay
The beachfront gated compound is rolled over a space of 200 acres of land on the North Coast. The first thing you notice about D Bay is how they took advantage of the natural topography of the land in building the properties on different levels to give all the units the same share of the mesmerizing view. Lagoons are the main decoration of the resort as they have a number of swimmable lagoons on each level. The lagoons are extended to your doorsteps so you can have a dip in the water easily. The architecture of D Bay resort is unique as we have mentioned above it will make you feel the beach vibes inside your unit. In addition to the artificial lakes, green landscape, and swimmable lagoons D Bay resort has a wide variety of amenities such as:
A health club with the latest equipment and a spa attached to it.
a wide array of international brand restaurants of high standards.
Wonderful hotel overlooking the sea in a direct way.
A track for a jog or a morning walk.
A surveillance camera system with cameras covering every corner of the compound and a 24/7 patrol.
Properties inside D Bay comes at a wide range of types, spaces, and prices as you can find a portfolio that contains duplex apartments, twin houses, villas, and chalets. In the next part, we are going to know more about properties in D Bay North Coast.
D Bay North Coast prices
Prices in D Bay North Coast varies in a way that you can:
buy a villa with a space of 280 m2 at an average price of 16,064,000 Egyptian pounds.
While with an average price of 48,402,000 Egyptian pounds you can buy a 370 m2 villa.
Chalets in D Bay have a space range from 95 m2 to 155 m2 and a price range from 4,407,000 Egyptian pounds to 19,607,000 Egyptian pounds.
the beautiful twin houses have an average space of 240 m2 and an average price of 12,665,000 Egyptian pounds.
Please note that the prices and spaces of the available units are constantly under update.

Sahel El Shamaly Egypt
As summer arrives, all eyes are on Sahel El Shamaly Egypt, a stunning destination along Egypt’s North Coast. This beautiful area, known for its breathtaking beaches and vibrant atmosphere, raises many questions for vacationers: Where is El Sahel el Shamaly?
How do I go to Sahel from Cairo?

Sahel El Shamaly Egypt: Quick Facts
North Coast of Egypt is a renowned summer destination, spanning from Alexandria to Marsa Matrouh over 500 km. It is well-known for its stunning beaches and entertainment venues such as Zahran City Park, M-Porium, and 6ix Degrees.
There are various areas and neighborhoods included in Sahel El Shamaly Egypt. The top areas in North Coast include:

How do I go to Sahel from Cairo? It’s 221.5 km via Cairo – Alexandria Desert Road (Coastal International Road)

That’s what we’ll answer below before diving into the neighborhoods and top resorts.
North Coast Location
North Coast is located between Alexandria and Marsa Matrouh. That’s making it a prime spot for beach lovers. It’s just a short 30-minute drive from Alexandria via the International Coastal Road.
Shel El Shamaly Egypt is well-connected, with several major roads traversing El Sahel, ensuring easy access from various locations throughout Egypt.

Amwaj Al Sahel

Amwaj Al Sahel
Amwaj Al Sahel is a luxurious seaside resort on the North Coast of Egypt. The resort spans across 360 acres of land and offers a wide range of amenities, including a private beach, swimming pools, restaurants, and entertainment venues. The resort features a variety of accommodations, from cozy chalets to spacious villas. Each unit is elegantly furnished and equipped with modern amenities, ensuring a comfortable stay for guests. The private beach is one of the highlights of Amwaj Al Sahel, with crystal-clear waters and soft white sand. Residents can enjoy a variety of water activities, such as snorkeling, scuba diving, and jet skiing. The resort also offers a variety of dining options, from casual beachside cafes to upscale restaurants serving gourmet cuisine. Entertainment venues include a cinema, bowling alley, and arcade, ensuring guests of all ages have plenty of activities to enjoy.
In addition to its numerous amenities, Amwaj Al Sahel boasts stunning natural surroundings, with lush greenery and beautiful landscaping. The resort is the perfect destination for those seeking relaxation, luxury, and natural beauty in the North Coast region of Egypt.

===================================================
7+ Answers To Your Questions About Egypt’s Monorail
===================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Egypt's monorail
Over the past couple of years, the Egyptian Government has been focusing on revamping the transportation system in Cairo and other parts of the country. This includes the construction of new roads, maintenance of highways, and introduction of brand-new transportation systems. Now let’s take a look at our main event – Egypt’s monorail.
Since the idea of the new monorail was proposed, it has gotten everyone’s attention. This is due to the humongous amount of advantages that will affect the lives of every Egyptian citizen.
Egypt’s Monorail
In 2019, Egypt’s monorail turned from a dream into a reality when the National Authority for Tunnels, in partnership with 3 major construction companies, started putting concrete plans for construction.
The trial operations of Egypt’s monorail started in July 2025, and it was initiated by the line connecting New Capital City and El-Moshir Station.
In March 2026, the monorail officially opened to New Capital.
Egypt’s monorail has 2 lines:
One extending from East Cairo to New Administrative Capital City
One connecting Giza Governorate to
6th of October City
In the next part, we will present you with everything you need to know about Egypt’s new monorail station and how it will make your life more convenient.
1. Why is Egypt building the monorail?
Egypt’s monorail project aims to increase the connectivity between Cairo and new cities (6 October and New Capital). The monorail will also help in decreasing traffic congestion and all related problems.
In simpler terms, Egypt is building the monorail to help citizens have easier and shorter commutes.
2. What are the stations of the monorail’s 1st line (New Capital City)?
The monorail has 2 lines: the New Capital line and the 6 October line. First, the New Administrative Capital line runs for 54 km and links the metro station “Stadium” with
New Administrative Capital
. To be more precise, the monorail New Capital line has 21 stations, which are:
Stadium
Hisham Barakat
Nouri Khattab
The seventh District
Free Zone
Marshal Tantawy
Cairo Festival
El Choueifat
Air Hospital
Al Narges District
Mohammed Naguib
American University
Emaar
Nafoura Square
Al Barwa
Middle Ring Road
Mohammed Bin Zayed
Regional Ring Road
Almasa Hotel
Ministries District
Administrative Capital
New Capital’s Monorail
3. What are the stations of the monorail’s 2nd line (6th October)?
On the other hand, the 2nd line of the monorail (the 6th October city line) is 42 km long and has 12 stations, which are:
Boulak (Gameat El Dewal)
Ring Road
El Marioutia
El Mansouria
Desert Road
Hyperone
Juhayna
Authority of Urban Communities
El Hosary
Dar El Fouad
Industrial Zone
High-Speed Railway
6 October’s Monorail
This line will connect Giza Governorate to 6th of October City and its various recreational destinations.
Where to Go in 6 October?
4. How are the 2 lines of Egypt’s monorail connected?
Using the two lines, you can easily commute from New Capital City to 6 October.
All you have to do is head to the nearest station of Egypt’s monorail ride till the end of the line, so:
If you rode from a New Capital station, then the end is the “Stadium”, you can then take the 3rd line of the metro to the “Boulak” station, and ride the 6th of October monorail.
Whereas if you rode from a 6 October station, then the end is “Boulak”, you can then take the 3rd line of the metro to the “Stadium” metro station and ride the New Capital monorail.
5. When will the monorail open in Egypt?
The trial phase of the New Administrative Capital monorail was in July 2025. In March 2026, it started fully operating in New Capital. The 6 October line is also planned to start operating in 2026.
6. Who is building Egypt’s monorail?
Under the supervision of the National Authority for Tunnels, 3 major construction companies are working on Egypt’s monorail, and they are:
Bombardier Transportation
The Arab Contractors
Orascom Construction
7. How fast is the Egyptian monorail?
The new monorail will run at a speed of 80 km/hr. This means that both lines will be able to transport up to 45,000 people/hour!
Egypt’s monorail will connect Cairo’s cities and Giza’s areas to each other, offering a seamless commute to West Cairo’s residents as well as New Administrative Capital.
With that in mind, living in either East or West of Cairo wouldn’t mean no connectivity.
Top Compounds in 6 October
8. What are the prices of Egypt’s monorail?
The prices are as follows:
7 stations tickets: 15 LE
7 stations: 20 LE
Monthly pass – public: Starting from 390 LE
Monthly pass – elderly: Starting from 275 LE
Capital Train – monthly 3 stations: 300 LE / 7 stations: 500 LE / more than 7 stations: 600 LE
2 lines annual pass: 5100 EGP
3 lines annual pass: 6400 LE
Final Thought
All in all, Egypt’s monorail will positively affect every citizen’s life, thanks to helping shorten commute times. And it will also help people park their cars and forget the hassle of rush hours and being stuck driving all day!
Its prices are considered affordable, guaranteeing hassle-free commuting from East and West Cairo, as well as their central areas.
Living or working in 6th of October City or New Capital wouldn’t mean long hours commuting. Plus, with their top real estate developments, choosing to reside there would be smart.
Nawy’s expert consultants will help find the best property for you in any of Cairo’s top compounds.
Click on the Call button to own your home now.

==================================================
Fouka Bay North Coast Location | Everything Nearby
==================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Summer is finally here, and it’s the perfect time to soak up the sun and hit the beach! When it comes to beach destinations, there’s no place quite like North Coast Egypt. Among its many stunning locations, Fouka Bay stands out as one of the best spots in Sahel. With its beautiful sandy shores, crystal-clear waters, ideal Fouka Bay North Coast location, and vibrant atmosphere, this resort offers an unforgettable summer experience.
Whether you’re looking to relax under the sun, enjoy thrilling water sports, or savor delicious meals at beachfront restaurants, this destination has it all.
So pack your bags, grab your family and friends, and get ready for an amazing summer getaway at Fouka Bay in North Coast.
Fouka Bay North Coast Location
Have you heard about Fouka Bay?
It’s one of the top mixed-use, all-year-round destinations on the North Coast! If you’re looking to experience the magic and beauty of coastal living, then Fouka Bay is definitely the place for you.
What’s even more exciting is that this marvelous resort is a creation of the reputable Tatweer Misr.
However, let’s cut to the chase and talk about the Fouka Bay North Coast location.
Fouka Bay North Coast Location
Fouka Bay location is conveniently at the 211th kilometer of the Alexandria-Marsa Matrouh Desert Road, also known as the International Coastal Road. This prime location offers several advantages:
It’s just 75 km away from Marsa Matrouh.
Located 211 km west of Alexandria.
Only a minute from the newly constructed Fouka Highway, which connects Cairo with North Coast.
Approximately 3 hours away from Cairo.

Seashore Ras Elhekma Location Revealed

--- CONTENT ---
Seashore Hyde Park
Do you want a unique summer experience? What about a cozy summer destination combining a green oasis of lush palm trees and striking bougainvillea shrubs with the stunning seaside and brilliant modern architecture? Yes, exactly, you got it right, we’re talking about Seashore Hyde Park. This article will be your gateway to knowing more about the Seashore Ras Elhekma location, its property types, its amenities, and its price rates. Are you ready?
Seashore Ras Elhekma Location
The renowned developer Hyde Park granted its Seashore project a prime location in North Coast. Being at the heart of Ras El Hekma, North Coast, enables the Seashore Ras Elhekma location to be a connective one.
By this, we mean it’s a connection point between the town and North Coast on the one hand, as well as being a connection point between the resort and other well-known North Coast resorts on the other hand.
The Seashore Ras Elhekma location is exactly at the 214th km of the Alexandria – Marsa Matrouh Desert Road. As well as the 214th Km of Ras El Hekma.
Ras El Hekma Map -Seashore Ras Elhekma location
This ideal Seashore Ras Elhekma location makes it easily accessible and very near to important destinations such as:
Fouka Bay exit, which is 3 km away
El Dabaa Road, which is 52 km away
El Alamein International Airport is 68 km away
Sidi Abdelrahman is 79 km away
Marsa Matrouh Airport is 82 km away
New Alamin exit is 91 km away
Wadi El Natrun Road is 112 km away
Alamin Road is 120 km away
Borg El Arab Airport is 188 km away
Also, this Seashore Ras El Hekma location is near:
Hacienda West
El Masyaf Ras El Hekma
Caesar Sodic
Mountain View Ras Elhikma
La Vista Ras El Hekma
Now that you know the location of your summer destination, let’s talk about the Seashore master plan and what makes this resort stand out.
Seashore Ras ElHekma Master Plan
Hyde Park Developments, in collaboration with EDSA and SB Architects Florida, has carefully designed the master plan of Seashore North Coast Resort to offer you unique vacations.
How? Well, first, it has four elevated platforms. In other words, you will get to enjoy captivating views of the Mediterranean Sea’s turquoise waters and shimmering swimming pools.
Besides the outstanding views, Seashore’s master plan blends elements of nature with modern architectural designs. As a result, the resort offers a unique aesthetic and a relaxing environment.
Bear in mind that the master plan of Seashore North Coast features a myriad of facilities and residential properties, such as:
530-meter beachfront
25+ beach entry swimming pools
Parks and vast greenery
Commercial area
Clubhouses
Lagoons
Cabanas
Chalets
Studios
Townhouses
Duplexes
Standalone villas
Outdoors sports courts
Gourmet restaurants
Hotels
Serviced residences
Storage units
Promenades
Be honest, is there anything else you might ever need on a vacation?
Summer Houses for sale in Seashore North Coast
As previously noted, the master plan of Seashore North Coast Resort has a wide range of summer houses that come in many shapes and sizes.
It’s important to know that 90% of the properties have uninterrupted sea views. The different properties offered by Seashore include twin houses, townhouses, chalets, and standalone villas. The Seashore North Coast price in 2025 depends on the resale and primary units.
Seashore North Coast
The primary unit prices start at 9,100,000 EGP
Meanwhile, the resale unit prices start at 5,600,000 EGP

listings.

: Shopping enthusiasts will love the

: Need a refreshing dip without heading to the sea? The beach pools are ideal!

: Convenience is key, and with ATMs available on-site, you can easily manage your cash needs without any hassle.
Hotel
: For those visiting or looking to host guests, the on-site hotel offers luxurious accommodations.

: Families will appreciate the dedicated kids area, where little ones can play and enjoy themselves in a safe environment. It’s all about fun for the kids while parents relax!

: Enjoy delicious food and refreshing drinks right by the beach! The food and beverage outlets offer a variety of options, making it easy to satisfy your cravings without straying too far from the shore.

: If you’re into sports, the multipurpose courts are perfect for a friendly match or a game with your friends. Whether it’s basketball, tennis, or even a casual game of volleyball, there’s something for everyone.

Clubhouse

Ladies’ Beach and Pool
: For added comfort and privacy, there’s a dedicated ladies’ beach and pool area. It’s a wonderful space for women to relax and enjoy the sun in a comfortable environment.

Sahel El Shamaly Egypt
As summer arrives, all eyes are on Sahel El Shamaly Egypt, a stunning destination along Egypt’s North Coast. This beautiful area, known for its breathtaking beaches and vibrant atmosphere, raises many questions for vacationers: Where is El Sahel el Shamaly?
How do I go to Sahel from Cairo?

Sahel El Shamaly Egypt: Quick Facts
North Coast of Egypt is a renowned summer destination, spanning from Alexandria to Marsa Matrouh over 500 km. It is well-known for its stunning beaches and entertainment venues such as Zahran City Park, M-Porium, and 6ix Degrees.
There are various areas and neighborhoods included in Sahel El Shamaly Egypt. The top areas in North Coast include:

How do I go to Sahel from Cairo? It’s 221.5 km via Cairo – Alexandria Desert Road (Coastal International Road)
Here’s another key question: Where is North Coast located?
That’s what we’ll answer below before diving into the neighborhoods and top resorts.
North Coast Location
North Coast is located between Alexandria and Marsa Matrouh. That’s making it a prime spot for beach lovers. It’s just a short 30-minute drive from Alexandria via the International Coastal Road.
Shel El Shamaly Egypt is well-connected, with several major roads traversing El Sahel, ensuring easy access from various locations throughout Egypt.
However, each area in Sahel has endless advantages, from the stunning beaches to the premium location and luxurious resorts that are filled with amenities.

Marassi North Coast Master Plan

Emaar Misr has put years of experience and unique architectural concepts into the establishment of Marassi, making the largest part of the area dedicated to green spaces and carefully distributing water bodies throughout the village to provide an unparalleled experience for visitors.

How to Travel from Cairo to El Alamein City, North Coast?
=========================================================

--- CONTENT ---
New Alamein City
Are you heading from Cairo to El Alamein and wondering how long the drive is and how to get there? & once you arrive, are you wondering where to stay?
With the revival of El Alamein City, many people are picking it as their next summer spot in North Coast. This blog will tell you all you need to know about the distance, how to go from Cairo to El Alamein, and the city’s best projects.
Distance From Cairo to El Alamein
El Alamein is one of the bewitching spots on the Mediterranean coastline. It extends from the
100th kilo to the 123rd kilo
of the International Coastal Road. The city is 240 km northwest of Cairo.
The distance from Cairo to El Alamein City depends on your original point. If you are heading from New Cairo, it will take you around 3 hours.
If you are heading from West Cairo, such as Sheikh Zayed, to El Alamein, it is around a 2-hour drive.
Additionally, there are several transportation methods that will take you from Cairo to El Alamein City in comfort.
New Alamein City on Sahel Map
How to Reach El Alamein City from Cairo?
There are plenty of transportation methods to go from Cairo to El Alamein, including flights, car-hailing apps, and buses.
El Alamein is around 1 hour away from Borg El Arab Airport, and it is one of the most convenient ways to travel from Cairo to the city. Moreover, you can check the following apps:
Uber, Careem, and DiDi.
Available buses on Swvl from Cairo to El Alamein.
Needless to say, the estimated travel time may differ depending on rush hours, seasons, or any other complications. There are several roads you can take to reach El Alamein from Cairo. Let’s check them out.
Key Roads from Cairo to North Coast
Several roads can take you from Cairo to North Coast, Egypt, and its various areas, including El Alamein.
If you are heading to New El Alamein from Cairo, your best route is Dabaa Road, while:
To
Sidi Abdel Rahman
, the International Coastal Road, also known as Alexandria – Marsa Matrouh Road, is your best option.
To
Ras El Hekma
, take Fouka Road.
To
Sidi Heneish
, take the International Coastal Road.
The Distance From Cairo To North Coast: A Comprehensive Guide
It is also worth noting that the International Coastal Road (Alexandria – Marsa Matrouh Road) and the Dabaa Road can take you anywhere in North Coast.
Ready to enjoy a spectacular summer after traveling from Cairo to El Alamein?
El Alamein City boasts many luxurious resorts with unmatched amenities and high-end units, where you can spend a marvellous escapade.
New Alamein Resorts
Many of North Coast’s top resorts are located in El Alamein City. They were developed by Egypt’s real estate tycoons, boasting many fancy beach houses, world-class services, and top-tier facilities.
Some of the top resorts in New Alamein City are:
Zahra North Coast Resort

El Alamein Towers : Scrapping The Sky On The Seashore
=====================================================

--- CONTENT ---
El Alamein Towers
In 2018, the Egyptian Government initiated the construction of the New Administrative Capital and the New City of Alamein. As part of this development, the luxurious El Alamein Towers were constructed by the Arab Contractors company. These towers boast unique features and specifications that set them apart. Furthermore, the surrounding area has many resorts that offer a variety of amenities and attractions. In this article, we will explore more about the Alamein Towers and a remarkable resort in the vicinity.
El Alamein Towers
The Arab Contractors company is constructing three towers in Alamein New City’s beach area with a total area of 40,000 sqm. Each tower includes a basement, ground floor, mezzanine, and 38 floors with each floor area of about 1,450 sqm. The three towers are connected by a 5-story basement for commercial use, and three industrial lakes surrounding the towers flow into the Mediterranean Sea through three outlets. Bridges for pedestrians and cars do not obstruct the tourist walkway passing in front of the towers.
With directly overlooking El Alamein Towers from one side and the Mediterranean sea crystal water our today’s topic resort has a distinctive view guaranteed, Want to know what resort we are talking about? its Palm Hills New Alamein resort that we will go through in detail in the next section.
Palm Hills New Alamein
When we are talking about Palm Hills New Alamein we don’t know what to start with, is it the distinctive view or the project design? honestly, Palm Hills New Alamein has it all. The resort spans an area of 32 acres of land designed carefully to offer a higher share of the greenery and artificial lakes. The resort has a distinctive view as it overlooks El Alamein Towers from one side and the seashore from the other in a way that makes you feel you are swimming under the Alamein towers’ shadow.

Sahel El Shamaly Egypt
As summer arrives, all eyes are on Sahel El Shamaly Egypt, a stunning destination along Egypt’s North Coast. This beautiful area, known for its breathtaking beaches and vibrant atmosphere, raises many questions for vacationers: Where is El Sahel el Shamaly?
How do I go to Sahel from Cairo?

With its powdery white sands and crystal-clear turquoise waters, endless resorts with lavish beach houses, Sahel El Shamaly is the perfect summer getaway for you and your family
Sahel El Shamaly Egypt: Quick Facts
North Coast of Egypt is a renowned summer destination, spanning from Alexandria to Marsa Matrouh over 500 km. It is well-known for its stunning beaches and entertainment venues such as Zahran City Park, M-Porium, and 6ix Degrees.
There are various areas and neighborhoods included in Sahel El Shamaly Egypt. The top areas in North Coast include:

How do I go to Sahel from Cairo? It’s 221.5 km via Cairo – Alexandria Desert Road (Coastal International Road)
Here’s another key question: Where is North Coast located?
That’s what we’ll answer below before diving into the neighborhoods and top resorts.
North Coast Location
North Coast is located between Alexandria and Marsa Matrouh. That’s making it a prime spot for beach lovers. It’s just a short 30-minute drive from Alexandria via the International Coastal Road.
Shel El Shamaly Egypt is well-connected, with several major roads traversing El Sahel, ensuring easy access from various locations throughout Egypt.
However, each area in Sahel has endless advantages, from the stunning beaches to the premium location and luxurious resorts that are filled with amenities.

2. Marassi North Coast
Marassi North Coast is a massive project by Emaar Misr, with a beachfront of 6.5 KM and five beaches that offer unique experiences.
The project also features the largest marina in the Middle East with over 200 berths, an 18-hole golf course, and nine luxurious international hotels with 3300 rooms.
Marassi North Coast Master Plan
To meet people’s needs, the project also includes M-Porium, a recreational area with restaurants, cafes, entertainment venues, and social spaces.
Emaar Misr has put years of experience and unique architectural concepts into the establishment of Marassi, making the largest part of the area dedicated to green spaces and carefully distributing water bodies throughout the village to provide an unparalleled experience for visitors.
3. Stella Sidi Abdelrahman
The last station in Sidi Abd El Rahman is: Stella by Remco Group.

This resort features a stunning beachfront and offers a wide array of activities, making it the perfect place to connect with loved ones, swim in the crystal-clear Mediterranean waters, unwind, and soak up the sun.
Remco has developed a luxurious selection of beach houses within Stella Sidi Abdel Rahman, including chalets, penthouses, duplexes, standalone villas, twin houses, and townhouses.
Each option varies in size, layout, features, and design, catering to diverse individual needs and preferences.

Sahel El Shamaly Egypt
As summer arrives, all eyes are on Sahel El Shamaly Egypt, a stunning destination along Egypt’s North Coast. This beautiful area, known for its breathtaking beaches and vibrant atmosphere, raises many questions for vacationers: Where is El Sahel el Shamaly?
How do I go to Sahel from Cairo?
In this blog, we will answer these questions and take you on an exciting journey through North Coast (Sahel El Shamaly, also referred to simply as Sahel). With its powdery white sands and crystal-clear turquoise waters, endless resorts with lavish beach houses, Sahel El Shamaly is the perfect summer getaway for you and your family
Sahel El Shamaly Egypt: Quick Facts
North Coast of Egypt is a renowned summer destination, spanning from Alexandria to Marsa Matrouh over 500 km. It is well-known for its stunning beaches and entertainment venues such as Zahran City Park, M-Porium, and 6ix Degrees.
There are various areas and neighborhoods included in Sahel El Shamaly Egypt. The top areas in North Coast include:
Sidi Abdelrahman
Ras El Hekma

How do I go to Sahel from Cairo? It’s 221.5 km via Cairo – Alexandria Desert Road (Coastal International Road)
Here’s another key question: Where is North Coast located?
That’s what we’ll answer below before diving into the neighborhoods and top resorts.
North Coast Location
North Coast is located between Alexandria and Marsa Matrouh. That’s making it a prime spot for beach lovers. It’s just a short 30-minute drive from Alexandria via the International Coastal Road.
Shel El Shamaly Egypt is well-connected, with several major roads traversing El Sahel, ensuring easy access from various locations throughout Egypt.
However, each area in Sahel has endless advantages, from the stunning beaches to the premium location and luxurious resorts that are filled with amenities.

Nestled along the unspoiled Mediterranean coastline in Egypt, Sidi Abdel Rahman is a remarkable vacation spot in Sahel El Shamaly Egypt.
This charming destination is celebrated for its easy access via several major routes, including the convenient Wadi El Natroun Road.
Sidi Abdelrahman Map
Whether you’re seeking relaxation by the sea or adventure in the sun, Sidi Abdel Rahman offers the perfect getaway for all.

2. Marassi North Coast
Marassi North Coast is a massive project by Emaar Misr, with a beachfront of 6.5 KM and five beaches that offer unique experiences.
The project also features the largest marina in the Middle East with over 200 berths, an 18-hole golf course, and nine luxurious international hotels with 3300 rooms.
Marassi North Coast Master Plan
To meet people’s needs, the project also includes M-Porium, a recreational area with restaurants, cafes, entertainment venues, and social spaces.
Emaar Misr has put years of experience and unique architectural concepts into the establishment of Marassi, making the largest part of the area dedicated to green spaces and carefully distributing water bodies throughout the village to provide an unparalleled experience for visitors.
3. Stella Sidi Abdelrahman

This resort features a stunning beachfront and offers a wide array of activities, making it the perfect place to connect with loved ones, swim in the crystal-clear Mediterranean waters, unwind, and soak up the sun.
Remco has developed a luxurious selection of beach houses within Stella Sidi Abdel Rahman, including chalets, penthouses, duplexes, standalone villas, twin houses, and townhouses.
Each option varies in size, layout, features, and design, catering to diverse individual needs and preferences.
Whether you seek a cozy retreat or a spacious family home, Stella Sidi Abdel Rahman has something for everyone, ensuring an unforgettable summer experience.

Let’s start with the most popular question: What is the Ras El-Hekma project? Ras El-Hekma development project is a collaborative venture between Egypt and the United Arab Emirates (UAE), aimed at constructing a modern, state-of-the-art city in Ras Al Hikma.
This exciting project is strategically located west of Alexandria, nestled between Marsa Matrouh and New Alamein City.

What is the distance from Cairo to North Coast?

221.5 km
via Cairo – Alexandria Desert Road.

North Coast is 284.6 km (3 hr ) via the International Coastal Road.

Cairo to New Alamein Towers
is approximately 260.7 km (2 hr 42 min)  via the International Coastal Road ( Cairo – Alexandria Desert Road)

Cairo to Silversands
is 399.3 km (4 hr 13 min ) via the Wadi El Natrun – El Alamein Rd and Alexandria – Marsa Matrouh Rd/International Coastal Rd/Route.

Ras El Hekma
is 359.0 km via Cairo – Alexandria Desert, and the proximity is 3 hr 44 minutes.

Golfing
For golf enthusiasts, North Coast is home to several world-class golf courses. Picture yourself playing a round while enjoying breathtaking views of the sea and beautifully designed landscapes. It’s a fantastic way to unwind and enjoy the outdoors.
Dining Experiences

==============================================
Types of Apartments: Which Suits You the Most?
==============================================

--- CONTENT ---
Types of Apartments
The real estate market in Egypt has evolved significantly over the past decade. From compact studios to sprawling penthouses, and from standalone villas to luxury gated communities, buyers and investors now have a wide array of options to choose from.
With high-end developments emerging across West Cairo, New Cairo, and the North Coast, understanding the different property types is crucial to finding a home that fits your lifestyle, family needs, and investment goals.
In this guide, we’ll explore the main types of apartments, villas, and other residential units in Egypt, their advantages and disadvantages, and the key considerations to help you pick the property that suits you best.
Types of Apartments
Whether you are searching in West or East Cairo, or even along the coastal areas, knowing the different types of apartments and residential units will make your decision easier. The most common types include:
Studios
1, 2, 3-bedroom apartments (and larger)
Duplexes
Penthouses
Lofts
In addition, the real estate market also offers standalone villas, twin houses, and townhouses. There isn’t a “better” option—it all depends on your needs, lifestyle, and budget. Below, we’ll detail each property type to help you make a well-informed choice.
Read This Guide about Property Types in Egypt
Apartments
Apartments are ideal for individuals and families seeking a cozy, low-maintenance home. With 1, 2, or 3 bedrooms, these units are usually safe for children, thanks to the absence of internal stairs, and often come with additional features such as gardens or basements.
Pros:
Lower maintenance costs
Efficient use of space
Safe for children
Some include gardens or basements
Cons:
Less outdoor space compared to duplexes or villas
Limited privacy
Now, let’s learn about duplexes, one of the fancy types of apartments
.
Types of Apartments: Duplexes
Duplex apartments are two-story units connected by an internal staircase. They often include extra outdoor space, such as a small garden, and provide a sense of luxury, privacy, and comfort. Duplexes are perfect for larger families or those who need extra space for a home office.
Types of duplexes:
Horizontal duplexes (side-by-side units)
Vertical duplexes (stacked units)
Pros:
More living space
Privacy for family members
Opportunities for home offices or extra rooms
Often include outdoor areas
Cons:
Higher maintenance costs
More responsibilities compared to single-floor apartments
Types of Apartments – Duplexes
If you are looking for an extra outdoor space, but by the end of the building, penthouses, one of the distinctive types of apartments, would be more suitable for you.
Duplex vs Apartment
While both apartments and duplexes have their advantages, the main differences lie in
space, privacy, and lifestyle needs
. Apartments are generally more compact, low-maintenance, and ideal for smaller families or singles.
Duplexes, on the other hand, provide extra room, multiple floors, and often outdoor areas, making them perfect for larger families or those seeking a more luxurious, private living experience.
Your choice depends on your family size, budget, and lifestyle preferences.
Penthouses
A penthouse unit is one of the types of apartments that are situated on the highest floor of a building. This would grant you the utmost privacy, thanks to its top-floor quality, additional outdoor space (a rooftop), and many are equipped with luxurious features, such as:
Terraces
Pools
Panoramic views
Penthouses
Advantages of penthouses over other types of apartments revolve around:
Privacy
Exclusive amenities
Spaciousness
Attractive real estate investment
High ceilings
On the other hand, purchasing a penthouse means:
Higher purchasing cost
More maintenance costs
Expensive utilities
Learn about Penthouses vs Duplexes
If you’re looking for a smaller property, studio apartments are your go-to!
Studios
Studio apartments are one of the housing property types that offer you coziness, lower maintenance costs, and effort. It is a self-contained living space, encompassing a bedroom, living room, bathroom, and a kitchen, all on one open floor plan.
They usually range between 25 to 70 square meters, which is a perfect choice for a single person. Its compact size grants the space functionality and a minimalistic sense.
Studio Apartment
Types of Apartments: How to Pick What Suits You?
There are several elements to consider to pick the most suitable apartment type for you. They include:
Your lifestyle and needs
Whether you have children or not
If you need a home office
Your budget
Extra costs and utilities
Building amenities
If you need a storage space
For extra features, would you prefer a garden or a rooftop for extra luxury
You also need to consider the finishing type you need.
Finishing Types
Some apartments come with a mere core & shell finishing. Its basic structure is the only thing that was built. Other finishing types include:
Semi-finished (basic walls and systems implemented)
Fully finished, where walls, floors, and fixtures are included. Some also have appliances installed and are ready to be moved in.
Learn more in:
Ultimate Guide to Types of Finishing in Real Estate: Pros and Cons
Many luxurious real estate developments in Cairo have elite apartments of different types and are accompanied by top-tier amenities. Let’s check them out.
Cairo Apartments
If you are heading to West Cairo, you will find various apartments, duplexes, penthouses, and studios in some of the elite gated communities in Egypt, which include:
New Giza Compound 6 October
Badya Palm Hills Compound
Beverly Hills El Sheikh Zayed
Soleya 6 October
Zayed Dunes
Village West
Hills of One New Zayed Compound
Westown Residences
Palm Hills October Compound
Pyramid Hills
The Crown
Top Compounds in El Sheikh Zayed
You can find elegant apartments, duplexes, and more for sale in New Cairo, Mostakbal City, and El Shorouk in the following luxurious compounds:
City Gate New Cairo
District 5 Compound
ZED East
Mountain View ICity New Cairo
Bloom Fields Mostakbal City
Mivida Emaar Misr
The Square Compound New Cairo
Al Burouj Compound in El Shorouk City
IL Bosco City
Acasa Mia
El Patio Casa El Shorouk
The Waterway New Cairo Compound
Taj City New Cairo
Best Compounds in New Cairo
Final Thought
The location is a major element in deciding where to purchase your property. It not only plays an important role in your convenient lifestyle but also makes your unit a smart real estate investment.
Your homeownership journey will be seamless with Nawy’s real estate experts. They will help you pick the most suitable property for you and run your purchasing process with no hassle.

--- CONTENT ---
el alamein for sale

La Vista Bay vs Hacienda Bay : A Two Resorts Comparison
=======================================================

--- CONTENT ---
La Vista Bay vs Hacienda Bay
Over the past few years, the Egyptian real estate market has seen a surge of various developers stepping into the spotlight. Each of these developers showcases high-quality projects, each with its own unique touch. So, when you’re comparing residential or seaside projects, it’s not just about which one is better; it’s really about finding out which one aligns more closely with what you’re looking for. In this article, we’re diving deep into a head-to-head comparison of La Vista Bay VS. Hacienda Bay.
We’ll help you figure out which one is better suited to meet your needs and preferences. Let’s get started!
La Vista Bay VS Hacienda Bay
The question of La Vista Bay vs. Hacienda Bay is a common one among potential buyers and investors. Today, we’re going to explore both options in detail to help you determine which one might be the better choice for you!
Overview of La Vista Bay
La Vista Bay is truly a breathtaking destination, covering 310 acres of lush greenery and stunning water features that resemble a beautiful painting.
La Vista Bay Master Plan
This resort offers a diverse array of commercial and recreational services designed for your enjoyment and comfort.
La Vista Bay Facilities
One of the standout features of La Vista Bay is its variety of swimming pools catering to all age groups.
The resort is adorned with beautiful waterfalls that harmoniously blend into the landscape, providing residents with captivating views everywhere they turn.
A fitness center with modern equipment for those who want to spend a healthy and active vacation.
A wide range of water sports and leisure activities spread throughout the project.
Now it comes to the location, where is La Vista Bay located?
La Vista Bay Location
When it comes to the La Vista Bay vs Hacienda Bay, it’s worth noting that, La Vista Bay has an ideal location right in Al Dabaa, specifically at the 179th kilometer of the International Coastal Road.
Pretty convenient, right?
Plus, it’s just a hop away from Fouka Road and the exciting New Alamein City.
Ras El Hekma Map, ras al hikma, north coast photos

Hacienda Bay is another stunning coastal destination that offers its own unique charm and amenities. Nestled along the beautiful North Coast, it’s known for its luxurious beach houses and world-class facilities.

Things to do in Marassi
Marassi Sidi Abdelrahman is one of the most popular and desirable summer destinations in Egypt. It was developed by the real estate pioneer, Emaar Misr. Located in the stunning shores of
Sidi Abdelrahman
, Marassi offers a 6.5 km stretch of pristine beachfront and world-class amenities that cater to all tastes.
Marina Marassi
If you’re planning a trip and wondering about the best things to do in Marassi North Coast, here’s a list of 10 exciting activities:
1. Relax on Marassi’s 5 Stunning Beaches
Soak up the sun or take a refreshing swim on one of Marassi’s private beaches along its expansive 6.5 km beachfront.
2. Sail and Fish at the Marina
Explore the Marina, one of the largest in the Middle East, with over 200 berths. Whether you love sailing or fishing, it’s a must-visit.
3. Play Golf by the Sea
Tee off at the scenic 18-hole Marassi Golf Course, designed by world-renowned architects – a one-of-a-kind experience with breathtaking sea views.
4. Stay at Luxury Hotels
Enjoy premium hospitality at one of Marassi’s 9 luxurious hotels, featuring over 3,000 elegantly designed rooms and exceptional services.
5. Dine at M-Porium
Visit M-Porium, the vibrant hub of Emaar North Coast that boasts top-rated restaurants and cafes offering cuisines from around the world.
6. Shop High-End Brands
Discover boutique shopping experiences at Marassi’s retail areas, home to global and local fashion and lifestyle brands.
7. Join Beach Parties and Events
Marassi hosts exclusive summer beach parties and entertainment events that attract crowds from across Egypt and beyond.
8. Enjoy Water Sports and Activities
Dive into fun with a variety of water sports such as jet skiing, paddleboarding, kayaking, and more.
9. Take Family Strolls in Landscaped Walkways
Marassi is famous for its lush green landscapes and promenades, perfect for relaxing evening walks with your loved ones.
10. Capture Instagrammable Moments
With its Mediterranean-style architecture, turquoise waters, and vibrant nightlife, Marassi is an Instagram hotspot all summer long

, Hacienda Bay is a staple of luxury vacations in North Coast. The resort is famous for offering some of the best commercial, dining, and entertainment experiences in the area.

Telal Sahel Kilo
“Telal Sahel, in which Kilo?” If you’re wondering about the exact location of this standout resort, you’re not alone. Telal is one of the most remarkable destinations along North Coast, developed by the well-known real estate giant, Roya Developments.
Designed to outshine other resorts in the area, Telal offers a premium mix of comfort, luxury, and top-tier amenities. From beautifully curated properties to a prime, strategic location, this resort has everything you need for a perfect getaway.
Read on to discover which kilo Telal Sahel is located in and get all the details about what makes this resort so special.
Telal Sahel Kilo & Exact Location
Telal Sahel kilo lies exactly at the 143 km point of the Alexandria-Matrouh road. The resort falls on a prime spot in North Coast, close to many important roads and main areas to easily commute back and forth to the resort.
Sidi Abdelrahman – Sahel Map
Telal Sahel’s strategic location is:
2 hours away from the Marsa Matrouh Governorate.
An hour and a half away from Alexandria City.
The Telal Sahel kilo is in very close proximity to the New Alamein Airport.
After knowing the strategic location and the exact Telal Sahel kilo, it is now time to turn our undivided attention to the unique amenities and facilities available in the resort.
Telal North Coast Facilities
The resort spans an area of 390 acres of land in one of the most prime areas in North Coast region.

Top New Cairo compounds

Although New Cairo hasn’t been around for too long, nowadays almost every popular destination is in it. The area features some of the largest residential and commercial projects in the whole country. 1. Palm Hills New Cairo
Palm Hills New Cairo

Check the Palm Hills New Cairo Prices

Egypt New Capital

Egypt New Capital

Everything About Keeva Master Plan
==================================

--- CONTENT ---
Keeva Master plan
Think of a master plan as an artistic vision that defines the entire layout of a residential compound.
It serves as a strategic blueprint that brings together architecture, infrastructure, and amenities in perfect harmony.
Al Ahly Sabbour is a real estate development company renowned for its unique master plans.
In this article, we’ll explore the Keeva master plan, which stands out as one of Al Ahly Sabbour’s masterpiece projects.
Keeva Master Plan
Want to hear the birds chirping in the morning? And enjoy life far from the crowds of the city?
Then life in the countryside will be perfect for you! But that’s easier said than done.
We know that modern life has its perks, and we all have plenty of reasons to stay in the city. What’s the solution? Easy, move to Keeva Compound!
Keeva Master plan
The Keeva Compound by Al Ahly Sabbour is stretched across 144 acres of land in 6th October City.
The first aspect that makes the compound a unique place to live is its ideal location.
Al Ahly Sabbour was keen on offering you the convenience of modern living in Keeva Compound.
Accordingly, the compound is filled to the brim with world-class services and facilities, such as
Commercial area
Outdoor hub for sports
Lush landscapes and greenery
Music hall
Clubhouse
Swimming pools
Spa
Don’t forget that the whole establishment has a state-of-the-art countryside aesthetic!
Besides these top-tier facilities, Keeva has a premium location in Eastern Cairo. Below, we’ll talk about the project’s location.
Keeva October Location
As the prime location of Keeva in
6th October City
allows you to be near numerous facilities and popular destinations yet far from the city’s hustle and bustle.
In other words, you will live conveniently in a quiet environment.
To be more precise, the Keeva Compound is on Waslet Dahshur Road, just
2 minutes from Juhayna Square
7 minutes from Media City
15 minutes from Smart Village
30 minutes from the Downtown
It is also worth noting that Keeva is close to several universities, schools, shopping malls, and hypermarkets.
Keeva Compound is offering a comfortable, convenient, and aesthetically pleasing lifestyle! What else do you need?

=================================
Top 25 New Capital Malls To Visit
=================================

--- CONTENT ---
Top New Capital Malls
Looking to do some shopping? Want to dine out? Or are you a business owner who wants to open a new branch? All this
(and more!)
can be done in New Capital malls!
The fourth-generation city has been under construction for the past couple of years. Yet,  there are already numerous projects operating, including a myriad of shopping malls. In this blog, we will present you with the top malls in the new city.
New Capital Malls
The New Administrative Capital is being developed to become an economic hub for the country and the whole region. Accordingly, there are a large number of New Capital malls developed by some of the most recognizable names in the real estate industry.
Thus, the list of the top 25 shopping malls in New Capital City includes the following:
Nile Business City
Midtown Sky Mall
Vida Mall Downtown
De Joya 1 Strip Mall
Entrada Avenue
31N Commercial Tower
Castle Gate
Pyramids Mall
Atika
Levels Business Tower
6ixty Iconic Tower
Paris Mall
Sofitel Oia Towers
Amazon Capital Diamond Tower
Dorado
El Centro Business Complex
Evora Tower
Moonreal Tower
Oaks Egypt
Ezdan
Mid Tower
The Loft Plaza
Modon Green River Tower
Grand Square Mall
Granvia Mall Serrano
Now, let us pick some of these malls and give you a brief about each, their locations, and the amenities you would find there.
Explore New Capital Projects
Midtown Sky Mall
Midtown Sky Mall
by Better Home is one of the mega shopping malls in New Capital. The mall is located directly on New Capital’s Ring Road in front of Expo City.
This project is created with opulent, wide landscaping areas filled with greenery. This gives the shoppers scenic views to overlook, as well as public gathering spaces. Also, the mall boasts a wide range of high-end dining options offering a unique culinary experience from different worldwide cuisines.
De Joya 1 Strip Mall
De Joya 1 Strip Mall
by Taj Misr Developments is located in a central location in the Eighth residential neighborhood, R8. It is directly in front of Al Setarat Neighborhood and a short drive from Capital Airport and the Government District.
The mall features many upscale facilities, including central air conditioning, many restaurants, cafes, and outdoor and indoor sitting areas. Also, the mall boasts a wide collection of commercial, administrative, and medical properties.
Entrada Avenue
Entrada Avenue by Sorouh Developments
is the shopping mall of Entrada Compound, which is found in R7 of the New Capital.
The Mall is filled to the brim with many high-end facilities and services, offering the visitors of the mall a unique experience. Among the facilities and services offered in Entrada Avenue are various dining options, a spa, a gym, a vibrant boulevard, various piazzas, and outdoor spaces.
Finally, the mall features a wide range of properties for sale, including offices, medical units, and retail spaces.
Pyramids Mall
Pyramids Mall
by Pyramids Developments is a high-end shopping mall located in Downtown, New Capital, in front of Al Masa Hotel.
The project takes the shape of three diamonds rolling over a land area of 44000 square meters and takes up 5 floors plus a ground floor. The mall features many high-end facilities, including food courts, cinemas, an IMAX cinema, hologram show venues, a kids’ area, and lakes.
Finally, this mall has a wide range of retail units of different sizes.
New Capital Malls
Levels Business Tower
Levels Business Tower
by Urbanlanes Development is a top-notch commercial-administrative destination. It enjoys a prestigious location that is only 3 minutes away from Al Masa Hotel and 4 minutes away from the government district and Misr Mosque.
The mall features many high-end facilities, including a sky lounge, a gym, many F&B outlets, shopping stores, and various meeting rooms. This project is created to host high-end office spaces and retail shops.
Check out Best Shopping Malls in Cairo: New Cairo, Zayed, & More
6ixty Iconic Tower
6ixty Iconic Tower
by Al-Borouj Misr Developments Group (ABM) is a 40-floor mixed-use skyscraper located in the Central Business District (CBD) of the New Capital City in plot MU-7CN12.
The mall features many high-end facilities, including supermarkets, F&B outlets, a bakery, a pharmacy, ATMs, and sports club, and a hotel. This project features a wide range of properties for sale, including offices, retail spaces, medical units, and serviced apartments.
Evora Tower
Evora Tower
by RUD Developments is another high-end shopping destination located minutes from Monorel Station.
The mall features a wide range of top-notch facilities and services, including wide landscaping, various F&B outlets, shopping stores, and more. This project boasts a wide collection of high-end offices and retail stores.
Modon Green River Tower
Modon Green River Tower
by Modon Developments is one of the top-notch malls located near the Green River of the New Capital.
The tower is created to be a grand shopping and administrative destination that features a wide collection of offices, retail spaces, and serviced apartments in the hotel featured in the project.
Modon Green River features a wide range of facilities and services, including a leisure area, outdoor areas, F&B outlets, as well as security and maintenance services.
Amazon Capital Diamond Tower
Amazon Capital Diamond Tower
in New Capital City by Amazon Holding is a mega shopping mall located near the Monorail station in New Capital.
It is a huge 64-floor mixed-use development that features many offices and retail spaces of different sizes. The project features a wide collection of premium facilities and services, including various dining venues, shopping stores, ATMs, and many more.
Mid Tower
Mid Tower
by Prime Developments is one of the unique shopping malls in plot MU4-41 in the heart of Central Park in the New Administrative Capital.
The mall features many high-end facilities and services, including a retail area filled to the brim with many shopping stores, many F&B outlets, and many more. This project features many upscale office spaces and retail spaces with various specifications.
A Complete Guide To Egypt New Capital
Unique Selling Points of New Capital Malls
In fact, all the shopping malls in New Capital City have a set of unique selling points that make them an exceptional shopping destination. These points include, but are not limited to, the following:
Ease of access through major roads
Proximity to major cities such as New Cairo
Offering a diverse range of facilities and services that are beneficial for both visitors and employees alike
Top 20 Compounds in Egypt New Capital City
Final Thoughts
By now, you know all about the different malls and shops in the New Administrative Capital, and you also know about the retail, administrative, and medical units available in these malls.
It is now high time you took action. How? Just ask for the help of Nawy.
Nawy is on a mission to help you find the perfect property. So fill out the form now with your contact information to speak with one of our property consultants and find exactly what you need!

===================================================
Telal Soul – A Place That Will Bring Back Your Soul
===================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Telal Soul
Feeling bored?  looking for a place to rejuvenate your soul? Want to experience truly relaxing vacations with the utmost comfort and maximum convenience? Then Telal Soul North Coast is where you need to be.
The high-end establishment managed to combine all aspects of a happy vacation within its gates. Starting from the Telal Soul North Coast location that offers a convenient experience, all the way to the luxurious properties that provide you with a comfortable stay.
Keep reading to learn more about the ideal location of the resort and find the perfect beach house for your family.
Telal Soul Overview
Developed by the real estate tycoon, Roya Developments, Telal Soul North Coast has an ideal location in the North Coast. The prime location will allow you to easily go back and forth from the city to the resort. Before diving into the facilities, master plan and upscale beach houses, let’s check the prestigious location.
Telal Soul is settled at 129 km on the Alexandria Matrouh Coastal Road near El Alamein as an extension of the fabulous Telal North Coast.
Also, it’s nestled amidst breathtaking natural landscapes, offering a serene escape from the hustle and bustle of a busy life over 139 Acres.
Excited to discover the location of the resort?
Telal Soul North Coast Location
Telal has an ideal location in Sahel, and it’s near many key attractions and resorts. The resort’s location is:
It’s only 143 Km from Marsa Matrouh after Amwaaj
And 20 km from Dabaa Axis
Moreover, it’s 35 km from El Alamein City
Additionally, with its luxurious amenities and tranquil ambiance, this idyllic destination allows you to immerse yourself in pure bliss and create unforgettable memories.
Additionally, Telal Soul North Coast location is in close proximity to several other high-end destinations, such as
Zoya Ghazala Bay
Rixos Alamein Hotel
Hacienda Red
Hacienda White
Sidi Abdelrahman – Sahel Map
Wondering what the amenities are? Let’s check it together in the next section.
Telal Northcoast Facilities & Master Plan
Telal Soul has a wide variety of facilities that will really bring back your soul, thanks to
Roya Developments
as they located the resort in such a great place. While we discover the facilities, let’s take a look at the well-planned master plan:
Telal North Coast Master Plan
Also, the resort has a private elevation with lush gardens and a panoramic sea view to making the perfect retreat for those seeking tranquility and natural beauty. It also has:
29,000 square meters swimmable lagoon
The lagoon views can be a unique opportunity for you to connect with nature right at your doorstep.
Swimming pools
Where adults and kids can enjoy their time and make unforgettable memories.
Commercial Area Telalians
Telal also has a commercial area with shops, restaurants, and entertainment facilities where you can find a selection of dining and entertainment options, each offering something special.
Sandy Beach & Aqua Activities
It also offers you the opportunity to relax on the sandy shores or engage in various water sports and activities for both adults and kids.
All units have beach views and clear sea view
So whether you want to dine, shop, or indulge in activities, Telal Soul Roya Developments has you covered!
On this high note, let’s find you the perfect summer house to experience the utmost happiness and tranquility.
Read this blog to know more about the exact location and many more information:
Telal Sahel Location & Kilo Meters Away From Everything
Telal Soul North Coast For Sale Units
The resort offers a variety of resale villas, twin houses, and chalets with private views of the Mediterranean seacoast, with a range of prices starting from 8,642,000 EGP.
The prices differ according to the property type and the size of the unit, as follows.
Telal North Coast Prices 2025
There’s a spacious villa that you can get right now and pay for it later via our exclusive service, Nawy Now. The villa has 7 bedrooms, 9 bathrooms, and a built up area of 345 sqm. The price of this unit is 55,315,465 EGP
Looking for a slightly cozy unit in North Coast? Telal has a chalet which you can get via Nawy Now, too. The chalet features 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and a built up area of 270 sqm. The price of this unit is 32,112,476 EGP.
There’s a twin house with 4 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and a built up area of 180 sqm. The price of this unit is 27,675,000 EGP.
Additionally, there’s a chalet that includes 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a built up area of 121 sqm. The price of this unit is 8,642,000 EGP.
There’s another chalet for sale in Telal Sahel with 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a built up area of 133 sqm. The price of this unit is 12,284,288 EGP.
Moreover, there’s a lavish, slightly smaller chalet in Telal Roya. It has 3 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and a built up area of 127 sqm. The price of this unit is 12,500,000 EGP.
Lastly, there’s a lavish larger chalet in Telal Roya. It has 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and a built up area of 270 sqm. The price of this unit is 16,000,000 EGP.

New Alamein Festival: The Largest Eneterinament Event in 2025
=============================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Planning your summer in Egypt? The New Alamein Festival 2025 is calling your name! This vibrant event is quickly becoming one of the top summer festivals in Egypt, bringing together music, art, fashion, sports, and celebrity entertainment in one unforgettable beachfront experience.
When it comes to the New El Alamein Festival, there are many questions popping up: Where is the New El Alamein Festival held? Is it just for music lovers, or are there other activities?
In this blog, we’ll answer everything you need to know, so keep reading to indulge in an unforgettable experience.
New Alamein Festival Overview
Location of the Festival
Parties Lineup & Ticket Prices
New Alamein City
New Alamein Festival: Overview
New Alamein Festival is one of Egypt’s largest and most vibrant summer festivals, held annually in New Alamein City in North Coast. It’s a multi-week celebration of music, arts, sports, fashion, and family entertainment, attracting hundreds of thousands of visitors from across the region.
United Media Services (UMS) has officially announced the third edition of New El Alamein Festival, scheduled to run from
18 July to 29 August 2025
in New Alamein’s Heritage City.
The parties of the New Alamein Festival 2025 are in the U-Arena. It’s important delighting that,U Arena Alamein is designed to host large-scale events, providing a state-of-the-art experience for attendees
Organized in partnership with Tazkarti, the festival aims to position Egypt’s North Coast as a leading regional hub for arts, culture, and tourism.
What Makes It Unique?
Simply put, the New Alamein Festival North Coast goes far beyond music; it’s a comprehensive cultural platform. Each edition includes:
Live concerts
by top Arab artists (like Amr Diab, Tamer Hosny, Angham, Mohamed Mounir)
Sports competitions
: paddle, triathlons, beach soccer, and car/jet-ski races
Fashion shows
, art exhibitions, and culinary events
Family programming,
such as kids’ zones and the “Nebta” children’s festival
Hosted across open-air beaches and the
new U-Arena concert venue
New Alamein Festival 2025 Location
The annual event will run for 6 weeks in the U Arena, a luxurious new venue located in the district of New Al Alamein City North Coast.
It’s worth noting that, on Sahel map, New Alamein extending from the the 100th km to the 123rd km of the International Coastal Road
New Alamein Festival 2025 Parties Lineup & Ticket Prices
The musical lineup, prices & dates of New Alamein
July 2025
are as follows:
Angham
: On 18 July 2025, prices start from 1000 EGP.
Tamer Hosny ft. Al Shami
: On 25 July 2025, prices will be from 850 EGP.
It’s also worth noting that tickets for the festival can be purchased through the official Tazkarti platform.
U Arena New Alamein
Think we are done? We are not even close!
The New Alamein Festival of 2025 will host numerous other concerts in
August 2025
by other Egyptian and Arab sensations, including
Amr Diab Live
: On 1 August 2025, start from 1000 EGP.
Tamer Ashour Live
: On 8 August 2025, prices start from 800 EGP.
Wegz Live:
On 22 August 2025, prices start from 800 EGP.
Cairokee Live:
On 29 August 2025, prices start from 800 EGP.
Marwan Pablo
: On 15 August 2025, Prices start from 600 EGP
As previously noted, it’s not all about vibrant parties and exciting concerts; the New Alamein Festival has many, many other things to offer you in summer 2025.
What are the events in Alamein Festival?
The organising committee still didn’t announce the exact dates of all events, but in the upcoming days, expect to hear all about it.
Fashion show
Food events
Sports Festival
The Art Festival
Nabta Festival
It is also worth noting that the festival is held in three main areas in New Alamein,
North Coast.
Is it just that the New Alamein Festival is the only option for party lovers? Of course not, North Coast is filled with parties and activities to do.

New Alamein
Home to the famous World War II battle, Alamein City is a global destination. But New Alamein is making headlines for a whole other story. The fourth-generation city is becoming an all-year-round beach destination with plenty of things to do in summer and a serene living experience the rest of the year.
New Alamein
With its ideal location on the Mediterranean, New Alamein has some of the country’s best beaches. And we can’t talk about the advantages of this great city without mentioning the great weather 365 days a year.
All those factors turned New Alamein into a lucrative opportunity for all business owners. That’s why numerous real estate gurus started taking their expertise to establish high-end mixed-use projects in the city.
