Telal Soul – A Place That Will Bring Back Your Soul
===================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Telal Soul
Feeling bored?  looking for a place to rejuvenate your soul? Want to experience truly relaxing vacations with the utmost comfort and maximum convenience? Then Telal Soul North Coast is where you need to be.
The high-end establishment managed to combine all aspects of a happy vacation within its gates. Starting from the Telal Soul North Coast location that offers a convenient experience, all the way to the luxurious properties that provide you with a comfortable stay.
Keep reading to learn more about the ideal location of the resort and find the perfect beach house for your family.
Telal Soul Overview
Developed by the real estate tycoon, Roya Developments, Telal Soul North Coast has an ideal location in the North Coast. The prime location will allow you to easily go back and forth from the city to the resort. Before diving into the facilities, master plan and upscale beach houses, let’s check the prestigious location.
Telal Soul is settled at 129 km on the Alexandria Matrouh Coastal Road near El Alamein as an extension of the fabulous Telal North Coast.
Also, it’s nestled amidst breathtaking natural landscapes, offering a serene escape from the hustle and bustle of a busy life over 139 Acres.
Excited to discover the location of the resort?
Telal Soul North Coast Location
Telal has an ideal location in Sahel, and it’s near many key attractions and resorts. The resort’s location is:
It’s only 143 Km from Marsa Matrouh after Amwaaj
And 20 km from Dabaa Axis
Moreover, it’s 35 km from El Alamein City
Additionally, with its luxurious amenities and tranquil ambiance, this idyllic destination allows you to immerse yourself in pure bliss and create unforgettable memories.
Additionally, Telal Soul North Coast location is in close proximity to several other high-end destinations, such as
Zoya Ghazala Bay
Rixos Alamein Hotel
Hacienda Red
Hacienda White
Sidi Abdelrahman – Sahel Map
Wondering what the amenities are? Let’s check it together in the next section.

Roya Developments
as they located the resort in such a great place. While we discover the facilities, let’s take a look at the well-planned master plan:
Telal North Coast Master Plan
Also, the resort has a private elevation with lush gardens and a panoramic sea view to making the perfect retreat for those seeking tranquility and natural beauty. It also has:
29,000 square meters swimmable lagoon
The lagoon views can be a unique opportunity for you to connect with nature right at your doorstep.
Swimming pools
Where adults and kids can enjoy their time and make unforgettable memories.
Commercial Area Telalians
Telal also has a commercial area with shops, restaurants, and entertainment facilities where you can find a selection of dining and entertainment options, each offering something special.
Sandy Beach & Aqua Activities
It also offers you the opportunity to relax on the sandy shores or engage in various water sports and activities for both adults and kids.
All units have beach views and clear sea view
So whether you want to dine, shop, or indulge in activities, Telal Soul Roya Developments has you covered!

Telal North Coast Prices 2025
There’s a spacious villa that you can get right now and pay for it later via our exclusive service, Nawy Now. The villa has 7 bedrooms, 9 bathrooms, and a built up area of 345 sqm. The price of this unit is 55,315,465 EGP
Looking for a slightly cozy unit in North Coast? Telal has a chalet which you can get via Nawy Now, too. The chalet features 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and a built up area of 270 sqm. The price of this unit is 32,112,476 EGP.
There’s a twin house with 4 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and a built up area of 180 sqm. The price of this unit is 27,675,000 EGP.
Additionally, there’s a chalet that includes 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a built up area of 121 sqm. The price of this unit is 8,642,000 EGP.
There’s another chalet for sale in Telal Sahel with 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a built up area of 133 sqm. The price of this unit is 12,284,288 EGP.
Moreover, there’s a lavish, slightly smaller chalet in Telal Roya. It has 3 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and a built up area of 127 sqm. The price of this unit is 12,500,000 EGP.
Lastly, there’s a lavish larger chalet in Telal Roya. It has 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and a built up area of 270 sqm. The price of this unit is 16,000,000 EGP.

Marsa Baghush Master Plan: Learn More About It
==============================================

--- CONTENT ---
Marsa Baghush master plan
Are you ready to blast off into a vacation experience like no other? Marsa Baghush is ideal for those seeking a place to kick off and unwind. When you examine the Marsa Baghush master plan, you will be astounded by the meticulousness of the design; each inch there will satisfy you.
In this article, we’ll provide you with valuable information about the Marsa Baghush master plan and what this resort has to offer.
Marsa Baghush Master Plan
Marsa Baghush is a high-end summer destination, which was built with a plethora of amenities that will make your summer as comfortable as a cucumber. But, let’s cut to the chase and discover the Marsa Baghush master plan.
Marsa Baghush master plan
As shown in Marsa Baghush master plan, the resort is filled with a vast array of landscapes and water bodies, which offer you a sense of tranquility.
The units are distributed evenly and have a luxurious desig,n offering you a sense of luxury.
The properties outlined in the Marsa Baghush master plan by
Shehab Mazhar
are only a short distance from the shoreline.
Marsa Baghush has a breathtaking 550-meter beachfront.
All of these amenities and more you’ll find within the resort. But wait, there is a lot more to say! In the next part, we’ll highlight the strategic location of the Marsa Baghush North Coast and its benefits.
Marsa Baghush Location
The strategic location of the resort is carefully selected by Shehab Mazhar Company, the developer of Marsa Baghush. This project lies on the 240th km of Alexandria – Marsa Matrouh Desert Road. It has easy access to many attractions and vital places.
In fact, he project is just 12 km from Almaza Bay and 100 km from the amazing resort
Hacienda White

Top 20 Compounds in Egypt New Capital City
==========================================

--- CONTENT ---
Egypt New Capital City
Attention there, those who want to live in a futuristic city and escape the hustle and bustle of Cairo’s downtown. Welcome to Egypt New Capital City where sand meets skyscrapers in unparalleled harmony.
This city is so modern that you might mistake it for a time machine that accidentally zapped you into the future.
With skyscrapers that reach for the clouds and top-notch compounds, you’ll feel like you’re living in a wonderland city (
But it’s better because New Capital City is real!
) Put on your shades and prepare to be dazzled.
Egypt New Capital City
Due to overpopulation in Cairo City, the Egyptian government decided to establish New Capital with the aim of providing people with a high standard of living. As a result, Egypt New Capital City becomes the talk of the town.
One of the most striking things about the New Capital city is its sleek, modern architecture and endless advantages. So, a large number of well-known real estate companies have put their golden mark in the city and developed plenty of top-notch compounds.
Before we dive into these projects and discover the best compounds in New Capital City, let’s take a quick glance at some of the most important information you should know. So, tell us, did you know that:
New Capital City covers 68,000 acres of land
The city includes many vital areas which are: Mohammed bin Zayed, the conference center, the exhibition city, the government district, the residential district, the medical city, the sports city, the central park, and the smart city.
Egypt New Capital boasts a world-class and huge entertainment area.
New Administrative Capital aims to attract about 7 million people in the first phase.
The government district in New Administrative Capital includes 18 ministerial buildings, a parliament
building, a presidential institution building, and a cabinet building.
All of these advantages and more make living in New Capital City a dream of a lot of people (Or all people, to be honest).
In the next part, we’ll highlight the best compounds in Egypt New Capital. So, hold your cold drink, relax, and be amazed.

10 Hot Spots To Hit in Sahel This Summer
========================================

--- CONTENT ---
Hot Spots in Sahel
The weather is getting hotter, and it’s time to leave the city behind and head out to Sahel for some beach fun and all-night parties!
For the past decade, Sahel has become the top destination in Egypt and the region for those who want a fun-packed summer.
Whether you want to dine by the beach or party till the sun comes up, Sahel is where you want to be in any summer. To help you have a memorable summer, we will let you in on some of the best destinations in the North Coast this summer.
Hot Spots in Sahel
What makes Sahel the best destination for your summer vacation?
There are hundreds, if not thousands of reasons why Sahel is everyone’s top choice. But to keep it simple, let’s just say it’s because there is something for everyone.
In other words, no matter what you like to do and what activities you enjoy indulging in while on vacation, the
North Coast
has it covered.
Enough beating around the bush, and let’s take a tour of the hot spots in Sahel this summer!
1. Baia Beach House
Baia Beach House in
Telal North Coast
is calling all bohemians to the dance floor!
The Mediterranean beach restaurant & bar has a state-of-the-art boho style and is open every day for some fun time and exquisite food. It is also worth noting that Baia Beach House regularly hosts themed events and parties.
Baia-Hot-Spots-in-Sahel
2. Casa Noku
Nestled in the
Marassi
clubhouse’s rooftop, Casa Noku offers a one-of-a-kind experience.
The mouthwatering Casa Noku experience is for those who appreciate exotic recipes and live performances. You can dine with your family or friends and enjoy a signature cocktail, all while live performers are rocking the stage!
Casa-Noku-Hot-Spots-in-Sahel
3. Mistiqa Island
Mistiqa-Island
Why drive around all day catching multiple events, when you can have an all-day fun experience in Mistiqa Island?
Located in
La Vista Bay
, Mistiqa Island offers you a unique chance to party all day and night with the mesmerizing Mediterranean as a backdrop. And when you are there, don’t miss out on the food!
4. Surf Camp Egypt
Don’t like sitting around doing nothing all morning? Want to learn something new this summer? Then you should definitely catch some waves and take up surfing with Surf Camp Egypt!
The surfing facility offers classes for beginners and professionals in two locations;
Hacienda White
and Hacienda Red.
Surf Camp Egypt – Sahel Hot Spots
5. Sol Beach Bar
For all the melomaniacs and party animals out there, Sol Beach Bar in Marassi should be on your must-hit list of hot spots in Sahel this summer!
Since its opening last year, Sol Beach Bar has become THE place for those who love a good party by the beach. The venue hosts parties and events with renowned names
(and the coolest DJs)
in the local and global music industry.
Sol-Beach-Bar-Hot-Spots-in-Sahel
6. Kiki’s Beach
Kiki’s Beach is counted among the top hot Sahel spots. Found in two of the most iconic spots, Hacienda White and
Hacienda Heneish
, Kiki’s Beach is one of the premium beach clubs.
The venue hosts a wide selection of vibrant events, in addition to a wide selection of dining options.
Kiki’s Beach Club
7. Massimo Beach Club
Massimo Beach Club is one of the hot spots located in
New Alamein
, Sahel, Egypt. This unique-style beach club features a wide selection of premium amenities.
The Massimo Beach Club also offers a wide selection of lavish dining options besides its vast array of entertainment spots.
Massimo Beach Club
8. Bobos Water Sports Center
Found all over the Sahel, Bobos stands out as one of the unique water sports centers in North Coast. It is found in each of New Alamein and
Ras El Hekma
.
The center offers a wide variety of water activities, including diving, surfing, jetskiing, parasailing, and many more.
Bobos Sahel
9. Karl Beach Club
Karl Beach Club, which is found in each of New Alamein and
Sidi Abdel Rahman
, is another premium beach club that hosts a wide variety of water activities.
In addition to its fun beach sports, Karl Beach Club also features a wide selection of dining options that cater to different tastes.
Karl Beach
10. Lucida Coast Restaurant
Lucida Coast is one of the premium beach restaurants offering a prime dining and entertainment experience in
Hacienda Red
.
This venue is unique for its breezy beach design, multiple offerings, and vibrant entertainment options it offers.
Lucida Coast

================================================
Haptown Master Plan – Everything is Well Planned
================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Haptown Master plan
Haptown Master Plan is one of those well-planned plans
that aims to establish a city that really improves the quality of life for its residents.
The plan includes a comprehensive approach to urban development, focusing on infrastructure upgrades, green spaces, and community engagement.
By combining these elements, the plan seeks to create a vibrant and thriving city that meets the needs of its residents while preserving the environment for future generations.
Ready to get into more details and explore together the master plan of Haptown?
Haptown Master Plan
The Haptown masterplan was planned by the global architectural urban planning organization, CallistonRTKL.
Haptown spreads over 1,035,314 sqm which was good enough to establish this city with world-class standards.
The Haptown is considered to be New Cairo’s latest extension that overlooks the south of Mostakbal Road.
Also, it has a strategic location that is only driving minutes away from the capital’s eastern and Northeastern vicinities.
Moreover, Haptown provides residents with easy access to key areas such as New Cairo and the surrounding neighborhoods.
Everything is only a few minutes away from their front doors, the town’s mixed-use district, its commercial district, and its business center.
When compared to other suburbs, Haptown offers unparalleled suburban convenience with its close proximity to shopping centers, restaurants, and important districts.
Ready to know more about the location?
Haptown Location
The Strategic location was a benefit while planning the Haptown Master Plan as the location ensures a seamless commute to major business districts and vital places nearby as it lies in close proximity to Cairo – Suez and Cairo – Sokhna Highways
It’s also a few kilometers away from:
3km from Madinaty City, 10 minute drive
5.5km from El Fattah El Aleem Mosque, 12 minute’s drive
0.12km from the New Capital, 5 minute’s drive
15km away from Al Rehab City, 20 minutes drive
12km away from Mivida, 25 minutes drive

35km from Cairo International Airport
15km from AUC, 20 minutes drive

also has a wide range of unique selling points, ready to explore them?

New Administrative Capital aims to attract about 7 million people in the first phase.

building, a presidential institution building, and a cabinet building.

El Mostakbal City New Cairo
El Mostakbal City New Cairo was developed on an area of 11,000 acres which is equal to 45 million square meters. The city consists of 5 phases where roads and green areas represent 50% of the total area of the city.
These green spaces provide the perfect tranquil environment for those looking for relaxation away from the hustle and bustle of city life.
Also, it is worth noting that Mostakbal City is the first integrated Mega Green City in New Cairo City, introducing a new concept of modern living.

Mountain View ICity New Cairo Master Plan
In New Cairo, the Mountain View Icity master plan was developed in collaboration with leading international architects to transform 500 acres into a modern, smart, and nature-infused city.
The design features five elevated islands, each with a distinct theme, connected by a scenic 15 km corniche. This corniche separates pedestrian pathways from the traffic network, ensuring safety and comfort.

6 Things To Do In Red Sea El Gouna: Making the Most of Your Day
===============================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Red Sea El Gouna
As you step onto the pristine beaches of Red Sea El Gouna the soft sand caresses your feet, inviting you to unwind and bask in the glorious sunshine. Dip your toes into the crystal-clear waters and feel the gentle waves embrace you, offering a refreshing respite from the heat.
” Am I in the paradise?” You may ask, El Gouna is truly a slice of paradise, dear folks. In this blog, we’ll go over the facilities on offer in Gouna and what it has to offer vacationers.
Red Sea El Gouna
Welcome to the captivating Red Sea El Gouna, where paradise meets adventure. Prepare yourself for a sun-kissed escape filled with endless possibilities and unforgettable experiences.
Let’s start with the fact that El Gouna is an upscale town discovered by Samih Sawiris, Chairman of
Orascom Development Holding
. In no time, Gouna becomes a popular destination for many people who want to spend a memorable beach time.
But here is a key question, ” What to do in El Gouna Egypt?” Great. Below, we’ll answer and explore the best activities you can do in Gouna.
What To Do In El Gouna Egypt
Water Activities:
For the thrill-seekers, a plethora of exciting water activities awaits. Dive into the vibrant underwater world, as you snorkel or scuba dive amid colorful coral reefs teeming with marine life.
Glide across the waves on a jet ski, or try your hand at windsurfing, feeling the adrenaline rush through your veins. The Red Sea is a playground for water enthusiasts, where adventure knows no bounds.
Upscale Dining Options:
After a day of excitement, head off to the upscale restaurants in Red Sea El Gouna.  Savor the fresh catch of the day. Whether it’s a romantic dinner under the stars or a casual beachside feast with friends, every meal is an opportunity to tantalize your taste buds and create cherished memories.
Golf Course:
Immerse yourself in the 18-hole championship golf course, where lush greens and breathtaking views create the perfect backdrop for a memorable game.
Stunning Lagoons:
Explore the calm waters, surrounded by picturesque scenery and a sense of tranquility that rejuvenates the soul.
Family Activities:
Watch as your little ones build sandcastles, splash in the shallow waters, or participate in engaging activities that foster their imagination and creativity.
Entertainment& Events:
As the sun sets, the beach comes alive with entertainment and events that will leave you in awe.
Here’s someone who will ask where is El Gouna. In the next part, we’ll go over the location of El Gouna Egypt.
Where Is El Gouna
El Gouna is 25 kilometers North of Hurghada, it’s near many key places, for instance:
Aqua Palms Resort
Ilona Horse Farm
The Three Corners Hotel
It’s 32 minutes away from Hurghada
The Red Sea El Gouna location is truly unbeatable!
The Gouna beaches are a playground of adventure, relaxation, and endless possibilities. Immerse yourself in the beauty of this coastal paradise, where pristine beaches, thrilling activities, delectable dining options, and unforgettable moments await you at every turn.

Egypt New Capital And Its Unique Attractions
============================================

--- CONTENT ---
New Capital City Attractions
New Capital City has been on the rise lately for its high-end attractions, making it a popular, highly sought-after destination. The New Administrative Capital of Egypt is famous for representing the future of the country as well as being the area that contains all the governmental buildings, upscale residential compounds, and a one of a one-of-a-kind business area.
In this article, we are representing this city with a different approach, as it is not just a secluded city where people could live or do some business, it is also the near future central nerve of Egypt, where everyone hangs out and enjoys different experiences.
So, keep reading this article till its very end to know all about the New Capital City attractions.
Egypt New Capital
Before starting with our different approach to things you can do in Egypt’s New Capital, let’s first have a look at the specifications of the city. The New Capital City isn’t just a place, as it’s a thriving canvas of life and culture spread across 172,000 acres of Egyptian wonder.
As we have mentioned at the beginning of this article, the city is not just a secluded city that lies in the middle of the desert with skyscrapers, as many people imagine; rather, it offers a full, unique life that will soon make it a destination for every citizen, even those who do not live there.
It is worth mentioning here that the city’s development started in 2015 as part of the government’s program of Egypt Vision 2030.
Let us now start diving into the pool of the New Capital City attractions.
Explore top projects in New Capital
New Capital City Attractions
The New Capital City is filled to the brim with many high-end administrative, medical, recreational, commercial, and
educational facilities
. Also, New Capital City is full of great attractions that include but are not limited to:
Central Park
Expo City
Green River
Disneyland
Knowledge City
New Opera House
New International Airport
We will take a glimpse of each in the following sections.
Central Park
Expanding gracefully over 8 kilometers, Central Park is a sprawling and inviting urban oasis sitting on top of the New Capital City attractions and has been thoughtfully designed to cater to your needs for relaxation, leisure, and recreation.
This expansive green haven provides a harmonious blend of serene spaces and vibrant activity zones, offering ample opportunities for you to unwind and engage in various recreational activities in the heart of the bustling city.
New Capital attractions – Central Park
Expo City
A bustling epicenter where innovation and creativity emerge to seize the spotlight. Here, this dynamic urban space becomes the vibrant canvas where new ideas and artistic ingenuity unfurl their colorful wings, captivating the attention of all who encounter them.
Expo City of New Administrative Capital City is intended to be one of the largest and most elite exhibition halls in Cairo.
Know About R7 New Capital
The Green River
Meandering gracefully for a considerable 35 kilometers, provides an uninterrupted and tranquil sanctuary for those seeking a peaceful respite. Its elongated course unfurls as a haven of serenity, weaving through the landscape with a sense of timeless calm.
Also, this Green River sprawls across almost most of the city’s sights, adding to its scenery and connecting the city’s parts.
Disneyland
As a subsidiary of the international amusement park, Disneyland is one of the most remarkable New Capital City attractions that allows you to have all the fun you want with Mickey Mouse, Donald Duck, Goofy, and the other Disney characters without having to travel to London.
This amusement park is intended to be one of the major leisure facilities in the city. Also, it is built to attract tourists to enjoy a unique experience.
Knowledge City
A hub of education that contains top-tier universities, like British Coventry University, the German International University, and the University of Hertfordshire by GAF, opens doors to knowledge.
Moreover, the Knowledge City will also host many institutions, such as the ITI, and many other high-end technological education hubs.
Knowledge City
New Opera House
The New Capital Opera House is a part of the arts and culture city inside the New Capital. It is designed with the latest technologies in the hands of world-renowned architects. The house features three main theaters, and it is expected to host a large number of audience.
Moreover, this new Opera House will host many concert halls that are designed by world-renowned designers.
New International Airport
The Capital International Airport lies 30 km to the east of Cairo International Airport, and it was opened in 2019. It is expected to host up to 300 passengers per hour and is fully ready to receive charter flights.
We cannot talk about the New Capital City attractions without mentioning its top-tier residential areas that are filled to the brim with many high-end residential compounds, which we will explore in the following section.
Capital International Airport
New Capital City Residential Areas
New Capital City is home to many high-end residential projects, especially the residential zones in R7 and R8. Among the residential projects in R7, one would find the following:
Vinci by Misr Italia Properties
Talah by New Plan Developments
Castle Landmark by Cred Developments

Ramatan by Ramatan Developments
Dejoya 2 by Taj Misr Developments

Things To Do In El Gouna Egypt

In El Gouna, you can imagine yourself standing on the shores of the Red Sea, feeling the warm sand beneath your toes and the gentle sea breeze tousling your hair. El Gouna is also known for its tranquil, calm vibes.

El Gouna

activities to do. For example:
Strap on your
snorkeling
gear and delve into a vibrant underwater paradise, where colorful coral reefs and exotic marine life invite you to discover their hidden treasures.

horseback ride
along the pristine coastline. Feel the wind in your hair as you gallop through the golden desert sands or trot along the water’s edge, witnessing the beauty of the Red Sea from a unique perspective.

swimming pools
in Gouna come in varying features and sizes. Every detail has been carefully curated to provide you with an unforgettable experience, where luxury knows no bounds.

Things to do in El Gouna Egypt

Things To Do In El Gouna Egypt
El Gouna is one of the upscale destinations that was developed by Samih Sawiris, Chairman of Orascom Development Holding. The city was originally developed to be a coastal gateway to the Red Sea.
In El Gouna, you can imagine yourself standing on the shores of the Red Sea, feeling the warm sand beneath your toes and the gentle sea breeze tousling your hair. El Gouna is also known for its tranquil, calm vibes.

activities to do. For example:

snorkeling
gear and delve into a vibrant underwater paradise, where colorful coral reefs and exotic marine life invite you to discover their hidden treasures.

horseback ride
along the pristine coastline. Feel the wind in your hair as you gallop through the golden desert sands or trot along the water’s edge, witnessing the beauty of the Red Sea from a unique perspective.

swimming pools
in Gouna come in varying features and sizes. Every detail has been carefully curated to provide you with an unforgettable experience, where luxury knows no bounds.

alive. With a large number of events and entertainment options.

===========================================
El Gouna Owner And The Dream That Came True
===========================================

--- CONTENT ---
El Gouna Owner
In the realm of real estate dreams, where picturesque landscapes meet luxurious living, stands El Gouna – a haven born of the visionary mind of Egyptian entrepreneur Samih Sawiris. This captivating town nestled along the Red Sea’s shores is the result of one man’s vision to craft an earthly paradise, where even the most extravagant dreams find a home. But is he the El Gouna Owner?
That is what we will present to you in this article, so sit comfortably and let’s start the journey.
El Gouna Owner
The Redsea El Gouna is not owned by an individual but rather is a development by
Orascom Development Holding
, an Egyptian multinational conglomerate. El Gouna Owner, Orascom Development Holding, was founded by Egyptian businessman Samih Sawiris, a member of the prominent Sawiris family.
So, from that, we know the El Gouna Owner is indirectly the famous businessman Samih Sawiris, but what is the story of establishing it? Let’s know more.
In 1989, Egyptian entrepreneur and engineer Samih Sawiris made the decision to construct pleasant beach houses, complete with a private marina, primarily for himself and a select group of friends.
Given that the nearest shops, petrol stations, and a hospital were located 25 kilometers away in Hurghada, the idea of establishing a small town began to take shape, and that is what made people think Samih Sawiras personally is El Gouna owner while it is his construction company.
Today, El Gouna is home to over 12,000 residents. The town boasts its:
Airport
18 hotels and resorts operated by international chains
A diverse array of over one hundred restaurants and bars
Two championship golf courses
3 marinas
One of the country’s finest hospitals
Speaking of the El Gouna owner, it’s time to learn more about Samih Sawiris.
Samih Sawiris – El Gouna Owner
Samih Sawiris is the youngest son of the prominent Egyptian construction magnate, Onsi Sawiris.
Samih Sawiris
He currently leads
Orascom Development
, a company known for building and operating resorts in Egypt, Montenegro, and Switzerland.
The company’s earnings took a significant hit following the drop in tourism in Egypt after the political uprising in
2011
, but they’ve managed to bounce back.
This recovery can be attributed to effective cost-cutting measures, the spin-out of its construction business in Egypt, and strategic asset sales.
In
January 2015
, Orascom Development sold
15%
of its subsidiary,
Orascom Hotels & Development
, on the Egyptian stock exchange, which was a significant milestone for the company. They are optimistic that the new regime in Egypt will bring about the stability needed for continued growth.
Additionally, Samih Sawiris owns nearly
10%
of
OCI N.V.
, a major construction company that was founded by his father, Onsi, and is now managed by his brother,
Nassef
.
The Sawiris family, including Onsi, Nassef, and brother
Naguib
, are all recognized as billionaires in the business world.
Also learn about
Naguib Sawiris Biography​: A Story of Resilience
With all that information we had on El Gouna and Samih Sawiris in mind, let’s have a look at the resorts available in it.
Shedwan El Gouna Resort
The project comprises a substantial 419,000 square meters of land, providing ample room for current and future developments to thrive.
Shedwan El Gouna
Shedwan embraces an upscale yet relaxed ambiance. It’s catering to the preferences of many, which is established by the same EL Gouna owner, Orascom Development Egypt.
The Shedwan community fosters connections among like-minded residents through delightful social opportunities and a shared sense of community.
A spacious promenade adorned with a variety of textured trees, flowers, and plants beckons everyone to stroll. It’s a contemplation of the surrounding natural beauty, and even engages in exercise as they go.
Please note that listings & prices are constantly updated.
Shedwan El Gouna Units For Sale
While we have seen Shedwan as an example of El Gouna Redsea resorts, let’s have a look at another one to make the image clearer.
Top Things to Do in El Gouna at Night for a Blissful Experience!

is specially for you to treat your children to a delightful and entertaining kids’ area in Kamaran, El Gouna.

to set aside time for relaxation and personal well-being in the serene yoga area of Kamaran, Gouna.

cairo to el gouna

Orascome Developments, the developer of El Gouna, focused on establishing the resort town in an easily accessible location.
Why?
To make it easy for both guests and homeowners to come and see this one-of-a-kind town. First things first, before diving into the details of the location let’s answer the main question: How to travel from Cairo to El Gouna?
You can travel to Gouna
by bus
through Sakalla Road: The estimated time is 6 hours.
Instead, you can travel from Cairo to Gouna
by car
: The estimated time will be 4 hours and 51 minutes.
Want a quick and easy travelling experience?
Travel by flight
, and the estimated time is 2 hours.
Speaking of the flight, there’s Hurghada Airport – HRG, and this is the nearest spot from Gouna.

El Gouna
is a breeze. With over 60 daily flights coming in from various parts of Europe, Russia, and the Middle East, you’ll find plenty of options to choose from

========================================
When Is The Best Time To Visit El Gouna?
========================================

--- CONTENT ---
Best Time To Visit El Gouna
Asking about the best time to visit El Gouna? You have come to the right place! But before answering your question, let’s tell you some information about Gouna.
El Gouna is a small town that includes a variety of resorts, aimed at providing owners with everything they might need to have unforgettable vacation memories and a unique lifestyle.
In this article, we will give you all the information you need to know about El Gouna, including the best time, location, facilities, and the top projects available.
Best Time To Visit El Gouna
When is the best time to visit El Gouna? Is it in the summer? Or will it be more relaxing in the winter? Today, we’ll give you a detailed answer to your question.
First things first, El Gouna, a beautiful resort town in Egypt, experiences significant temperature variations throughout the year. Here’s a quick breakdown of what to expect:
Temperature Trends El Gouna Weather
: The hottest months are August, July, and June. During early August, temperatures can soar to an average high of 102.5°F (39.2°C), with nighttime lows rarely dropping below 83.6°F (28.7°C)
Humidity and Rain
: For about half the year in El Gouna, the humidity makes the heat feel more intense, but the rest of the year is quite pleasant with a very low chance of rain. The months with the least rainfall are February, April, and June, with the driest period occurring in early January. Conversely, late December sees the highest likelihood of rain.
This is a quick breakdown, but we know that you want more detail; the weather is a key aspect of the vacation. So, take a look at the next section to know what the best time to visit El Gouna.
Weather El Gouna: Breakdown
El Gouna is known for its strong winds, which can enhance the overall experience, especially for water sports enthusiasts:
Summer (July – September in El Gouna)
: During the summer months, temperatures can soar to
40°C (104°F)
, with
August
being the hottest. While the refreshing sea breeze can provide some relief, the heat may be intense for some visitors.
Shoulder Seasons (May, October, November)
: These months strike a perfect balance of warm days, comfortable evenings, and manageable humidity.
May and October are especially vibrant, featuring events like the Sandbox music festival in May and the El Gouna Film Festival in October, making them great times to visit for those who enjoy cultural experiences.
Winter (Gouna in December – February)
: In winter, temperatures rarely dip below
20°C (68°F)
, which is perfect for travellers seeking milder weather. January boasts about
ten hours of sunshine
each day, offering plenty of opportunities for outdoor activities.
February in Gouna Egypt
: If you’re into kitesurfing, February is the month to be in El Gouna, as it experiences the strongest winds, creating ideal conditions for this exciting sport.
After taking a detailed answer on what El Gouna’s weather is, did you want to know about El Gouna Egypt, itself?
El Gouna Egypt
El Gouna beach Houses
El Gouna is a small town that includes a variety of world-class resorts, established by the well-known real estate tycoon Orascom Development. The company focused on providing everything you might need, from a premium location to a variety of facilities, and many projects.
Also, El Gouna Egypt stretches across 10 kilometers of the Red Sea coast, letting you enjoy every moment by the sea.
After mentioning the best time to visit El Gouna let’s explore its strategic location.
El Gouna Location
Orascom Development
chose an ideal location to establish El Gouna as it is:
25 km from Hurghada
A 1-hour flight from Europe’s major capitals
Close to Hurghada International Airport
Also, to enjoy the atmosphere of the Red Sea coast, you need to visit El Gouna in the summertime so you can enjoy all the activities around.
Speaking of El Gouna itself, do you know the Gouna owner? Read this guide to learn more

5 Things To Do In El Gouna Egypt: Dive Into a Sea of Adventure
==============================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Things to do in El Gouna Egypt
Hello there, fellow adventurers and seekers of excitement! Get ready to immerse yourself in the best things to do in El Gouna Egypt. It’s the ultimate playground for thrill-seekers and nature enthusiasts alike.
Whether you’re a land lover or a water enthusiast, El Gouna offers a plethora of activities that will leave you mesmerized and craving for more.
In this blog, we’ll go over the best activities to do in El Gouna and how you can make your vacation there memorable.
Things To Do In El Gouna Egypt
El Gouna is one of the upscale destinations that was developed by Samih Sawiris, Chairman of Orascom Development Holding. The city was originally developed to be a coastal gateway to the Red Sea.
In El Gouna, you can imagine yourself standing on the shores of the Red Sea, feeling the warm sand beneath your toes and the gentle sea breeze tousling your hair. El Gouna is also known for its tranquil, calm vibes.
This breathtaking coastline is your gateway to a world of endless activities and excitement. Here comes the exciting question: ” What to do in Gouna​?” That’s what will be answered below.
El Gouna
Get To Know El Gouna Owner
What To Do In Gouna?
El Gouna has a large number of amazing things and
activities to do. For example:
Strap on your
snorkeling
gear and delve into a vibrant underwater paradise, where colorful coral reefs and exotic marine life invite you to discover their hidden treasures.
On land, a plethora of activities await you. Embark on a thrilling
horseback ride
along the pristine coastline. Feel the wind in your hair as you gallop through the golden desert sands or trot along the water’s edge, witnessing the beauty of the Red Sea from a unique perspective.
Take a refreshing swim in the pool. The
swimming pools
in Gouna come in varying features and sizes. Every detail has been carefully curated to provide you with an unforgettable experience, where luxury knows no bounds.
After a day of adventure, it’s time to
indulge in the culinary delights
that the Red Sea has to offer. Whether you crave traditional Egyptian cuisine or international flavors, the coastal towns are brimming with dining options to satisfy every palate.
As the sun sets over Algouna, the
entertainment scene comes
alive. With a large number of events and entertainment options.
In El Gouna, adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable experiences await at every turn. Whether you choose to explore the land, conquer the waves, indulge in delectable cuisine, or simply bask in the coastal beauty, the things to do in El Gouna Egypt promise to leave you with memories that will last a lifetime.
To be honest, we all visit Gouna to enjoy the water and waves, don’t we? Next, let’s discuss the watersports and other things to do in El Gouna Egypt, available in the town where you can really make a splash.
Gouna Activities
Check Top Gouna Properties
Gouna Water Activities
Above all, Gouna boasts some of the most breathtaking beaches, offering an exceptional experience of the Red Sea. Among the water activities available in Gouna, you can enjoy a variety of thrilling options, including:
Kiteboarding
Kite surfing
Diving
For those seeking more leisurely things to do in El Gouna Egypt, there are boat rides and tube rides, as well as the exhilarating adventure of parasailing and wakeboarding.
Additionally, indulge in the opulence of Luxury Lagoon Cruises that allow you to explore the beauty of the coastline in style.
5 Things to do in El Gouna
We are talking about the activities that you practice in El Gouna, so probably by now you’re wondering about the location of El Gouna. Let’s find out below.
El Gouna Location
El Gouna is located 25 kilometers North of Hurghada. This vibrant place is only a four-hour flight from Europe’s key capitals.
El Gouna Egypt is 39 minutes away from Hurghada International Airport. It’s also near many key facilities:
Aqua Palms Resort
Ilona Horse Farm
The Three Corners Hotel
Gouna : A Comprehensive Guide About Egypt’s Coastal Gem
Are you getting your swimsuit and car ready to hit the road to Gouna and soak up the vibrant atmosphere? Let’s explore some of the best hotels and resorts in Gouna, where you can indulge in luxury while enjoying your vacation.
El Gouna Hotels
Ancient Sands Golf Resort
: A five-star hotel in El Gouna with an impressive 12-hole golf course.
Club Paradisio El Gouna Red Sea
: Beachfront four-star hotel in El Gouna, perfect for families.
Fanadir Hotel
: A peaceful haven with marina views close to El Gouna’s vibrant attractions.
Mövenpick Resort & Spa El Gouna
: A waterfront family-friendly five-star hotel in El Gouna with a private beach.
Captain’s Inn
: An ideally located hotel at the heart of El Gouna Marina. Overlooking luxury yachts and steps away from the resort’s famous restaurants.
Club Paradiso El Gouna Red Sea – El Gouna Hotels
After knowing the top 5
El Gouna hotels, let’s discover the best 10 resorts in Gouna:
Pearl
Fairways
Kamaran
Shedwan Gouna
Miramar Residence
Art Island
The Nines
Ancient Hill
Fanadir Bay
Swanlake El Gouna
Whether you prefer a serene getaway, seeking things to do in El Gouna Egypt, or an action-packed vacation, Gouna’s hotels and resorts offer the perfect blend of relaxation and excitement, allowing you to enjoy the finer things in life during your stay.
Finally
Welcome to the things to do in El Gouna Egypt, where every moment is an opportunity to create memories that will make your heart soar!

What’s Telal Shores Sokhna Price Range?
=======================================

--- CONTENT ---
Telal Shores Sokhna Price

New Mostakbal City

New Mostakbal City
Being the largest planned mixed-use development project in the area, New Cairo Mostakbal City seeks to provide us with some future benefits. These benefits include a diverse range of residential, commercial, and mixed-use projects that cater to the needs and preferences of residents.
Mostakbal City Egypt stretches over a huge area of 11,000 acres, equivalent to 45 million square meters of land. This vast area ensures that residents have access to a wide range of amenities and services nearby.
World-class planning is visible in the project as 50% of the total area represents green areas and roads to promote a healthy and active lifestyle for all the residents.
Al Mostakbal City includes all the needed utilities, from water, sewage, and communications networks to electricity, which aims to provide the main infrastructure of the project.
Mostakbal City includes many world-class projects, each has its unique characteristics and aims at providing a unique living experience to its homeowners.

City Of Mostakbal Egypt
lies exactly on the Cairo – Suez Road between km 46 and km 51 East Cairo. This ideal location makes it only:
15 minutes from the New Capital City

The Easiest Ways to Go From Hurghada to El Gouna
================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Traveling from Hurghada to El Gouna? Your flight will arrive at Hurghada International Airport but you are staying in Gouna? Don’t worry, there are extremely easy ways to get there.
In this blog, we will shed light on the easiest transportation options to El Gouna. And as a bonus we will tell you what to do and where to stay when you are there!
Hurghada to El Gouna
Hurghada Map
The exact distance between Hurghada and El Gouna is 25 km. Accordingly, the easiest way to travel from Hurghada to El Gouna is by car or taxi—the ride will take less than half an hour!
Get suffocated in cars?
No problem, there are plenty of buses and shuttles available to take you back and forth.
Thanks to the close proximity of Hurghada to El Gouna, you can easily enjoy vacations in both!
Although we doubt that when you reach the mesmerising coastal town, you would want to leave. Before diving into the fun part, let’s talk about the exact location of both Hurghada and El Gouna in Egypt
Hurghada Egypt Location
One of the most common questions people ask is, “Where is Hurghada Egypt located?” Well, let us tell you!
Hurghada is situated right on the stunning Red Sea coast of Egypt, making it a premium destination for beach lovers.
Getting to Hurghada is a breeze, thanks to the
Hurghada International Airport
. This airport serves as a major gateway for travelers coming from all over the globe.
Plus, it’s just a short drive from the city center, so you won’t waste any time getting to your hotel and soaking up the sun!
If you’re curious about how far Hurghada is from other popular spots, here’s a quick rundown:
Cairo to Hurghada:
About 455 kilometers away if you take the Hurghada-Al Ismaileya/Hurghada-Cairo Road. The distance can vary a bit depending on your route.
Flight Time
: It’s just a quick 1-hour flight from Cairo to Hurghada—perfect for a weekend getaway!
Sharm El Sheikh to Hurghada
: Hurghada is 816 kilometers from Sharm El Sheikh, another popular Red Sea destination.
Distance from El Gouna to Hurghada
: It’s only 32 kilometers away!
Speaking of El Gouna, let’s know where is Gouna Egypt located.
Gouna Egypt Location
El just a
4-hour flight
from many of Europe’s major capitals! This prime location on the
Red Sea
makes it super accessible, whether you prefer traveling by bus or airplane.
El Gouna is approximately 445 km from Cairo, which translates to about a 5-hour drive. You can easily reach it by car or bus via the Hurghada – Al Ismaileya or Hurghada – Cairo routes.
It’s also just 25 km north of Hurghada. You can get there in about 33 minutes using either the Hurghada – Al Ismaileya Road or the Hurghada – Cairo Road.
So, whether you’re flying in for a quick getaway or planning a road trip, getting to El Gouna is convenient and straightforward!
How To Go From Cairo To El Gouna?
Now, let’s turn to the fun part! What are the best things to do in Gouna? And what are El Gouna’s facilities? That’s what we’ll be talking about below.
Things To Do in El Gouna

El Gouna

Put on your best clothes and dine luxuriously in one of the fine dining venues

============================================================

===========================================
El Gouna Owner And The Dream That Came True
===========================================

--- CONTENT ---
El Gouna Owner
In the realm of real estate dreams, where picturesque landscapes meet luxurious living, stands El Gouna – a haven born of the visionary mind of Egyptian entrepreneur Samih Sawiris. This captivating town nestled along the Red Sea’s shores is the result of one man’s vision to craft an earthly paradise, where even the most extravagant dreams find a home. But is he the El Gouna Owner?
That is what we will present to you in this article, so sit comfortably and let’s start the journey.
El Gouna Owner
The Redsea El Gouna is not owned by an individual but rather is a development by
Orascom Development Holding
, an Egyptian multinational conglomerate. El Gouna Owner, Orascom Development Holding, was founded by Egyptian businessman Samih Sawiris, a member of the prominent Sawiris family.
So, from that, we know the El Gouna Owner is indirectly the famous businessman Samih Sawiris, but what is the story of establishing it? Let’s know more.
In 1989, Egyptian entrepreneur and engineer Samih Sawiris made the decision to construct pleasant beach houses, complete with a private marina, primarily for himself and a select group of friends.
Given that the nearest shops, petrol stations, and a hospital were located 25 kilometers away in Hurghada, the idea of establishing a small town began to take shape, and that is what made people think Samih Sawiras personally is El Gouna owner while it is his construction company.
Today, El Gouna is home to over 12,000 residents. The town boasts its:
Airport
18 hotels and resorts operated by international chains
A diverse array of over one hundred restaurants and bars
Two championship golf courses
3 marinas
One of the country’s finest hospitals
Speaking of the El Gouna owner, it’s time to learn more about Samih Sawiris.
Samih Sawiris – El Gouna Owner
Samih Sawiris is the youngest son of the prominent Egyptian construction magnate, Onsi Sawiris.
Samih Sawiris
He currently leads
Orascom Development
, a company known for building and operating resorts in Egypt, Montenegro, and Switzerland.
The company’s earnings took a significant hit following the drop in tourism in Egypt after the political uprising in
2011
, but they’ve managed to bounce back.
This recovery can be attributed to effective cost-cutting measures, the spin-out of its construction business in Egypt, and strategic asset sales.
In
January 2015
, Orascom Development sold
15%
of its subsidiary,
Orascom Hotels & Development
, on the Egyptian stock exchange, which was a significant milestone for the company. They are optimistic that the new regime in Egypt will bring about the stability needed for continued growth.
Additionally, Samih Sawiris owns nearly
10%
of
OCI N.V.
, a major construction company that was founded by his father, Onsi, and is now managed by his brother,
Nassef
.
The Sawiris family, including Onsi, Nassef, and brother
Naguib
, are all recognized as billionaires in the business world.
Also learn about
Naguib Sawiris Biography​: A Story of Resilience
With all that information we had on El Gouna and Samih Sawiris in mind, let’s have a look at the resorts available in it.

New Capital Second Phase Breaking Ground in 2024
================================================

--- CONTENT ---
New Capital
The new year is already looking bright with the news of the second phase of New Administrative Capital commencing soon. The Administrative Capital for Urban Development (ACUD) recently caused a stir in the market with several updates regarding the new city.
From IPO to new investment opportunities, 2024 is surely looking rewarding.
New Capital Second Phase
Established as a sustainable smart city that would diminish the burden on Cairo, provide a better quality of life for its residents, and offer an abundance of investment opportunities,
New Administrative Capital
has kept the whole region, nay world, on its toes.
The second phase of the city is expected to break ground by the
2nd or 3rd quarter of 2024.
Commenting on that, ACUD’s Chairman – Khaled Abbas – said four international consultancies have submitted their bids for the planning of the second phase of the New Capital. The company is expected to announce the winning consultancy firm shortly.
He went on to add that construction may cost more than the 300 billion due to the surge in prices.
Already the New Capital has created various national and international investment opportunities and the development of the second phase may serve as a strong catalyst for new investments and economic growth.
Learn about the city in
A Complete Guide To Egypt New Capital
ACUD IPO
In other news, ACUD is preparing to enter the Egyptian Exchange (EGX) by the 2nd quarter of the year.
On that note, Khaled Abbass said that the IPO (initial public offering) on the stock exchange will not be less than 5% of the company’s shares, with a minimum value of 150 billion Egyptian pounds.
Bear in mind that the company reported 24 billion Egyptian pounds in profits during the first three quarters of 2023 (19 billion after taxes). This can be a bullish indicator of ACUD’s future in the stock market.

Day Use In El Sokhna
Al Ain El Sokhna is the perfect retreat for those looking to spend some time by the sea, either alone or with their families, and shut down all the noises in their heads for some time.
Here comes the question: Which country is Sokhna in? Ain Sokhna is located in the Red Sea, Egypt. It stretches over a huge area of 17,000 acres of land and includes a range of important destinations and places where you can indulge in new experiences and activities.

Imagine crystal-clear waters with gentle waves of the Red Sea, deep-sea fishing, and a tranquil environment—everything you need to relax and recharge. Ain Soukhna boasts a delightful moderate climate year-round, making it an ideal destination for holidays at any time.

2. Dayra Camp El Sokhna (Day Use)
The journey began in 2015 when the decision was made to leave the city behind and embrace a new way of life. Far from the hectic pace and familiar routines of Cairo, diverse experiences were combined to create a vibrant life amidst the sun-baked mountains of Sinai and the pristine shores of the Red Sea.
Dayra Camp
In this sustainable, environmentally responsible camp lifestyle, a thriving community of musicians, artists, backpackers, and wanderers has come together, all of whom consider Dayra their home, regardless of how long they choose to stay.
At Dayra Camp Sokhna, the owner offers breathtaking sea-view cabins, each with a private bathroom, TV, and AC. Dayra Camp Sokhna prices for the day use are:
Weekdays: 2500 EGP
Weekends (Fri & Sat): 4500 EGP
It’s important to note that prices may vary, so be sure to visit the Dayra Camp website for the latest updates on day-use prices in Sokhna for 2026.
3. Porto El Sokhna
Porto El Sokhna is one of the most popular day-use places in Sokhna, offering luxurious amenities at reasonable prices. Located just 48 km along the Ain Sokhna-Zaafarana Road, it provides an ideal escape for visitors.
There are various lavish facilities, including:
Golf courses
Swimming pools

Private beach
Restaurants
Cafes

La Vista Ray
: This stunning resort offers a blend of modern design and natural beauty, with breathtaking views of the Red Sea. Vacationers can indulge in a variety of amenities, including infinity pools, private beaches, and fine dining options that enhance the overall experience.
La Vista Sokhna

: Known for its lush landscaping and serene environment, La Vista Gardens is a tranquil escape where you can unwind and rejuvenate. The resort features beautifully designed villas and a range of facilities, including swimming pools and wellness centers, ensuring a relaxing stay.

: This resort stands out for its vibrant atmosphere and family-friendly activities. =======================================
Top 10 Things To Do In El Ain El Sokhna
=======================================

--- CONTENT ---
El Ain El Sokhna
El Ain El Sokhna is well known for its sandy beaches, crystal clear waters, and perfect weather 365 days of the year. Over the past decade, the coastal destination quickly became one of the top vacation spots in the country. As it includes a wide array of luxurious resorts and fun activities.
Speaking of activities, Ain Sokhna’s location with mountains on one side and beaches on the other allows it to provide you with distinctive leisure activities that can not be found anywhere else in Egypt! So keep on reading this blog post to learn about the top 10 things to do in Ain El Sokhna!
Things To Do In El Ain El Sokhna
El Ain El Sokhna is a small town overlooking the Gulf of Suez of the Red Sea. It has a prime location, only one hour away from Cairo. Making it the perfect place to go for a quick weekend getaway in the winter or a relaxing summer vacation.
The city boasts sandy beaches with calm warm waters. It’s home to many luxury hotels, resorts, and entertainment facilities.
Most importantly,
Ain Sokhna
has countless leisure and relaxing activities you can indulge in. Enough beating around the bush and let’s take a look at some of the top things to do in El Ain El Sokhna!
10 Things To Do In El Ain El Sokhna
1. Dive or Snorkel & Explore the Waters
Whether you are a professional diver or a beginner, you can enjoy a day of scuba diving at Ain Sokhna.
Bear in mind that El Ain El Sokhna is one of the top areas for diving in Egypt, nay the country. As the city is famous for its marine life and the abundant Coral Reef systems.
And if you are a beginner, don’t worry, there are several learning centers where you can dive with professionals and learn from the best.
Afraid of diving?
Don’t love the deep waters?
You are not alone, many think diving is a hard activity to master. But that doesn’t mean, you can’t explore the waters; you can simply go snorkeling.
Snorkeling is way easier than diving. In fact, you don’t have to train whatsoever. Just get the gear, choose a spot filled with beautiful scenery, and take a deep breath!
2. Enjoy Water Sports
For sea lovers, El Ain El Sokhna offers a variety of water sports activities. You can try windsurfing, kitesurfing, parasailing, or jet skiing.
Many resorts have water sports centers where you can rent equipment and receive training if you’re new to the sport.
Insider’s note: the winds and calm waters make it an ideal spot for windsurfing and parasailing!
Want to enjoy a water activity without getting wet? Then fishing it is!
You can either rent a boat for a deep-sea fishing experience or fish from the shore. Various resorts organize fishing trips where you can catch a variety of fish like sea bass, snapper, and barracuda.
This activity is perfect for those looking to enjoy the serenity of the sea while also catching fresh fish. What’s better than catching your own dinner?
3. Explore The Desert With A Safari Trip
Take a trip into the desert surrounding Ain Sokhna for a thrilling desert safari. Many local operators offer safaris by quad bikes, 4×4 vehicles, or even camel rides.
A desert safari will give you a chance to experience the stark beauty of the Egyptian desert, with activities like dune bashing, sandboarding, and camping under the stars.
Some tours include Bedouin-style dinners where you can enjoy traditional Egyptian food in a desert setting.
4. See El Ain El Sokhna From Above
Nothing is more fun than catching a glimpse of a beautiful destination from an airplane. But now you don’t have to take an airplane for that, in El Ain El Sokhna you can get a bird’s eye view of the whole area while enjoying a fun ride in the cable cars.
Things To Do In El Ain El Sokhna – Cable Cars
There are several destinations where you can enjoy a cable car ride including the famous
Porto Sokhna Resort
.
5. Have an Adrenaline Boost
Head out to
Il Monte Galala
and embark on a one of a kind adventure filled with adrenaline and memorable moments. You can indulge in a number of adrenaline-pumping activities including but not limited to:
Hiking
Rope climbing
Mountain biking
Camping
6. Go Sightseeing Near El Ain El Sokhna
Monastery of Saint Paul
While Ain Sokhna is primarily known for its beaches and resorts, it also has several nearby historical and cultural attractions that are worth exploring:
Monastery of St. Anthony: About 2.5 hours from El Ain El Sokhna lies the ancient Monastery of St. Anthony, one of the oldest Christian monasteries in the world, dating back to the 4th century.
Monastery of St. Paul: Located near St. Anthony’s Monastery, St. Paul’s Monastery is also an ancient religious site with its roots in early Christianity.
7. Take A Boat Tour
Boat tours and yacht cruises are a great way to experience the scenic beauty of Ain Sokhna’s coastline. Some boat tours offer the chance to go snorkeling at remote coral reefs, while others provide a more relaxing experience with stunning sunset views.
Private yacht rentals are also available for those looking to spend a day on the sea with friends or family.
8. Golf
Things To Do In Ain Sokhna – Golfing
Some of Ain Sokhna’s luxury resorts, like
Jazz Little Venice,
have world-class golf courses. If you’re a fan of golf, you can enjoy a round in a beautiful setting, with views of both the mountains and the Red Sea.
The golf courses in El Ain El Sokhna are designed to be challenging but enjoyable for players of all skill levels. It’s a great way to relax and enjoy the area’s natural beauty.
9. Party Till The Sun Comes Up
While Ain Sokhna is often seen as a quiet, relaxing retreat, many resorts and private beaches host beach parties and nightlife events, especially during weekends and holiday seasons.
These parties typically feature live DJs, music, and dancing, set against the backdrop of the Red Sea.
The combination of music, dancing, cocktails, and the gentle sea breeze makes these parties a great way to spend your evening after a day of relaxation or exploration.
10. Pamper Yourself With A Spa Day
Nothing says relaxing vacation more than a spa day! You will find an array of world-class spas and wellness centers all over El Ain El Sokhna.
You can enjoy massages, facials, and body treatments designed to help you relax and rejuvenate. After a long day of swimming or exploring, a spa session is the perfect way to unwind. Some resorts also offer yoga classes, steam baths, and wellness programs focused on mindfulness and relaxation.
Each of these activities in Ain Sokhna offers a different way to enjoy this versatile destination, whether you’re looking for adventure, relaxation, or exploration.
Read this guide to learn about the best places to go in Ain Sokhna:
Your Guide To A Well Spent Day Use In El Sokhna
Enjoy A Luxurious Stay in El Ain El Sokhna
Why keep driving back and forth for short stays when you can get a vacation house and enjoy unlimited vacations whenever you have some free time?
As previously noted, El Ain El Sokhna is home to an array of high-end resorts established by some of the region’s top developers. To keep this long list short, here are some of the top resorts where you can find the perfect beach home in.

by Roya Developments

Final Thoughts
There are many other activities you can do in El Ain El Sokhna, you can spend your days, shopping, swimming, or working out by the beach. Whatever you like to do, you can find the perfect place for it in El Sokhna.

Amwaj
Wondering where is Amwaj located? Or what does its master plan include? That’s what we will answer today! Amwaj North Coast Map
The leading real estate company, Al Ahly Sabbour Developments, carefully chose the location of Amwaj in a prime location in North Coast map. This strategic location is easily accessible through a number of highways and is near several other high-end destinations.
To be precise, the Amwaj North Coast location is in the heart of Sidi Abdel Rahman at the 136th kilo of the International Coastal Road. This ideal location is 25 km from Alamein Road and 30 km from Dabaa Road.
Additionally, Amwaj North Coast is a stone’s throw away from:
Seashell
Hacienda White
Stella Heights
Marassi
Telal North Coast
Zoya
Sidi Abd Elrahman Area

The resort features more than 38 swimming pools and a private ladies’ beach and pool so women can tan and take an enjoyable dip freely.
It also includes a 1200 sqm beachfront.
There are kids’ areas and Aqua Kids in the Amwaj North Coast Project so all family members, including the little ones, enjoy an unforgettable vacation.
There is a wide range of restaurants and cafes in the project with mouthwatering dishes and a fine dining experience.
The resort also includes an interactive fountain.
There is a Rivette Mall in Amwaj with many retail and shopping options.
The project includes a mosque and a supermarket as well.
Amwaj features a clubhouse where you can spend some tranquil time or make summer friends.
There is a football court in the project too.
Amwaj includes many services as well such as facility management and security.

=============================================================
7 Amwaj North Coast Things To Do To Have a Memorable Vacation
=============================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Amwaj north coast things to do
Can you feel it in the air? That buzz of excitement and anticipation? Yes, the summer season is finally here, and it’s time to let loose, soak up the sun, and dive headfirst into the beachy paradise that awaits! And when summer is upon us, the North Coast becomes the talk of the town. And it’s a no-brainer thing that Amwaj comes to the top of the best summer destinations list. Things to Do in Cairo During Ramadan
To enjoy the vibrant Ramadan atmosphere in Cairo, there are several things to do and places to visit, such as:
Al-Hussein Mosque
Mosque of Imam Al-Hussein stands as a pivotal Islamic landmark nestled in the vibrant heart of Islamic Cairo. Renowned as one of the holiest sites in the country, it attracts a diverse array of visitors, including both locals and tourists, particularly during the sacred month of Ramadan.
During Ramadan, the mosque transforms into a hub of spiritual activity and communal celebration. The atmosphere is imbued with a profound sense of devotion as worshippers gather for prayers and reflections.
The mosque’s historical significance, coupled with its architectural beauty, enhances the experience for those who visit.
2.
Khan el-Khalili
The proximity of Al-Hussein to the bustling Khan el-Khalili bazaar further enriches the experience, allowing visitors to immerse themselves in the cultural vibrancy of Cairo while engaging in the spiritual practices that Ramadan inspires
As the sun sets and the call to prayer resonates through the air, the mosque and Khan el-Khalili bazaar become a focal point for iftar gatherings, where families and friends come together to break their fast.
This blend of religious observance and cultural celebration makes them a must-visit destination during Ramadan, offering a unique glimpse into the rich tapestry of Egyptian Islamic traditions.
Khan el-Khalili
3.
Al Moez Street
Transforming into a bustling, illuminated center with nightly cultural performances and historic surroundings, Al Moez Street is a perfect and traditional destination to enjoy an amusing Ramadan night.

Walk of Cairo for the Utmost Fun
If you are thinking of heading West, Walk of Cairo should be your top choice. It includes a variety of unusual things to do and entertaining venues to visit in Egypt such as the Museum of Illusions and FLY – Trampoline Park.
FLY is the biggest outdoor trampoline park in Egypt, offering you an adrenaline rush beyond comparison. It includes a wide range of fun activities, such as Ninja Challenge, Basket Hoops, Dodgeball Mid-air, Spider Wall, Donut Slide, Performance Trampoline, and Free Jump Area.
Walk of Cairo
also exhibits one of the best and most unusual destinations in Egypt, the Museum of Illusions, with a variety of unbelievable things to do. Experience illusion rooms, mind-bending installations, mind-altering holograms, and more when you visit the museum.
Sky Park in Beverly Hills
Things to Do in Egypt
The sky has no limit, and that’s the best feeling to ever experience! Sky Park in Beverly Hills includes a set of professional obstacle courses elevated on three levels, and guess what? It becomes more challenging when you head up higher.
Furthermore, if there are young humans included in the outing, they will enjoy an unforgettable time as Sky Park features a special route with obstacles tailored to match their age.
BreakOut Egypt in New Cairo
The last destination on our list of unusual things to do in Cairo is BreakOut Egypt. Unveil your inner detective instincts in a real room escape experience. You and your friends are locked inside a themed room where you need to use your intellect to escape it by solving puzzles and finding clues in only 1 hour!
Read in:
Top Things To Do In New Cairo
El Gouna – Adventures by the Sea
El Gouna is Egypt’s modern playground for those who love the mix of adventure, water, and sunshine. Beyond its lagoons and luxury marinas, it offers a variety of exciting activities that are anything but ordinary.
Kite Surfing & Water Sports
Things to do in Hurghada
El Gouna is one of the world’s most famous kite-surfing spots. Whether you’re a beginner or a pro, you can experience thrilling rides over the Red Sea’s turquoise waves. The area also offers wakeboarding, diving, and paddleboarding lessons for all levels.
Electric Scooter and Lagoon Tours
Explore the vibrant streets and waterfronts on an electric scooter, or rent a small boat and cruise through the lagoons. It’s a fun, laid-back way to see the town and its colorful architecture.
Alexandria – Where History Meets Modern Fun
Alexandria offers a refreshing mix of culture and entertainment, making it one of the best destinations for unique outings.
The Graffiti & Art Trail Alexandria
Wander through Alexandria’s hidden alleys in Mansheya and Raml Station, where walls are covered in stunning graffiti and murals. It’s a walking gallery of urban art that captures the city’s creative spirit.
Stanley Bridge Alexandria
Stanly Bridge Alexandria
Take a relaxing evening stroll across Stanley Bridge, enjoy the sea breeze, and end your walk with ice cream from one of Alexandria’s beloved local shops. It’s a simple pleasure that never gets old.
Montazah Adventure Park Alexandria
Located within the Montazah Gardens, this family-friendly spot offers outdoor games, go-karts, and mini-golf surrounded by lush greenery and royal history.
Hurghada – Beyond the Beaches
Hurghada is often known for its crystal-clear waters, but it also hides some thrilling and unusual activities for adventure lovers.
Submarine and Glass-Bottom Boat Rides
Dive beneath the surface without getting wet by joining a submarine tour or a glass-bottom boat trip. You’ll see colorful corals, tropical fish, and maybe even a sea turtle or two.
Desert Safari & Bedouin Evenings
For a completely different experience, ride a quad bike across the desert, watch the sunset over the dunes, and enjoy a traditional Bedouin dinner under the stars. It’s one of the most memorable experiences the Red Sea has to offer.
It’s Time to Experience Egypt Differently
It’s time to share these destinations with your circle, unleash your inner adventurous self, and experience fun at its finest! Whether you’re seeking an adrenaline rush like no other or wanting to solve riddles with your friends, our list covers it all.
From Cairo’s urban adventures to Alexandria’s coastal charm and El Gouna’s seaside thrill, Egypt is full of surprises waiting to be discovered.

Walk of Cairo
6 October and Sheikh Zayed have become some of the top residential areas in Cairo, nay, Egypt. And with more residents flooding in by the minute, more things to do in the West of Cairo appear. So whether you are a resident of the area or just want to hang out there, this guide is for you.

Top Things To Do in West of Cairo

6th of October City
.

3+ Family Houses Pros & Top Exclusive Family Compounds

The Family Houses
Let’s talk about the heart and soul of every family – Their houses! Family houses are the backdrop to life’s most cherished moments.
The abodes hold so much more than just walls and a roof. They’re a sanctuary of love, laughter, and countless memories. Whether it’s the cozy nooks where bedtime stories are shared or the kitchen where delicious family recipes are concocted, it’s all about the family house.
So, grab a cup of tea, kick back, and let’s dive into the warm world of family houses and why they hold such importance in our lives.
The Story Behind Family Houses
Before diving into the details of the advantages of family houses, let’s ask: What is a family house?
A family house is more than just a structure that accommodates multiple individuals who typically make up a family. It comes in various sizes, ranging from single-level to multi-story, often with up to three above-ground floors.
But what are the benefits of the family houses? That’s what we’ll be talking about in the next parts.
1. Affordability
Let’s face it, finding an affordable living option in today’s world can feel like finding a needle in a haystack, right? But fear not!
By sharing expenses, such as mortgage payments, utility bills, and maintenance costs, families can significantly reduce their financial burden. Also, with our exclusive service, Nawy Now, you can move right now and pay later, offering you extra smoother payment.
Move now with Nawy Now
2. Develop Relationships
The family houses act as nurturing grounds where bonds are formed, memories are created, and love is shared.
The shared spaces and proximity within these homes foster a sense of togetherness that is hard to replicate elsewhere. In a family house, you’ll never have to face life’s ups and downs alone because your loved ones are always just a few steps away!
3. Expansive Land Area
Imagine living in a spacious home with many rooms, many bathrooms, and a wide terrace or balcony. It’s like a haven for those who want to live in spaciousness and still enjoy the warm, cozy atmosphere.
Family Friendly Compounds
4. Higher Return On Investment (ROI)
Family house is not just about creating a loving home; it’s also a savvy financial decision. They tend to have a higher return on investment (ROI) compared to other types of properties.
This means that when the time comes to sell or rent out your family house, the potential for a profitable return on your investment is significantly higher.
Especially if your abode is in a prestigious area, such as the top 4 Egyptian areas for investment that were shining in 2023 and will continue until 2024, and in the future.

North Coast map
As summer arrives, the conversation inevitably shifts to one topic: Where exactly is the North Coast located? And if we choose to spend our summer there, what are the best resorts? Today, we’ll provide you with a comprehensive guide to each area and project in the North Coast.
So, sit back, relax, and grab your favorite iced drink as we take you on a journey to discover the exact North Coast map.
North Coast Map
Stretches from Alexandria to Marsa Matrouh covering an area of 500 SQ KM, North Coast is well-known for its pristine beaches, great climate, and accessibility making it one of the most sought-after destinations for the big names in the real estate industry.
And with these tons of amazing projects, you may find yourself caught up in endless options, potentially missing out on the joy of the season while collecting information about North Coast destinations. But fear not!
We are here to put an end to your search. Let’s start our tour with
Ras El Hekma
, the jewel crown of the North Coast.
Ras El Hekma

5 Facts About Master Plan Solare Misr Italia
============================================

--- CONTENT ---
master plan Solare Misr Italia
Welcome to Solare Resort in the North Coast, where luxury meets nature in perfect harmony! This stunning resort is the perfect place to escape the hustle and bustle of the city and unwind in style. Master plan Solare Misr Italia will provide you with all you need to know about this remarkable place.
So, relax, grab your pen, and let’s explore the resort from the endless amenities to the available properties.
Master Plan Solare Misr Italia
Misr Italia Properties established its amazing project – Solare Resort- in the stunning Ras El Hekma Area with an aim to make this spot the best summer destination.
From the moment you arrive, you’ll be struck by the beauty of the surroundings and the attention to detail that has gone into every aspect of the resort! The resort is situated on a sprawling 386 acres of land, with 1 KM of beachfront.
Now, let’s show you the master plan of Solare Misr Italia and take a tour of the resort.
Master Plan Solare Misr Italia
Firstly, as shown in the master plan Solare Misr Italia, the water features and landscapes are all around the project to deliver a sense of tranquility.
In the Solare Misr Italia, there is a 5-star beach hotel with unmatched views and world-class hospitality.
Furthermore, in the master plan Solare Misr Italia there is a beach sports area where you can push your adrenaline to the max.
Additionally, there is a public lagoon beach with crystal clear water.
Last but not least, there is a beach club where you can gather your family or friends to spend some quality time while you enjoy the sea view.
But it’s not just the master plan Solare Misr Italia that makes the Resort special. It’s the attention to detail that has gone into every aspect of the resort! As mentioned in the master plan Solare Misr Italia, the project is filled to the brim with endless facilities.
Below, we’ll touch on these amazing facilities and what makes Solare stand out.
Solare North Coast Facilities
But we know you must be thinking I can relax in any resort. So the question here is; what makes Solare a unique destination? This can be a very long list but we know time is precious so here are some of the top reasons that make Solare stand out.
Landscapes and nature views
Swimmable lagoons
Organic water features
A clubhouse with an artificial beach
Private lagoons
World-class sports area with football pitches, tennis courts, multipurpose courts, and F&B outlets
A vast commercial area with an Italian design
Beach Clubhouse
Boutique hotels
Multiple pool experiences
Kayaking and non-motor boats
Kids’ areas
Fine dining restaurants
Moreover, one of the greatest advantages is its prime location. So, below we’ll highlight the Solare North Coast location and its benefits.
Solare North Coast Location
The giant company Misr Italia Properties has strategically chosen an ideal spot for the Solare North Coast Resort. Solare is located in
Ras El Hekma Area
which is considered one of the most popular destinations in North Coast City.
Ras El Hekma Location
The resort is exactly on the 199 km of Alexandria-Matrouh road. And it’s:
3 hours away from Cairo City.
2 hours away from Alexandria City.
40 min away from Sidi Abdelrahman Area.
62 kilometers away from the Hacienda White resort.
In close proximity to Caesar Hotel.
All of these advantages make Solare North Coast a desirable spot for many vacationers. Want to be a part of this iconic waterfront community? So, let’s take a glance at the properties for sale in Solare North Coast.
Solare North Coast Units
The properties of Solare North Coast combine luxurious architecture and stunning views. They are divided into cabins, chalets, twin houses, townhouses, and standalone villas.
Prices of these primary units start at 9,500,000 EGP. Meanwhile, there are resale properties for sale starting at 6,977,495 EGP. Depending on the features, layout size, delivery date, and location of each available property the prices are set.
Please note that the prices and spaces of the available units are constantly updated.
Check Solare’s Latest Listings
Overall
Whether you’re looking for a place to call your summer home or just a temporary escape from reality, Solare Resort is the perfect choice.
With its stunning location, thoughtful master plan, and endless amenities, it’s the ideal place to relax, recharge, and reconnect with nature.
