Silvertown North Coast Everything You Need To Know
==================================================

--- CONTENT ---
Silvertown North Coast is one of Ora’s premier projects nestled along the stunning shores of the Mediterranean Sea. This remarkable destination has quickly become a favorite among North Coast enthusiasts, thanks to its prime location and an impressive array of services and facilities.
The Resort is not just luxurious; it’s a haven of elegance with breathtaking direct sea views. With endless facilities premium location, a wide array of beach houses for sale, and stunning views.
Today, we’ll dive deeper into this exceptional resort and discover what makes it stand out above the rest.
Silvertown North Coast
Have you ever wondered, what are the most beautiful villages in North Coast? It’s a question many vacationers are asking, and one standout that keeps coming up is Silvertown North Coast.
This project is truly unique and exudes sophistication!
Developed by Ora Real Estate Development Company, Silvertown spans an impressive 197 acres.
It boasts beautiful views of the Mediterranean Sea, while the beach houses overlook lush green spaces – talk about a perfect blend of nature and luxury!
However, what does the Silvertown North Coast master plan include? That’s what we’ll be talking about in the following lines.
Silvertown North Coast Master Plan
Let’s talk about the master plan for Silvertown North Coast. As we mentioned above Silver Town spans a massive 197 acres, this resort is designed with European standards in mind, showcasing the innovation of the developer, Ora.
Silvertown Master Plan
As you explore the master plan, it’s thoughtfully designed with beautiful spaces that really cater to your needs.
As a haven for premium indulgence, Silver Sands Project is for the creme da la creme of the community. In other words, you will be surrounded by like-minded people! There is an ever more exclusive gated community within Silvertown Silversands.
Silvertown & Silversands North Coast Facilities
The amenities of Silvertown & Silver Sands North Coast include but are not limited to:
1-km beachfront
Clubhouses
Open cinemas
Nightlife venues
Cultural and artistic spaces
Spa, clinics, and health centers
Lagoons
Kids’ area
Boutique hotel
Commercial areas
This means that you can spend all your days in Silvertown Silversands enjoying a bunch of different activities. But let’s be honest every once in a while, you would want to get out and have some fun somewhere else. That’s not a problem! Thanks to Silver Sands prime location you can go back and forth easily.
Silvertown Ora Location
Picture embarking on a trip, windows down, wind tousling your hair as you cruise along the well-equipped highways. Silvertown Silver Sands North Coast location makes it easily accessible ensuring you’ll have a smooth and convenient arrival.
But let’s be more accurate.
Silvertown is a phase within the mega project Silver Sands North Coast. This project is exactly located at kilo 247 Alexandria – Marsa Matrouh Desert Road. It has easy access to many key cities and attractions. The resort is 138 km away from New El Alamein City.
Silvertown North Coast Location
It’s also 202 KM from Borg El Arab Airport in Alexandria, additionally, the Silver Sands North Coast location is 370 km from Cairo City.
Moreover, the project is just a few minutes away from:
Sidi Hanish
Sidi Abdel Rahman
Ras El Hekma Bay
It’s worth noting that, a luxurious summer is ahead of you in Silvertown Silversands North Coast Resort, with a wide range of elite properties for sale!
Silvertown Ora Properties For Sale
Ora Developers built a broad array of properties for sale in the project including apartments, standalone villas, twin houses, townhouses, duplexes, penthouses, and chalets.
The price range of the resale units for sale starts at 17,206,950 EGP. Do you want to take a look at some of the available properties and their prices? Then take a look at the next part.
Silvertown Silversands Prices
Here’s the updated Silvertown North Coast prices:
There’s an apartment with 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a built up area of 127 square meters. The price of this unit is 19,026,350 EGP.
Moreover, there’s a standalone villa that includes 3 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and a built up area of 208 square meters. The price of this unit is 45,121,675 EGP.
There’s a townhouse with 3 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, and a built up area of 169 square meters. The price of this unit is 30,980,290 EGP.
Lastly, there’s a chalet with 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a built up area of 177 square meters. The price of this unit is 19,400,000 EGP.
Please note that the prices and spaces of the available units are constantly updated.
For the latest update of the price list, please check out the
Silvertown Silversands
listings.
After talking about the Silvertown North Coast phase, it’s time to check the Silversands Resort itself.
Silversands North Coast
Silver Sands in Sidi Heneish North Coast—it’s really something special!
This project by Ora Developers spans an impressive 506 acres and is designed to be your go-to summer resort, a super easy weekend getaway, and a fabulous year-round destination.
Silversands North Coast
What makes Silver Sands truly unique is that it aims to be “the Egyptian rendition of Grenada’s Silversands,” all while capturing the essence of that luxurious Caribbean lifestyle.
You can really see this vision reflected in every aspect of Silver Sands, from its endless amenities to its prime location and premium properties.
Whether you’re looking for a place to unwind or a fun spot for adventures, Silver Sands has got you covered. It’s all about enjoying life to the fullest in a stunning setting that feels like a slice of paradise.
So, if you’re dreaming of a beautiful getaway, Silversands by Ora might just be the perfect fit!
But Silversands has many other phases, did you know that?
In the next parts, we’ll touch on each exceptional phase and what makes it stand out above the rest.
Crystalline Silversands
Let us tell you about this incredible place called
Crystalline
. Imagine 506 acres of pure paradise, and right at its heart is this luxurious neighborhood.
Crystalline is all about tranquility and beauty.
Picture vast open spaces filled with lush greenery and stunning water features. It’s the perfect coastal community for anyone looking to escape the hustle and bustle of everyday life.
Vacationers here get to enjoy a fantastic 1.2 km stretch of white sandy beach along the resort, along with sparkling lagoons that cover an impressive 88,000 square meters!
And if you love swimming, you’re in luck—there are five swimming pools waiting just for you.
Overall, Crystalline Silversands is a serene paradise where you can truly unwind, rejuvenate, and revitalize your mind and body.
Sounds like a dream, right?
Acclaro Silversands
As we said above, one of the standout neighborhoods in Silversands is definitely Silvertown, and within that, you’ll find the residential phase called Acclaro. It’s a great area that really captures the essence of community living!
Acclaro Silver Sands North Coast – A Summer Sanctuary
Final Thoughts
As the summer sun paints the sky in vibrant hues, the beach becomes a playground of endless joy. And what is the best way to celebrate the summer season than heading to the Silvertown Silversands North Coast Egypt?
With these facilities, a premium location, a wide array of beach houses for sale and stunning views, heading to this resort is the perfect idea for your summer vacation.

Vye Sodic New Zayed Project at a Glance

--- CONTENT ---
Vye Sodic New Zayed Project
Looking for a trendy yet luxurious new home in the New Zayed City? Then your destination is Vye Sodic New Zayed. With international architectural designs and renowned developers, the Vye Sodic project provides you with a futuristic living experience that keeps an eye on sustainability alongside luxury.
This article will take you to the Vye Sodic Project at a glance.
Vye Sodic New Zayed Project
The Vye Sodic New Zayed project was developed by the well-known developer
Sodic
to be a landmark in New Zayed City.
Vye Sodic New Zayed Project is located across from the Dabaa – Rawd Al-Faraj axis. This strategic location makes the Vye Sodic New Zayed project at the heart of
El Sheikh Zayed City
. Not only does the compound have a location across the axis but also, the Vye Sodic location makes it near major locations such as:
10 minutes from the SODIC West Compound
25 minutes away from Lebanon Square
less than an hour away from Heliopolis
Vye Sodic Compound Facilities
The
Vye Sodic New Zayed compound
is full of amenities that make your life luxurious and easier:
Nova Park is across 12,500 sqm with green areas and treats for sports and community activities.
Co-working spaces with WI-FI networks to enable you to manage your business.
Electric Cars Charging Station
Environmentally-Friendly Vye Sodic New Zayed Compound focuses on sustainable solutions recycling water for agriculture and using renewable energy sources like solar energy.
With a distinctive design, VYE Sodic New Zayed is divided into 3 areas featuring residential and commercial buildings.
Vye Sodic has five private entrances, with green spaces and artificial lakes, so that all residents can enjoy stunning views. The project features clubhouses, medical centers, various shops, entertainment venues, and many vital services catering to everyday needs.
Property Types in VYE Sodic New Zayed
The VYE  Sodic New Zayed compound includes several types of properties with different areas, designs, and price rates to suit different lifestyles. The properties of VYE Sodic in New Zayed can vary among apartments, duplexes, twin houses, and townhouses.
Why Trust Sodic?
With more than 20 years of experience, Sodic Developments is a trusted gateway for those seeking large, successful, and luxurious projects.
The record of Sodic projects includes:
-Eastown Residence in New Cairo
-SODIC East in New Heliopolis
-Sky Condos in New Cairo

-Casa in 6 October City
-Caesar in the North Coast

Mountain View has managed to successfully make residents travel to Greece without a passport. As the coastal village of Mountain View Ras El Hekma is inspired by the famous Greek architecture.
Additionally, each neighborhood is named and built after one of the Greek islands. Within each neighborhood, there are different amenities and properties.
For example, in the Crete Islands neighborhood, there are chalets and townhouses available for sale.
As well as ten exclusive swimming pools and a crystal lagoon filled with water activities.  Another example is the Skala neighborhood which is famous for its seafront beach houses.
Mountain View North Coast also prides itself on being an environmentally friendly community. With that in mind, the village is actively expanding its failure-proof infrastructure through a growing electric power and water desalination capacity.
All About The Mountain View Ras El Hekma Master Plan
Mountain View Ras El Hikma Amenities
As previously mentioned, Mountain View Ras El Hikma provides a wide array of services and facilities of the highest quality. Mountain View Ras El Hikma is inspired by the timeless Greek architectural style.
With that eye-catching design, the coastal village has managed to create a name for itself among the hottest destinations. The Mountain View Ras El Hikma master plan includes a wide array of properties and facilities that ensure the comfort of residents.
Mountain View Ras El Hikma Master Plan

After checking out the updated Mountain View North Coast Egypt prices, master plan, and available units for sale, it’s time to learn about the location.
Mountain View Ras El Hekma Location
The resort falls on an ideal location in North Coast in the heart of the Ras El Hekma area. The Mountain View Ras El Hekma location has immediate access to the Dabaa Road and the New Fouka Road. Mountain View Ras El Hekma is at a close distance :
Ras El Hekma Map
of 3 hours away from Cairo.
While Alexandria is less than 2 hours away from the Mountain View Ras El Hekma location.
The Sidi Abdelrahman area is 35 minutes away from the resort.
Meanwhile, the village is around 50 km away from Alamein International Airport.
